name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 2.14.2025
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-ciluyly-didthutlhu-jt/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciluyly-didthutlhu-r/) **February 14, 2025** Friend --Tuesday, February 18th is the Spring Primary. Our team is working hard to elect Conservatives up and down the ballot. It is officially Get-Out-The-Vote season! Make sure to sign up for Super Saturdays at [wisgop.org/takeactionnow/](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciluyly-didthutlhu-y/)!Read our latest update below!-Team WisGOP**WisGOP News of the Week** Election Integrity remains a high focus for our team. Just this week, we sent out letters to all Municipal Clerks reminding them of their duty to appoint Republican poll workers. This letter is intended to be a preventative measure addressing ongoing concerns over the appointment of Republican-nominated poll workers. The letter lays out the Election Integrity Team's concerns regarding the recent trend of Republican-affiliated poll workers failing to be contacted and scheduled by their clerks to serve as partisan appointed poll workers for all elections in their two-year cycle (2024-2025). Despite requirements relating to poll workers in Wisconsin State Statute 7.30, there has been an ongoing issue with the failure of clerks to uphold their duties by not contacting and scheduling all partisan-affiliated poll workers before resorting to those who are unaffiliated and non-party-appointed workers. The letter was intended to serve two purposes:
1. Remind clerks of their duty to contact and schedule poll workers appointed by the two main political parties before using unaffiliated workers.
2. Demonstrate the seriousness to which the Republican party takes and is willing to address the failure of clerks to uphold their duties by citing past cases where action was taken to ensure Republican workers were present at the polls.

Previously, [Recker v. City of Appleton](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciluyly-didthutlhu-j/), highlighted that if Republicans are made available to work they must be given the opportunity to do so.Further, [Hendrickson v. City of Racine](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciluyly-didthutlhu-t/), enshrined the requirements to contact each and every political party nominee to see if and when they could be trained and what elections they can work through 2025. The Republican Party of Wisconsin will continue to fight for the right of Republicans to participate in the administration of our elections and our team takes this issue extremely seriously. **In Case You Missed It**[**ICYMI: **](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciluyly-didthutlhu-i/)**[Protasiewicz Abuses the Court](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciluyly-didthutlhu-d/)**
In case you missed it, Janet Protasiewicz refused to recuse herself from the Act 10 lawsuit. Protasiewicz's abuse of the Supreme Court to legislate on Act 10 and advance dangeroulsy liberal policies is no surprise, she told us where she stood before she claimed her seat on Wisconsin's highest court.**[ICYMI: Crawford let a five-year-old girl's rapist walk our streets after just two years. She ignored local parents' pleads to relocate the criminal. We cannot trust Susan Crawford. ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciluyly-didthutlhu-h/)**
In case you missed it, Susan Crawford lacks sound judgement, to say the least. In a case with one of the most heinous stories possible, Crawford let a repeat rapist off with a light sentence. In this particular barbaric case, the man was convicted of a class B felony; punishable up to 60 years in Wisconsin.[**ICYMI: WISGOP Raises over $2.29 Million; Over 40-times improvement from 2023**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciluyly-didthutlhu-k/)
"After historic wins in November, the Republican Party of Wisconsin has continued to receive vast support to elect conservatives at every level. Wisconsinites are standing up to Susan Crawford's attempts to sell two congressional seats and legislate dangerously liberal policies from the bench," stated Chairman Brian Schimming.**[ICYMI: Susan Crawford is Exploiting Rape Victims](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciluyly-didthutlhu-u/)**
Dangerously liberal Susan Crawford is cherry-picking statistics and exploiting thousands of rape victims from to hide from her disgraceful record of repeatedly protecting criminals.**[ICYMI: Crawford DOUBLES DOWN to TMJ4 on Selling Congressional Seats](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciluyly-didthutlhu-o/)**
In a stunning new interview, an emboldened Susan Crawford doubled down on her recent attempt to sell Wisconsin congressional seats to out-of-state billionaires in exchange for campaign donations. The brazen solicitation by Crawford raises not only serious judicial ethics questions, but reconfirms her extreme allegiance to rubber stamp the WisDems' dangerously liberal agenda -- from the bench. When asked if she regrets her salesmanship, Crawford told TMJ4, "I was happy to enter that call."**[ICYMI: Radical Crawford Would Destroy Wisconsin's Popular Voter ID Law](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciluyly-didthutlhu-b/)**
"This is not just about one candidate's radical record - it's about the future of fair elections in Wisconsin," said Andrew Iverson, Executive Director for the Republican Party of Wisconsin. "Susan Crawford's disdain for a law that is supported by the overwhelming majority of Wisconsinites can't be hidden. If elected, it's nearly guaranteed Crawford and the liberal Supreme Court majority will dismantle this critical safeguard and jeopardize the integrity of our elections."
# **Worth the Read**

Despite requirements relating to poll workers in Wisconsin State Statute 7.30, there has been an ongoing issue with the failure of clerks to uphold their duties by not contacting and scheduling all partisan-affiliated poll workers before resorting to those who are unaffiliated and non-party-appointed workers. The letter was intended to serve two purposes: 1. Remind clerks of their duty to contact and schedule poll workers appointed by the two main political parties before using unaffiliated workers. 2. Demonstrate the seriousness to which the Republican party takes and is willing to address the failure of clerks to uphold their duties by citing past cases where action was taken to ensure Republican workers were present at the polls. Previously, , highlighted that if Republicans are made available to work they must be given the opportunity to do so.Further, , enshrined the requirements to contact each and every political party nominee to see if and when they could be trained and what elections they can work through 2025. The Republican Party of Wisconsin will continue to fight for the right of Republicans to participate in the administration of our elections and our team takes this issue extremely seriously. In Case You Missed It In case you missed it, Janet Protasiewicz refused to recuse herself from the Act 10 lawsuit. Protasiewicz's abuse of the Supreme Court to legislate on Act 10 and advance dangeroulsy liberal policies is no surprise, she told us where she stood before she claimed her seat on Wisconsin's highest court. In case you missed it, Susan Crawford lacks sound judgement, to say the least. In a case with one of the most heinous stories possible, Crawford let a repeat rapist off with a light sentence. In this particular barbaric case, the man was convicted of a class B felony; punishable up to 60 years in Wisconsin. "After historic wins in November, the Republican Party of Wisconsin has continued to receive vast support to elect conservatives at every level. Wisconsinites are standing up to Susan Crawford's attempts to sell two congressional seats and legislate dangerously liberal policies from the bench," stated Chairman Brian Schimming. Dangerously liberal Susan Crawford is cherry-picking statistics and exploiting thousands of rape victims from to hide from her disgraceful record of repeatedly protecting criminals. In a stunning new interview, an emboldened Susan Crawford doubled down on her recent attempt to sell Wisconsin congressional seats to out-of-state billionaires in exchange for campaign donations. The brazen solicitation by Crawford raises not only serious judicial ethics questions, but reconfirms her extreme allegiance to rubber stamp the WisDems' dangerously liberal agenda -- from the bench. When asked if she regrets her salesmanship, Crawford told TMJ4, "I was happy to enter that call." "This is not just about one candidate's radical record - it's about the future of fair elections in Wisconsin," said Andrew Iverson, Executive Director for the Republican Party of Wisconsin. "Susan Crawford's disdain for a law that is supported by the overwhelming majority of Wisconsinites can't be hidden. If elected, it's nearly guaranteed Crawford and the liberal Supreme Court majority will dismantle this critical safeguard and jeopardize the integrity of our elections." Worth the Read Top Shareable Content Upcoming WisGOP Events | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE Republican Party of Wisconsin | 148 E. Johnson Street | Madison, WI 53703 |

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Take a moment to look around.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl7epn7kae62i6tne0lgk2oekgen1rm8129067ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sdh68pr6clh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5caj2nc2qi5jcs115oblubufnuit1h6fn15japo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sdh68pr6clh2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbn8tg8s3oj643daju261iijlta56k3bnebn80q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sdh68pr6clh2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlo6c0m12988jrdo40ckp4492nmqtn379dm1kmc8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkcqb4tjhe6rrfdljkeqjetjnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31c1i68ob7c8gq48bi4bh28pr6cjhm4p37cpim49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z13plml5bpqmla54mt6e6lbrjj43qnbq5c3t0khg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sdh68pr6clh2bs)_

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Impeachment! Here’s what happens next:
body:
Imagine this scene of heartbreak!

SHUT DOWN the Democrats’ new impeachment hoax.
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcs2p2464and3t1apt1vtp4n1mabi6o2lc6bo70o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sdh68pr6clh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
They truly never learn...
---
**“Donald Trump Impeachment Articles Filed. Here's What Happens Next”** [Source: _Newsweek_]
---
Voters like YOU made your voices heard loud and clear last fall when you sent President Trump back to the White House with Republican majorities in Congress.
---
But the Democrats couldn’t care less about the will of the _PEOPLE_.
---
In fact, the Radical Democrat who filed these articles even claimed that impeachment doesn’t require a crime at all. He simply said, “the word _misdemeanor_ means misdeeds.”
---
In other words, the Democrats believe they can **IMPEACH** the duly elected President of the United States so long as they don’t like him.
---
_That’s how little the Left respects our Republic._
---
Friend, make no mistake, there’s only ONE thing that should _“happen next:”_ **These sham articles of impeachment should be thrown to the ash heap!**
---
_Which is why I’m reaching out to every grassroots patriot I can to ask that you sign your name to demand the Democrats' latest sham impeachment hoax be SHUT DOWN IMMEDIATELY._
---
[**Please add your name right away to stand with President Trump and DEMAND the Democrats’ new impeachment hoax be thrown to the ash heap.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztf73i47i2ebb8qu6frl3ckkbddfmj34f8rs58ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sdh68pr6clh2bs)

name: Ryan Zinke, Navy SEAL
subject: Dead in the water
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
It could be over before it even starts.

| |
---
| | | I'm running out of time.

The media labeled my district a serious **battleground** race, naming _**ME**_ one of America's most vulnerable Republicans right now.

The Democrats have unleashed a fundraising juggernaut in Montana before, and now, they just dumped $50 MILLION into House races across America to destroy conservatives. _**[My campaign could be over before it even starts, and our conservative reforms could be dead in the water if I don't raise the necessary funds in the next 48 hours.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zhve4klpi30jvr0du1bvaup5v6muaod77458h8tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sdh6cpb6c5h2bs "My campaign could be over before it even starts, and our conservative reforms could be dead in the water if I don't raise the necessary funds in the next 48 hours.")**_
---
| | [DONATE NOW >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8aiedrielgsvoped5gofpbgvo4ni4m2ra0c5ab8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sdh6cpb6c5h2bs)
---
It's not just my seat that's on the line. If the Democrats can take me down, they'll crush any hope of Republicans holding the majority in Congress. With only a 3-seat Majority, conservatives' odds of winning are quite slim.

As a Navy SEAL and Cabinet member for President Trump, I've fought for this nation my entire life. But I've never faced a challenge like this. **Democrats are on the warpath to get revenge after their embarrassing loss last year, and liberal elites are willing to open their checkbooks to make it happen. **

I only have 48 hours to do a complete 180 and keep up with their war chest. That's why I'm turning to you. I need your help to blow my fundraising goal out of the water and stop the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation and our values.

**_[If you donate right now- right this minute, we WILL crush our fundraising goals and stop the Democrats' revenge tour from destroying our great nation.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zjado75ibi5vdmndmhmqjlpcepp8uneeeibd5rog_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sdh6cpb6c5h2bs "If you donate right now – right this minute, we WILL crush our fundraising goals and stop the Democrats’ revenge tour from destroying our great nation.")_ **
---
| | [DONATE NOW >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z6in4medtofohkb1c6750q6kvv3blb8nvhcj6eu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sdh6cpb6c5h2bs)
---
I've led teams of Navy SEALs into battle, I've led a team of Navy SEALs into Congress, and in both, I fought against impossible odds. But I've never given up. And I won't give up on you now.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Hillsdale’s Newest Online Course
body:
Imagine this scene of heartbreak!

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9dd0kkm8g4j7ofac4c1s6nem3nkhtl5d76v8k00_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sdh62ob2cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Among the many passages of breathtaking beauty in _Paradise Lost_ is Milton's description of Adam seeing Eve for the first time after the Fall. They had separated for the day to complete their happy labors in the Garden, where Satan found and deceived Eve. Adam, blissfully unaware, had prepared a garland of roses to present to his bride upon their reunification.

When she appeared, he immediately knew disaster had struck: _>From his slack hand the garland wreathed for Eve _ _Down dropped, and all the faded roses shed_
Imagine this scene of heartbreak! Imagine the feeling of all the world coming to ruin! Yet for Adam and Eve, as for us, there is hope in redemption. Milton is a master of building a world, describing tragedy, and depicting renewal.

Join Professor Stephen Smith as he guides us through John Milton's epic poem of power, envy, sin, forgiveness, love, and hope in one of our most beautiful online courses to date. Click the link below to register.

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/paradise-lost**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z52io68ps7npn16algsjkvdem2o5g3puu7fh8jcg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sdh62ob2cph2bs)

Happy learning to you!

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkbi0tvevi7uul0o4bh2u59gn4bmi0mjo9burh08_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cjhm4ob1c9j649fg)

# _Weekly Update_
This past week we saw critical conversations about property taxes, school funding and other issues that will impact the lives of every person in our state.

With second and third reading deadlines under a week away, any lingering legislation looking to live another day will have to pass out of the legislative body it originated in. _**[Click here for more information about legislative deadlines, and other updates from this last week of session](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43e9c7eee0556ebe9647a0d00790f6ebccb833f792976031360630fd514927c9441f0d9b8dc694cc16f96cee748f897c13f "Click here for more information about legislative deadlines, and for other updates from this last week of session")**_
**Committees I Attended this Week**
* [Tax and Fiscal Policy](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43e1b94e9f447b4ea8ec37f16994a28d351ae39db04d0f2afc7cbdb52258fd4fece5cb55c8092aa8f90fb63b071ffcef0d8)
* [Pensions and Labor](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43eb2f17554b121b1d52cf5617da90260cd2f705c5e739d34a065c5436370162f2ef22e92c8801b383e61e6508b2d0dfadb)
* [Utilities](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43e710247dd0e82c28835443f985963ef03f43f96a7280dcdc566b0ef738c80a8a2f0a89a2f2738a4c883c3068836a00522)

With next week's deadlines and the second half of session just around the corner, stay up to date on important legislation updates, stream session and more on [iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43e566ff3fb362fe8c094c590960f7833a7f304ea1bd9dc367c0d413d841dde5d2a0436f5978c89e1874a1467d24742d83b). Additionally, make sure you are following my social media channels for daily updates about session and our District 46 community.
---
#
* * *
---
|
---
| | | **I have had a lot of constituents reach out to ask about Senate Bill 1. **

SB 1 is the General Assembly's response to rising property taxes across our state.

We know this is an issue that needs to be addressed, but it is so important that we get it right.

Though this bill has come a long way since it was first heard in committee, this legislation would **still result in local units of government losing hundreds of millions of dollars.**

Furthermore, there are concerns that this bill, which should aim to cut costs for every Hoosier, only puts an emphasis on homeowners. **We want to help every Hoosier in this state, because every Hoosiers bears the weight of property taxes. **

This bill also tackles referenda and creates different hoops that districts will have to jump through. We have still yet to address, through any legislation, the reason that schools rely on referenda. We spend so much time trying to address the symptoms, but I would like to see us get to the root cause and figure out how we can holistically support public education as a state.

A piece of this version of SB 1 that I am grateful for is the expansion of the first-time homebuyer tax credit. Through an amendment, this credit will be available to more people, opening the door for more Hoosiers to take the first step into homeownership.

This bill still has a long way to go. If it passes out of the Senate next week, it will have to go through the House of Representatives where it is safe to anticipate some changes before it gets sent back to us in the Senate.

SB 1 is a bill to keep a close eye on as it moves through the General Assembly, as it will impact every Hoosier; you can do so at [iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43ea7622047fdc405aa647c134ac46b6ff95c2b243941276f16431b170c4fc759c28aef753327c2c8cbfd0a71f5c87ccdb4 "iga.in.gov").
---
#
* * *
---
| | | **_Halfway Point Legislative Review _**
**[Click here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43e42bf87a25efdb9a04fdea5b7cca4a89fd9284f8a5b5bbe673ee5a1b70593d9a8215d4e33b7f3e8391da992ce5350deac "Click here")** to see legislation that I have authored, or am happy to support, that has made it through the first half of the legislation session.

Additionally, I have included bills I have concerns with, and think they are worth keeping your eye on as we go into the second half of session.
---
| | | [ ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43e63a4fd819c9a470010f44d61fd85aaa0ef365471dfc64fdb35dc7ad75dee8305be2773cfa84dea8cdff37cf7597284fc)
---
| | [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43e63a4fd819c9a470010f44d61fd85aaa0ef365471dfc64fdb35dc7ad75dee8305be2773cfa84dea8cdff37cf7597284fc)
---
#
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| | Simply put, this bill calls for property tax sharing between traditional and charter public schools. We can and should fully fund all public schools, without creating winners and losers.

This bill represents a narrow, isolated piece of a much larger and more complicated policy picture. **We need to consider the following with SB 518: **

**1\. The impact of authorizers from outside of the community:** Authorizers from outside of the community do not have a full understanding of the local needs and priorities, which can lead to decisions that have unintended consequences.

**2\. Instability in the marketplace:** The constant opening and closing of charter schools creates instability for students, families and teachers. A third of charter schools in the county have closed. Disruptions have become the norm.

**3\. Inequality in transportation:** The current transportation system is insufficient to meet the needs of all families, regardless of school type, creating additional barriers for students to access quality education.

**4\. Oversaturation of the market:** The rapid expansion of charter schools has led to an oversaturated market that strains resources and creates competition for funding, without ensuring adequate oversight or a commitment to quality education for all students. In Marion County alone, 90% of charter schools are within the IPS district boundary.

**5\. The need for fiduciary oversight:** It is critical that we have elected bodies providing oversight for education funding to ensure that public dollars are being used efficiently and equitably. SB 518 undermines this by cutting oversight and prioritizing state savings over local school stability.

**6\. The role of Indianapolis in Indiana 's success:** Indianapolis is a key component of Indiana's success, and for the city to thrive, we need a stable and strong local school district. SB 518 does not promote this stability, but rather exacerbates the challenges faced by local districts.

**7\. A call for comprehensive discussion of school choice** : It is time we take a step back and have a comprehensive discussion about the entire landscape of school choice, not in isolated pieces, but as part of a broader, cohesive strategy that truly supports all children.

There is still time to call my colleagues in the Indiana State Senate to let them know your thoughts and feelings on this legislation. Information for contacting legislators can be found at: **[iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43ea7622047fdc405aa647c134ac46b6ff95c2b243941276f16431b170c4fc759c28aef753327c2c8cbfd0a71f5c87ccdb4 "iga.in.gov")**
**[🎬 Listen to my closing thoughts from committee this week for SB 518](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43ee06201a297cbca4e2cae976b688e55d507b4c70137b932d5915db80cc1e80cc22f41c5fef4e3b61671488880a950d33d "Listen to my closing thoughts from committee this week for SB 518 ") 🎬 **
---
#
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| | Thank you to everyone who braved the cold for my second coffee meet-up of session! I am always grateful for the opportunity to connect with you all about the issues facing our community and the opportunities for us to make it better.

Additionally, thank you to Rabble for hosting. Rabble's emphasis on creating a safe space for all and amplifying the voices of local creatives are but a couple of reasons they are a staple of the Near Eastside.

_Stay tuned for future dates and locations! _
---

* * *
---

# 2025 Pre-Session Survey Results
Thank you to all of you who took the time to share your hopes, concerns and ideas for our community.

This feedback helps me best represent District 46. We are better when we use our collective voices to effect change. Thank you for your help in creating a better Indiana.

Results can be found _**[here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43eeb01f105391275b6f3d6c78515b426a0b6e33196d3c4dc155a352360c45825e348c9191d851d222abbfc86727cc7ee73 "here")**._

Could it return?](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=31c471a9b015c43e7b685063f626ca2076dfa7bf8c8bedc6c24d72b9267bbddaa1726000873e01e117153552eb6fd959f3d9ffa1fc7f77bf "Legislation to dissolve IPS fizzles out. Could it return?")

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Trump’s chaos is hurting Virginians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3637cd7-bb4f-41be-88b4-05b18df6d5a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, It’s been a sad and chaotic week in Washington – and it’s only getting worse by the day. What’s clear is this: The current state of our nation isn’t just hurting Virginia families and families across the country, it’s undermining the values that make our democracy strong. We are only a couple weeks into this new administration, and already, the damage is piling up. Trump threatened to start a trade war with two of Virginia’s largest trading partners, Canada and Mexico. He’s allowed unelected billionaire Elon Musk access to classified information and given him full control to attempt to shut down USAID. And, he’s targeted federal employees who call Virginia home – nonpartisan public servants who have devoted their careers to protecting our communities and keeping Virginia safe. And throughout all the chaos, Virginia’s Republican leadership — our Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General — has stood by Donald Trump no matter the cost. We need a Governor who will always stand up for Virginia and stand up for what’s right. I need your help to flip this Governor’s seat in November and build out a strong campaign. [Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Blue Amp Action help us send a strong message that Virginia is not going to accept chaos this November?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f7ef996-d7a7-49c0-9ae9-7688b20ec91e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd239985-13e6-46b0-90fe-e723015b6d7e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Abigail Spanberger
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|

| | |
---
| | | | |
---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250215_trumpchaos_b1_f1_s1_c1_90op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce3a75b8-1996-48c7-8767-c93d85a2be32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Vance Attack European Free Speech in Munich
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wg1ge-uz7yri-kyd76rh4/)
---
# **Vance Attacks European Free Speech in Munich**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wg1ge-uz7yrj-kyd76rh5/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, At the Munich Security Conference, Vice President JD Vance laid bare the MAGA agenda and their dangerous priorities. Rather than standing with Ukraine against Putin's aggression, they chose to use this critical moment to appease the Russian dictator and cater to his every demand. Vance, in his speech, said barely a word about Ukraine. Instead, he attacked European nations for protecting democratic norms and falsely accused them of censoring free speech. His message? MAGA’s loyalty lies with Putin, not the fight for freedom and sovereignty in Ukraine. This echoes the MAGA playbook we’ve seen time and again. Just as Trump and his allies bend over backward to meet every demand from Netanyahu, they’re now doing the same for Putin—turning their backs on Ukraine while undermining global democracy. Even Elon Musk has joined this disturbing trend, endorsing far-right parties in Europe and giving extremists like Germany’s AfD a platform. These actions show just how far MAGA will go to dismantle democratic alliances and destabilize the world stage. We cannot allow MAGA to rewrite the rules of international diplomacy or abandon Ukraine in its time of need. This is not just a betrayal of our allies but a direct threat to the values we hold dear. [**_We must remain vigilant and resolute in opposing this dangerous agenda. It's imperative that we support leaders and policies that uphold democratic values, protect free speech, and foster international cooperation. By standing together, we can counteract the MAGA movement's attempts to spread authoritarianism and ensure that democracy prevails both at home and around the world._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wg1ge-uz7yrk-kyd76rh6/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---

Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: We can’t afford to lose this fight
body:
I need you to see this

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a14A/?__vbtrk=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, let me be blunt.
**The Far Left Democrats in DC hate me**.
They hate me because **I was one of the youngest Republican women ever elected to Congress**.
They hate me because **I shattered their narrative** by fighting unapologetically for conservative values.
And they hate me because **I helped lead the House GOP to victory** , taking the gavel away from Nancy Pelosi.
**_But most of all, they hate me because I won’t be silenced._**
That's why they’ve attacked me with every smear you can imagine...
They’ve called me every name in the book; traitor, extremist, insurrectionist, you name it. They won't stop coming after me because I’m on the frontlines defending **you** and **your values**.
[DEFEND CONSERVATIVE VALUES](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a14A/?__vbtrk=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, the attacks aren’t just on me. The Democrats are coming after all of us. People in the public eye like me, and like President Trump are just in the way.
They want to destroy the Republican Majority and take back total control in Washington. Their radical machine is already flooding millions into critical races, desperate to seize power again.
And let me tell you something: if they regain control, they will crush every freedom-loving American who dares to resist their agenda.
**We cannot let that happen.**
**__[The only way to stop them is to keep fighting and that’s exactly what I’m going to do. But I can’t do it without you](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a14A/?__vbtrk=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
[DEFEND THE MAJORITY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a14A/?__vbtrk=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This battle is expensive. **Lawsuits** , **investigations** , **campaign operations**... they all cost money.
But while the Democrats have woke billionaires and Leftist Hollywood elites bankrolling their schemes** __ we rely on grassroots patriots like you**.
**__[That’s why I’m asking you directly: Can I count on you to help us defend the House GOP and protect our majority](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a14A/?__vbtrk=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?_**
[DEFEND AMERICA](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a14A/?__vbtrk=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This fight is personal for me and for every Republican who refuses to back down.
We’re not just defending a majority, we’re defending America itself.
We’re defending YOU.
**_Time is short, and the stakes couldn’t be higher._**
Don’t let the Radical Left steamroll us, friend.
**__[Please make a contribution today to help us keep fighting](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a14A/?__vbtrk=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
_Thank you for standing with me,_
**Elise Stefanik** Proud Conservative Fighter for America
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a14A/?__vbtrk=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
P.S. The Democrats are mobilizing to take back the House. Every dollar you give today helps stop them in their tracks. Chip in here to help us defend the majority and protect the future of America.
| | [DEFEND THE HOUSE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a14A/?__vbtrk=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

body:

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/fM1hSytisaT673FhEHFuOmWj6s34UrRSiW2NUrT0k60Z3jM2Pjmwaxun2SkJgYV7Rj0YTYjPFMRiRBrcAIFIAOIHozXwSasEE7lqnyyR57_H4qko0G1RL67YhAI8ITWjIXtO7S3IEboUUKc2fYSpPhmuOBwf9aHia_ItEancIPqHuHtHH_PBSeLkPPcmgvpJqtH-fCEw0Q_ZiG4hY2IyLLwoDL3QxtehbPDhQ_uSsmdRzGe6rvqkCSXZvTyFPf3Uz9X_n6V_4TxRpW-DRscHxA5wKhlvu_0xToQ5NF-fAC_XOdme2nrpFtrZdCACe5oV0LxuW1fe1Rctum_tZ6P1LtYSZINLyoGbs9brxXeXWq_a0ef4OYOAE4x_Ww7M5t81pi950Zhqwh3bWL1FmWGArxhlCHMwasonlEbdsnQn-B_mfLY5lvRzLNM/qzHMQBgriBJarplWD7gSTNF_qH_5jV_a/6)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/1iTlKgYFwOcqGmgah_CaPm208qF5yM_geMTUjC2lUb5gbHu-ktzbQ1E9pNfyb45VOIjHuW4CJPizFweeEh53xW9-pvRDNYNk-CldX9MIXo_KXCni1p7Jja_CthTLx3s9PFG9LjWHNBQuVtdbHaByCgHCcWyM49QrcU48G2joW7Qo2gq9xgnrJnxMgW0oB5iaJi4snyAu9ARd2FpzycocRN0A3-mL7891wtxLwsyT5aEhTn9f7YleGmf-H7NpTLpdElOwGMUq6NZS_Wv9AvrRDWYYoR1TmwmDiW3mcj9JtUy7YzbW9wq6qXTew0ye1CeMwdPy59PBvwIB6mcC0ZDuYOCZw7ELWG4-WQQOVBlFHOIrDxvT3EbwSS-eMN38hq2zyZ47iBvnjzXOZ0KdzBvO1XKUBpWWKPheqkVSVHyqguXAHjTobffp0rM/EgpdsW6q4SI6llSwjnXiDzS-psE6jqu0/6)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

clean_body: There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country. Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society. This survey will only take just a few minutes. But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty... ...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren. You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here: Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free. Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response. Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College | | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
#################################

Friend,

**[BIG NEWS:](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/GcIyNy1kYdBR_eQe4jvdNevs7G9z6BhEwWqUyf2NYb9fIpeJvm3P9o5cDPVg3TzOqjhlXRPUqCWuu1dUhZnwsxJQ2LGgf8ttQ8F1YE_b8Gb_UgVHnWB33OQ5m0aGseJBUT8rEFMv4xWbRADDPruMlzvLExjwgraKNpSofMIZV10NhrknYn25N-YM0bQevQwh2rP2vNLmu0DAw3XtE-PfHoGqyRtpQQGtuNvrbpgtYLNfQUlxzAPPuKc5qy8N8UD0VkO9QM6JZTyFfrzbyjcwQbV5C95jzcXxX5o7tgqglnG-zh2929aa7yMkpX5aKCCHVch_cPGU-clPwoO5Ooxx8zZuGjVQ0UIcjoXGtr9qunLAHKvrV2Z_3MznHIUkd5gjZ-vEFvAH2dkpLo-Tr1wNenfKPyyGzEaoLn6yoQ3XEW0cGibjYL1bT1oKgcCldo7A6ZXKL4cdi3nuDAwBhG5MBYq4saulBSV-nEamhCM_iZH1J4MC7uE9YhCEOz0GjLSWWAhsGAa696LfoXqNS7x9VHMrYANnNGwRlGGUr8HH/Q9wF6Gj2Xx9kMclwfpx7hKSfxuUffYbg/6) **Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But here's the thing...

_... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025._

name: The Flyover
subject: Vance Challenges Europe, the Polar Vortex is Back, and a Whale of a Tale
body:
Vice President Vance [delivered](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7Fu9CAQBOCngc4WrMEcBcXf0N3fprQILOeNsDnZxM69feRIKdONNNI3mrf7dA9UaH38Dwu6lusEAnQnoJN6SoHKa1I8uYwIOHB00gx2lMZq4LMLWZpB4U1YOQprMgatjNACMqKO75aTuzQBUkspAWyvzYgYhbqlEcxtUEwJTNTq1n9UWtuMubzqgVsf68KLm1t77mz4x8Az8Od59uGL6n61DPxlM_ACGHipGPgjrBG75XOlOHf7EzHOXd4Qf3PIiW8uPU8qhfbRMCUeS6Dys9b-en84-A4AAP__jqBZ1Q) a pointed speech at the Munich Security Conference, urging European leaders to consider how their nations have drifted away from critical values.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z82K6yAUAOCn0V2DHn_SLFwULtJNC3cxnWUwemIcTAxWUvr2w8x-XuCD7_M23lzKaYt3t6JpcxmBgToxOHE1Bpfye5Q0mBkRUFA0vBeD5v2ggC4Gg3fMMym5gyl4IXFm04QandJhEgNN5kdjwBXnHGDoVK8RPZPnoKE_C0kkw5Baqd1XSVtbcM7vcmDtfFlpNktr-5OICwFLwMZ0pC12r1Jz8GXzWLeu1EjA7i4iAWs_7v8f18vj-s_SasL-Sjmnp-6JZHF1Kf-q7a_lYeA7AAD__9N2U_4) | |
# Saturday, February 15, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1903, toy store owner Morris Michtom, with President Theodore Roosevelt’s permission, displayed the first “[Teddy bears](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGnwRsWXBswA0MXb-na0cLmEt-KmAhQLL99lapr5086R__Xbbl5SnTcP_0DXYt5AQGKC-BSLcFTupaxCy4iAg4dOmkGq6WxCrrdCR990Fqs07RJ3KbVKzFsZlytt0NcbUfuvSZAKiklgO2V0YibGKegwUzDyEaBgVou_Xemo-0Y05VfWPotP7rk9taelQ0fDGYG83me_U615XK9ncHcdqo8-IvTwf-EwRyp1MYbhnDxFX3h94yV54NXn7ArLjxPSomqNmwU94en9HvX_st_OfgJAAD__7VuXdQ),” which soon became a beloved childhood toy nationwide. Need an excuse to stay home this weekend? The polar vortex ought to do the trick! Stay warm, folks. (And don't go near any volcanoes or whales, either. It's a dangerous business, going out your front door. See below!) We’re sponsored today by the nonprofit [World Concern](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z82K6yAUAOCn0V2DHn_SLFwULtJNC3cxnWUwemIcTAxWUvr2w8x-XuCD7_M23lzKaYt3t6JpcxmBgToxOHE1Bpfye5Q0mBkRUFA0vBeD5v2ggC4Gg3fMMym5gyl4IXFm04QandJhEgNN5kdjwBXnHGDoVK8RPZPnoKE_C0kkw5Baqd1XSVtbcM7vcmDtfFlpNktr-5OICwFLwMZ0pC12r1Jz8GXzWLeu1EjA7i4iAWs_7v8f18vj-s_SasL-Sjmnp-6JZHF1Kf-q7a_lYeA7AAD__9N2U_4), offering an opportunity to help children in need in Somalia.
|
---
## Vance Challenges Europe
Vice President Vance [delivered](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7Fu9CAQBOCngc4WrMEcBcXf0N3fprQILOeNsDnZxM69feRIKdONNNI3mrf7dA9UaH38Dwu6lusEAnQnoJN6SoHKa1I8uYwIOHB00gx2lMZq4LMLWZpB4U1YOQprMgatjNACMqKO75aTuzQBUkspAWyvzYgYhbqlEcxtUEwJTNTq1n9UWtuMubzqgVsf68KLm1t77mz4x8Az8Od59uGL6n61DPxlM_ACGHipGPgjrBG75XOlOHf7EzHOXd4Qf3PIiW8uPU8qhfbRMCUeS6Dys9b-en84-A4AAP__jqBZ1Q) a pointed speech at the Munich Security Conference, urging European leaders to consider how their nations have drifted away from critical values. ” _Free speech, I fear, is in retreat in Europe_ ,” Vance said. He cited German police raids over alleged hate speech by anti-feminists, arrests of anti-abortion activists in the U.K., and the cancellation of Romanian elections. Vance [also spoke](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvgzAQBeBfYzYj-zA4DB66sKVrR3Sxj-RaY0fGCeLfV3Tv9qRPenp6X9f5ihw53T9xJVeXPIOCXiqQup8Dcjxm0wS3EAF1DTltu3HQduyheThj8EadIr-o4Acbem8sQhdu6AevARp2Z5sC3WutAca2twORV-YSBrCXzgijKHDNpf3OnOqDlnjkN5XW57WJ7lHrcxPdh4BJwLTve5tuPtG-nS5gOuMJucQgYHpj8iRfPwU5kSyvbWOUgTDKWl7rU64cuWI5ZM05brL4hHoEfYGmuPDcOUbeBiuMuq_I8W9D_e-Tt4PfAAAA___iPWUO) about Europe’s mass migration problems and its governments’ refusal to work with anti-immigration political parties. The VP said there is “a new sheriff in town in Washington” and that if European leaders ignore their voters, then America can’t help them. The room was mostly silent as Vance delivered the speech, and the European response after the speech was [just as icy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb8Gb1jwwNgeGLJYHZquHS1sHjERhgiToPTrK3fvdIcrHR2d7-t8NT74ePsyO-ri0gwMOsqA8m62xof3LBurHSKgaFDzXoyK92MHzabVwFA6J8elX9ggnFwGDosxYmGDlYo3Xp80BrzjnAOMbdcrxJXJwSroByGJZGh9Sbm9Jx_Lhi680wtzu6a9CXor5XEQcSEwEZhqre1-xPMjMGGkz4PAFLGeU1MOlsB0t_Rl4oq0mhwPmhwtW0ZTqMtpp9WXzUdaEsVnTg80kVrc05rN-iYwmUwvF_4jPtRnk7V9VB-CP1RPJLvtxoc_rfJfppeG3wAAAP__pyVqMA).
## DOJ Moves to Dismiss NYC Mayor Charges
The Department of Justice has [filed a motion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGP4yAQhX8N7ohgAGMXLnJaudtrr4xmYUhmZYxlSKzcrz_5-q3ek570Se_783n7RF54vf_GTFNL5QYKnFQgtbtF5OV9s12cEhGQ6WjS3oy99qOD7jGN40DJpxGGAVIETZawV-rLJ4pfXpmOp5OmQDutNcB4cb4nCsoOsQc_GCusosit7Jfvwmt7UFre5UX7JZTcLdOjta0KcxUwC5iP47jkup6bgJlW-awC5pWOM7aycONw1u9nbRxIRtpwb5nWJnN5UZWtyLiXTQasJPGOvNYm13eQGd9ll7RzkBgxnxDc5fWq_7p7sMLM4cVRmA-lSXnoyaP2NnibQFlrcXQ2OaOdEtBj3oT5RSzMB5hun-J28LJw7b2w6p6Rl__f2k-uXxP8CwAA__8oP33d) to dismiss corruption charges against New York City Mayor Eric Adams. Adams has denied accusations that he took $100,000 in bribes from Turkish officials in exchange for favors or that he destroyed evidence in the case against him. Several senior Justice Department officials [refused to drop](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L3u3CAQBPCnwd2eYA3-KCjS0P3TprQ4s9icbK8FnE_39pHTp57RT5r58zP9-LSlY_ntd7I18oQSDUgEZabg0_addBNsJEJqG7Kqb8dO9aPBZrVPraLX3Wh0jHHoSOpeBzN3Q4_PaFrTJHtrEpVRSiGOD9N3RLPUQ-iwH1ottKSQKufHi9NRV4rbly_Kj5n3ZrNrrWcR7S-BTqA7vieXekcC3Q0LdBIFOqUFuneBgz5FoIsUCux8EVSGyqWAD34vMHPO77MmPmBefV6ogI-VMnz8RcARMpW0HP5uFDgzVyo1HQvU_N5PCPwCzoHyzYbMJ8y-kEDXZBvOT9q2VLpeaLnsPm3_FtT_PXpZ_BsAAP__h595sw) the case against Adams and eventually resigned in protest, including Acting Manhattan U.S. Attorney Danielle Sassoon—who claimed that the move is a quid pro quo in exchange for Adams' cooperation with immigration enforcement. New York Gov. Kathy Hochul said [she may remove](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuwyAUheGnwRsRXAyYgaELW7p2tJC5xLTYRIAT-e0rd-98pE9H_9d9vvuU0_749BvaHssMDCRlQLmcg0_5nMch2IgIKAa0XAujuDYShtVqrkAzEEIZibDEIIyflPQ4mgmNgSHZS2PAJeccwNykVogLG6egQE9iJCPDkHqpt--S9r5izGd5Yb0tZRuyXXt_NiI-CDgCbj-fpfVrIuAumIBjQMBxQcAdje74bgTcj-_rSdeyrEemoWDbO61HRlqOTitu5ZX2B8WaFuqD3xqNtWy0xJgWJOCGasPznXJOTWkyssfmU_471P8L9LLwGwAA__-c3WYv) Adams from office but that she needs more time to consider the matter.
## Polar Vortex Strikes Again
Another burst of [frigid arctic air](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp_G7oiGAQwuKG6TLrfd0uJnnMyKGIugZLNPv_L2W376pKOj83FZLoELb9f_4U6-r3VBQCMAhTRLDlzeix6zX4mQ1EheWjVP0s4Gx5tPVppophjcaiQkrVYzZYAcwWVAtCP7gwYojZQScT4ZOxEl0C5PaJ3SgwbK3Gs7fVbe-o3W8q5PaqdU72Pxt973x6D-DXge8Bz2jV6P4zpG65wKDXhOtWTB6S32WkITz9o6fYkXb52aWBvRN29X4QzEeQajo1XWQiatcpRRztIRuWTG5vP-4lL4MdlBw_UeuPxq9L-yPD3-BAAA__93C2KW) is headed south. In a typical winter, the polar vortex only hits America two or three times, but this week will be the 10th polar visitation of the year. The cold air hits the Rockies and northern Plains today, and only California and Florida will be spared the frigid temps this week. Meteorologists expect next week to be the [coldest of the year](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LHS2yAQBOCnkbrTwEmAVVCkcfenTekh4iRIEGjgbNlvn1H6v_52dnb219fjy8UU8_bT7WR5LQ8UqEAgSPXwLqbPY-q9XYmQxp6sNOOspZkV9sEKbcQkF738vkmjxExqlhrHVePktRRrH-3VJlAqKSXiPCijiRYx3bxGcxunbhLkI5c6_Ckxc6A1fcqL6rCUvU82MB-tG390eO_wfp7n8HGhlEs7vGc6W4d3lwsHqnCU5Cq8SmV6AxdolD0w7QdVx89KDY70zFvMG7illtaAA8GzQaY3w0n0FwJdsVBOWEryEBnOmBJsxCCN0EpJoYbAe-qr9cdlsWnTTWLbXUz_R_N3J74s_gsAAP__ArJ1aw) across the nation, with average temps hitting 14 on Wednesday.
|
---
**➤ Richard Grenell, **a top aide to President Trump, says he'd consider a run for Governor of California if former VP Harris throws her name in the ring. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kstyozoARL8GdriQBEJasHCCfX2NX8QZ57GhhCRAGQmILHDw108ly6mabXd1L06dl325Z0qrrjkwI1NX9yUMYRyEMABxKZjScxn5Iq2lhBL5MgUJohgkNIZ-m5IqYjysKAOYx5AjREhEZZTUjFBSJdxX6fdbCEEMAICQLuIES8nDiAgME4IiLwqlUK63i49eda6VtZ77SdoF742v09a54eqhpQfXHlzfbrcF6_V358G1s6MZAqaEDKziQWNlJ7UOXGslc7K7BgBDBEkEyKJ1Rnto3Yyc92PnpPVQBjyIm5HL0spaWvuTsc1TyDd7vJspEoiP75BO7_BL78xhqs7k70V5VY2HsmWxXC6z6d4YNq8LeR6HkbNfWVm85MdP2vKyMOQ4Y2cu5qGY7GqZHAGx8_YBdheiTvxN5DRLBpyv--2tP5njOZ6-sBCCf8EzXOXFf08l-X_3GW1pUhtZzbvX6ZidVl1wp9njffe2yW38uQ_sRZt509hXl4vT8Fg-V7-3o3w6gK5z98v98NHQ5xXmk29TMdyU1uqKEy8KG8PUD1Tf_UuAKYV_AgAA__-Sl7OQ)) **➤ House Republicans **are looking for ways to shift Medicaid contribution burdens to state governments as part of a plan to save $880 billion over the next 10 years. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn8N3ojgADseGLp4S9eO1hXOgYqAhS-p8u-rdOnU-fv0nvQ-LusFc8n1-o438ry1FRQ4qUBqt0bM5bnaIfqNCMgM5PVk5lFPs4MheRVnE9ymtQ1WBzVO6LTZYpzP2kQ1qyH7F02BdlprgPnkppEoKHuOI0xnY4VVFDO3fvpquXKirTzbg_optNtQfGLeD2HeBCwCFk6UcimvTcCyt5LDU8CSCAungJ0ELE5bq5yRnfb7Z8kB6yH3O8u_kwx3PuTWW2WJNcpAlalLbhLjA2sgiVeqEQUsQ_dx_86l5GOchFXXG-Zf_cD_pXp4-AkAAP__98Frgg)) **➤ The Department of the Interior **has fired 2,300 employees. The Office of Personnel Management directed the move, which was aimed entirely at employees still on probationary status. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZD2y24CHwMFIK7K99ELkwQ30HticbQbNfv2JzS9qqZ_0SlW_P4dPxyuH-ZfbyJYpDiixAYmgmsE7Xt9DXXk7ESHpiqwyumuV6RqsFkv3Z0OdNK0eu061RkoaW9nV8tmgM85VbC-bRNUopRC7W2NaolHWd9-iueta1JI8l5huX5FDWWha3_FF6TbGrVrtUsqehX4I7AX253nethwuJrCnAEcW2G8x0Pu6Lv2hcn0OyMChUOKYwNPuUtkoFBiPkgFBSwlf8ZnBbexhvuLCD_fxDJm_OcyQ6CiULplL8Hio7_rjbxK6jyN7oT8mDi6MBC9KZdlhIvK5StbvJ68r59aIWs6b4_WnR_nfri-L_wIAAP__ynZ7vA))
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z82K6yAUAOCn0V2DHn_SLFwULtJNC3cxnWUwemIcTAxWUvr2w8x-XuCD7_M23lzKaYt3t6JpcxmBgToxOHE1Bpfye5Q0mBkRUFA0vBeD5v2ggC4Gg3fMMym5gyl4IXFm04QandJhEgNN5kdjwBXnHGDoVK8RPZPnoKE_C0kkw5Baqd1XSVtbcM7vcmDtfFlpNktr-5OICwFLwMZ0pC12r1Jz8GXzWLeu1EjA7i4iAWs_7v8f18vj-s_SasL-Sjmnp-6JZHF1Kf-q7a_lYeA7AAD__9N2U_4) Somalia is facing a devastating combination of natural disasters, global conflicts, widespread poverty, and disease outbreaks. East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. **[Be Doers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z82K6yAUAOCn0V2DHn_SLFwULtJNC3cxnWUwemIcTAxWUvr2w8x-XuCD7_M23lzKaYt3t6JpcxmBgToxOHE1Bpfye5Q0mBkRUFA0vBeD5v2ggC4Gg3fMMym5gyl4IXFm04QandJhEgNN5kdjwBXnHGDoVK8RPZPnoKE_C0kkw5Baqd1XSVtbcM7vcmDtfFlpNktr-5OICwFLwMZ0pC12r1Jz8GXzWLeu1EjA7i4iAWs_7v8f18vj-s_SasL-Sjmnp-6JZHF1Kf-q7a_lYeA7AAD__9N2U_4)** We’re asking the Flyover Community to join us in partnering with World Concern to help get emergency nutrition packs (a peanut paste fortified with nutrients), water, and hygiene products to those with the most need. Every $12 feeds a child for a month. [We’re matching the first $750; just give through this link](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z82K6yAUAOCn0V2DHn_SLFwULtJNC3cxnWUwemIcTAxWUvr2w8x-XuCD7_M23lzKaYt3t6JpcxmBgToxOHE1Bpfye5Q0mBkRUFA0vBeD5v2ggC4Gg3fMMym5gyl4IXFm04QandJhEgNN5kdjwBXnHGDoVK8RPZPnoKE_C0kkw5Baqd1XSVtbcM7vcmDtfFlpNktr-5OICwFLwMZ0pC12r1Jz8GXzWLeu1EjA7i4iAWs_7v8f18vj-s_SasL-Sjmnp-6JZHF1Kf-q7a_lYeA7AAD__9N2U_4).

clean_body: Vice President Vance a pointed speech at the Munich Security Conference, urging European leaders to consider how their nations have drifted away from critical values. | | | | | | Saturday, February 15, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1903, toy store owner Morris Michtom, with President Theodore Roosevelt’s permission, displayed the first “,” which soon became a beloved childhood toy nationwide. Need an excuse to stay home this weekend? The polar vortex ought to do the trick! Stay warm, folks. (And don't go near any volcanoes or whales, either. It's a dangerous business, going out your front door. See below!) We’re sponsored today by the nonprofit , offering an opportunity to help children in need in Somalia. | Vance Challenges Europe Vice President Vance a pointed speech at the Munich Security Conference, urging European leaders to consider how their nations have drifted away from critical values. ” Free speech, I fear, is in retreat in Europe ,” Vance said. He cited German police raids over alleged hate speech by anti-feminists, arrests of anti-abortion activists in the U.K., and the cancellation of Romanian elections. Vance about Europe’s mass migration problems and its governments’ refusal to work with anti-immigration political parties. The VP said there is “a new sheriff in town in Washington” and that if European leaders ignore their voters, then America can’t help them. The room was mostly silent as Vance delivered the speech, and the European response after the speech was . DOJ Moves to Dismiss NYC Mayor Charges The Department of Justice has to dismiss corruption charges against New York City Mayor Eric Adams. Adams has denied accusations that he took $100,000 in bribes from Turkish officials in exchange for favors or that he destroyed evidence in the case against him. Several senior Justice Department officials the case against Adams and eventually resigned in protest, including Acting Manhattan U.S. Attorney Danielle Sassoon—who claimed that the move is a quid pro quo in exchange for Adams' cooperation with immigration enforcement. New York Gov. Kathy Hochul said Adams from office but that she needs more time to consider the matter. Polar Vortex Strikes Again Another burst of is headed south. In a typical winter, the polar vortex only hits America two or three times, but this week will be the 10th polar visitation of the year. The cold air hits the Rockies and northern Plains today, and only California and Florida will be spared the frigid temps this week. Meteorologists expect next week to be the across the nation, with average temps hitting 14 on Wednesday. | ➤ Richard Grenell, a top aide to President Trump, says he'd consider a run for Governor of California if former VP Harris throws her name in the ring. () ➤ The Department of the Interior has fired 2,300 employees. The Office of Personnel Management directed the move, which was aimed entirely at employees still on probationary status. () | Flying together with our sponsor Somalia is facing a devastating combination of natural disasters, global conflicts, widespread poverty, and disease outbreaks. East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. We’re asking the Flyover Community to join us in partnering with World Concern to help get emergency nutrition packs (a peanut paste fortified with nutrients), water, and hygiene products to those with the most need. Every $12 feeds a child for a month. . | ➤Future Hall of Fame outfielder Ichiro Suzuki plans to donate his personal baseball collection to the museum in Cooperstown after his induction. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/oiD1vP32yNBN0Tbu0YnucisDwEkM7YK5xgB4VsGpO0TXERfWET5CzvKg_nc3SUTxWQ0L7nrmUiBMP9DHTQoih-l-NTW43jnFv6Rw8tqFIZMx8vJ7j2EQRa0Hd4dnKMj3oQ2DmmWY_wSx_qzhR4uuucccGq_DV7pecqjl7kbB0mhcLcTFttbxBQUwASY8XcVFRTUu8TojnE56B6or4NeYRcuYemG3TMnFk6aqRGTYolT-XGRIZF2GHb57sq-NckIHPeYyG38EAxILRZs7o5RcA52jCAcur_tzOpNOZ14jIpJWloC5j1MROCV5zyDNKW388FovVjLsVBsq8cK3oOa9xw-33G_WY37AzDquDizIsvHg8u9WLHsl6Z_Og9sUckVrhIBUwEGStHekBRBUfdy0M9_vXCfBuO3hRRjYOdkTBAvP48LqBlYVqdi7QHxQaeeGVNOGG7HRNwI9bUI_g_nGXVI-wffZIJRmwrGm21iWRuk/8zzdOWFeZifbUR9bARCx7XAJQSdzyaBg/6)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/CfzasFYMs1c3jVjoNO4YGdbH2JYAS1O1aDzOZps0HmZZPtc4tS3cAaUu_FToIWIKyqCudal1ABxAytbml6mXJ1hEcDnOzxQRuC4jdJpyOefF0RDVjalCBPdF1uxbbltLz941sJyrYO3fBEo02cviaZdT16bFoOwwJH-CgiW_pgWsjo3Z31WpWu4Nk3-XuHBLqusiKT7g6UjY007vFWOQq3TFPX52XfKVP-cKxvlLanEzWpjZolRLZiba-1w53zYxSSwRYHm9Q3BeCPe_SsrJKfaCqbaPaHUxUF0WhXf33e_M_BNHgXXt29g_kwY7rp_sIAeWCfxMPde6D6bs1D4FHZ58Na2rwYlgQ9EoVlhtAHRnhFP2gvVW50gOWo0cogmExV_DHdc0nBpC6zMhmwTz_vXqjH2T3GkMbj_dhx0hqM6RwTWN4Jy9p0I7adKxC7DSW4kTC6NCn-out9PxBdBZEXNNOnwGDHciv7bsSAP_YI0/7kGNlh0qlRnRu6eXfx7uLUhb1IT5yG7y/6)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/WLzdcG6afswtLUxJzLVSn9GpqOikPPBD4fKQxP54QyKrokmoUZhV20U7CxdjfDroLp4NT-jUMm2fdF8DpMU161XWVMQEsV9-LEUT476185iiUBSbgr65IP5CmDXTgLeEuHp6Y2CDu1izYdlg_ihpQyHEzXK1Gntwyq_loUTPjncsgxFnao7wl77me-JkXMbkPtx9BOSk6joL7rhwiS5YZyoVWQ6qyCRLvxqjtLRdkKQdTK5cuAeVLIbAvcDCeRjdo6bR4P_5Sx07-Kjl0FPx2yO45Lt6QrGq_9FyJAEN_L2RJeSIYNbBCNH0piBnBfdCNRS01LbFPAd6AoDX5JVAGycOH6zBB_079EO3zi5toXm74goOvyKxJ3gdEWakQhbWgrQkKJGrBwqB-XKY2rW65M9SINRQTnEl34QwLcyfc6cle0eiiKmu2RWP8yetkNSL7dg18_Zb4EY_04MrTLTm2MOhlxE60csnBpRm9bjLChw/KjM1uC1T8x0dEn9CEyUTJgzMq5uei2Oi/6)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____

clean_body: It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden Corruption Back in Court!
body:
Border Corruption Update!

[INSIDE JW]

Court Orders Justice Department to Commit on Releasing Biden Audio
Tapes

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=34542&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj0zcFFhRWJ0cGVPTSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c8eb68c6a094c109fe2509099a24df30d30860c348ff7480410ad66330b1810d]

A federal court ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=34522&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJpZGVuLWh1ci1vcmRlci0wMDcwMC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=dc75c7d09ffb4bea1eab2a27358180d2011963f07a9ccf08b455be7f4e38b7bb]
the Department of Justice to declare whether it intends to continue
denying our request for the full audio of former President Joe
Biden’s interview with Special Counsel Robert Hur.

We hope the Trump Justice Department accepts what seems like an
invitation from a federal court to end the Biden regime's cover-up of
Biden’s apparent dementia.

Judge Timothy J. Kelly of the U.S. District Court for the District of
Columbia wrote:

> In light of the recent change in administration, it is hereby
> ORDERED that Defendant shall, by February 19, 2025, file a status
> report confirming that its position outlined in its [34
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=32574&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJpZGVuLXRyYW5zY3JpcHQtbXNqLTAwNzAwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8c5a404d40b12d39225d33a8491c465b5c24e46b8774f5f3fc014d97337e5ac0]]
> Motion for Summary Judgment and [46
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=33110&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJpZGVuLWh1ci1jcm9zcy1tb3Rpb24tMDA3MDAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8688c5da58cb4a03d84ac23ef360c7f2396329a37993b6defd26d66a98f782e1]]
> Memorandum in Opposition remains unchanged.

We filed the first FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=31590&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tc3BlY2lhbC1jb3Vuc2VsLWludGVydmlld3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=5e35eab9c3bd168fe398125086a7964bc0469879f3e6fddc4d4dad65680cb648]
and
are the lead plaintiff asking for the Biden audio recordings of his
interviews in Special Counsel Hur’s criminal investigation of
Biden’s theft and disclosure of classified records (Judicial Watch,
Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=31585&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJpZGVuLWh1ci1pbnRlcnZpZXctY29tcGxhaW50LTAwNzAwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=6dc84b815e33e4d79cc93a6ce0254c139b20bb5b159e92efdbcbf14e22ef5017]
(No. 1:24-cv-00700)).

This lawsuit has already forced the Biden administration to confess
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=32576&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291bnNlbC10cmFuc2NyaXB0LWluYWNjdXJhdGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7f63dd32df079828f99b4c52dd105cde3e7bbee5d4c80730fc637c6075c738ee]
that
the transcripts of the audio recordings have been altered and are not
accurate.

The then-Biden Justice Department fought
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=32574&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJpZGVuLXRyYW5zY3JpcHQtbXNqLTAwNzAwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8c5a404d40b12d39225d33a8491c465b5c24e46b8774f5f3fc014d97337e5ac0]
to keep the audio recordings secret and asked the court to ignore
precedent and rewrite FOIA law. The former Biden agency demanded that
a law enforcement/executive privilege exemption be rewritten to help
Joe Biden; wants to change FOIA law to protect (after 50 years of
being a politician) President Joe Biden’s privacy in his voice; and
sought to potentially end FOIA with a new argument that the possible
“AI” alteration of the Hur recordings was reason to keep the keep
the recordings and any government record a secret from the public.

We argued that the recordings should be released “because an open
question remains about whether Special Counsel Hur’s conclusion that
President Biden should not be prosecuted for his mishandling of
classified records [and] is supported by the evidence.”

Further, the audio would educate the public about “whether Special
Counsel Hur appropriately pursued justice by recommending to the
attorney general that criminal charges should not be brought against
President Biden concerning his mishandling of classified materials.”
This question “is of even more import these days because another
special counsel (with approval by Attorney General Garland) is
currently prosecuting President Trump for allegedly engaging in
similar actions. In addition to President Trump being both President
Biden’s former political opponent and the current Republican nominee
in the upcoming Presidential election, President Trump is the only
former president or vice president to be prosecuted for such
actions.”

We also criticized the Biden Justice Department’s reliance on a case
that allowed the withholding of the audio of the dying cries of the
Challenger astronauts as simply “repugnant.”

On February 5, 2024, Special Counsel Robert Hur issued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=31466&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvc3RvcmFnZS9yZXBvcnQtZnJvbS1zcGVjaWFsLWNvdW5zZWwtcm9iZXJ0LWstaHVyLWZlYnJ1YXJ5LTIwMjQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=06a6d548e618f1e7fc59649f0b7384a7c832a2ab167880afc3f21250cdc0d0d0]
the “Report of the Special Counsel on the Investigation Into
Unauthorized Removal, Retention, and Disclosure of Classified
Documents Discovered at Locations Including the Penn Biden Center and
the Delaware Private Residence of President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.”

In the report, Hur called Biden a “well-meaning, elderly man with a
poor memory” and declined to charge Biden with a “serious
felony:”

> We have also considered that, at trial, Mr. Biden would likely
> present himself to a jury, as he did during our interview of him, as
> a sympathetic, well-meaning, elderly man with a poor memory. Based
> on our direct interactions with and observations of him, he is
> someone for whom many jurors will want to identify reasonable doubt.
> It would be difficult to convince a jury that they should convict
> him-by then a former president well into his eighties-of a serious
> felony that requires a mental state of willfulness.

Prior to the finalization of the report, the White House issued a
letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=31466&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvc3RvcmFnZS9yZXBvcnQtZnJvbS1zcGVjaWFsLWNvdW5zZWwtcm9iZXJ0LWstaHVyLWZlYnJ1YXJ5LTIwMjQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=06a6d548e618f1e7fc59649f0b7384a7c832a2ab167880afc3f21250cdc0d0d0]
to the Special Counsel’s office attacking the report’s
“treatment of President Biden’s memory,” and added “there is
ample evidence from your interview that the President did well in
answering your questions ...”

The White House admitted
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=32574&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJpZGVuLXRyYW5zY3JpcHQtbXNqLTAwNzAwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8c5a404d40b12d39225d33a8491c465b5c24e46b8774f5f3fc014d97337e5ac0]
to the court that the transcript of President Joe Biden’s testimony
to Special Counsel Robert Hur is not accurate and is missing “filler
words (such as ‘um’ or ‘uh’)” and words that “may have
been repeated when spoken (such as ‘I, I’ or ‘and, and’)”
which were sometimes “only listed a single time in the
transcripts.”

The Heritage Foundation and a CNN-led media coalition have been joined
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=32574&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJpZGVuLXRyYW5zY3JpcHQtbXNqLTAwNzAwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8c5a404d40b12d39225d33a8491c465b5c24e46b8774f5f3fc014d97337e5ac0]
with our lawsuit.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE AGAIN OVER HUNTER BIDEN INVESTIGATION
COVER-UP

Judicial Watch renewed a key legal battle on details of the Biden
regime’s “investigation” of Hunter Biden.

We filed a FOIA
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=34543&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDMzODcvXWxhd3N1aXQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=ec1703937e727bea79043ebd1e903d9c34605614ddd66c6eb68f1cc0e7268675
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=34532&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDMzODcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3b210bcec63d199413125ee3b073cd0c143c998e3b07907fa8c28f41c52eb42a]
against the Department of Justice for records and communications
regarding the Internal Revenue Service’s investigation of Hunter
Biden (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=34532&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDMzODcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3b210bcec63d199413125ee3b073cd0c143c998e3b07907fa8c28f41c52eb42a]
(No.1:24-cv-03387)).

Wed filed an earlier FOIA
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=34544&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWlycy9dbGF3c3VpdD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=54757bde7a8f17b0af73f4faab083fa7f56809261f365b23dcbb39c0ec885440
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=29953&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWlycy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=44eefc01a09f258a938e7498d8b2a79d5efd46fbf89b73169d2981b46c31fa48]
in July 2023 in the
U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Department
of Justice failed to respond to a May 2023 FOIA request for access to
the public records of Special Counsel Jack Smith. During the course of
this suit, the Justice Department invoked FOIA
