> The recent CBP case involves an agent, Manuel Perez, who federal
> authorities say has helped smuggle illegal immigrants and cocaine
> for six years on the El Paso border. In multiple instances the
> disgraced 32-year-old agent admitted vehicles driven by illegal
> immigrants at the Paso Del Norte Port of Entry in El Paso as part of

>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72415&L=34552&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvdXNhby13ZHR4L3ByL2NicC1vZmZpY2VyLWFycmVzdGVkLWVsLXBhc28tY2hhcmdlZC1hbGllbi1zbXVnZ2xpbmctYW5kLWRydWctdHJhZmZpY2tpbmc/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=0566de37bd4932009480bb6a7251b56a2d7c67b3737ec1e5fd7c657d60cf76b6]

clean_body: Border Corruption Update! [INSIDE JW] Court Orders Justice Department to Commit on Releasing Biden Audio Tapes [] A federal court ordered [] the Department of Justice to declare whether it intends to continue denying our request for the full audio of former President Joe Biden’s interview with Special Counsel Robert Hur. We hope the Trump Justice Department accepts what seems like an invitation from a federal court to end the Biden regime's cover-up of Biden’s apparent dementia. Judge Timothy J. Kelly of the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia wrote: In light of the recent change in administration, it is hereby ORDERED that Defendant shall, by February 19, 2025, file a status report confirming that its position outlined in its [34 []] Motion for Summary Judgment and [46 []] Memorandum in Opposition remains unchanged. We filed the first FOIA lawsuit [] and are the lead plaintiff asking for the Biden audio recordings of his interviews in Special Counsel Hur’s criminal investigation of Biden’s theft and disclosure of classified records (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:24-cv-00700)). This lawsuit has already forced the Biden administration to confess [] that the transcripts of the audio recordings have been altered and are not accurate. The then-Biden Justice Department fought [] to keep the audio recordings secret and asked the court to ignore precedent and rewrite FOIA law. The former Biden agency demanded that a law enforcement/executive privilege exemption be rewritten to help Joe Biden; wants to change FOIA law to protect (after 50 years of being a politician) President Joe Biden’s privacy in his voice; and sought to potentially end FOIA with a new argument that the possible “AI” alteration of the Hur recordings was reason to keep the keep the recordings and any government record a secret from the public. We argued that the recordings should be released “because an open question remains about whether Special Counsel Hur’s conclusion that President Biden should not be prosecuted for his mishandling of classified records [and] is supported by the evidence.” Further, the audio would educate the public about “whether Special Counsel Hur appropriately pursued justice by recommending to the attorney general that criminal charges should not be brought against President Biden concerning his mishandling of classified materials.” This question “is of even more import these days because another special counsel (with approval by Attorney General Garland) is currently prosecuting President Trump for allegedly engaging in similar actions. In addition to President Trump being both President Biden’s former political opponent and the current Republican nominee in the upcoming Presidential election, President Trump is the only former president or vice president to be prosecuted for such actions.” We also criticized the Biden Justice Department’s reliance on a case that allowed the withholding of the audio of the dying cries of the Challenger astronauts as simply “repugnant.” On February 5, 2024, Special Counsel Robert Hur issued [] the “Report of the Special Counsel on the Investigation Into Unauthorized Removal, Retention, and Disclosure of Classified Documents Discovered at Locations Including the Penn Biden Center and the Delaware Private Residence of President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.” In the report, Hur called Biden a “well-meaning, elderly man with a poor memory” and declined to charge Biden with a “serious felony:” We have also considered that, at trial, Mr. Biden would likely present himself to a jury, as he did during our interview of him, as a sympathetic, well-meaning, elderly man with a poor memory. Based on our direct interactions with and observations of him, he is someone for whom many jurors will want to identify reasonable doubt. It would be difficult to convince a jury that they should convict him-by then a former president well into his eighties-of a serious felony that requires a mental state of willfulness. Prior to the finalization of the report, the White House issued a letter [] to the Special Counsel’s office attacking the report’s “treatment of President Biden’s memory,” and added “there is ample evidence from your interview that the President did well in answering your questions ...” The White House admitted [] to the court that the transcript of President Joe Biden’s testimony to Special Counsel Robert Hur is not accurate and is missing “filler words (such as ‘um’ or ‘uh’)” and words that “may have been repeated when spoken (such as ‘I, I’ or ‘and, and’)” which were sometimes “only listed a single time in the transcripts.” The Heritage Foundation and a CNN-led media coalition have been joined [] with our lawsuit. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE AGAIN OVER HUNTER BIDEN INVESTIGATION COVER-UP Judicial Watch renewed a key legal battle on details of the Biden regime’s “investigation” of Hunter Biden. We filed a FOIA [ [] against the Department of Justice for records and communications regarding the Internal Revenue Service’s investigation of Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No.1:24-cv-03387)). Wed filed an earlier FOIA [ [] in July 2023 in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Department of Justice failed to respond to a May 2023 FOIA request for access to the public records of Special Counsel Jack Smith. During the course of this suit, the Justice Department invoked FOIA [ 7(a) [] to withhold records due to an ongoing law enforcement proceeding regarding Hunter Biden, and the suit was dismissed. In light of the recent [ [] issued by the president to Hunter Biden, no open law enforcement proceedings remain. However, the original FOIA request remains open, and we filed the new complaint stating: [T]he Justice Department has failed to produce the requested records or demonstrate that the requested records are lawfully exempt from production; notify Judicial Watch of the scope of any responsive records it intends to produce or withhold and the reasons for any withholdings; or inform Judicial Watch that it may appeal any adequately specific, adverse determination. This is a perfect opportunity for the Trump Justice Department to expose the extent of IRS/DOJ corruption to cover up Biden family corruption. The Justice Department is lawfully required to release all responsive records we requested. We have multiple federal lawsuits focused on Biden family corruption: In June 2024,we received [ [] from the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) showing Mike Morell, former acting CIA director under President Obama, requesting CIA permission to publish a letter [] by former intelligence community leaders stating that they believed the laptop emails exposing Hunter Biden’s connections to Ukraine were Russian disinformation. Morrell’s request for prepublication review was approved in just six hours by the CIA. In May 2023, we filed a FOIA [ [] against the National Archives for Biden family records and communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as communications between the Bidens and several known business associates. On October 14, 2022, we [ [] the Justice Department for all records in the possession of FBI Supervisory Intelligence Analyst Brian Auten regarding an August 6, 2020, briefing provided to members of the U.S. Senate. Ron Johnson (R-WI) and Chuck Grassley (R-IA) raised concerns that the briefing was intended to undermine the senators’ investigation of Hunter Biden. In December 2020, State Department [ [] obtained through a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit showed that former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie “Masha” Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings. In October 2020, we forced the release of State Department [ [] that included a briefing checklist of a February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv between then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch and Sally Painter, co-founder and chief operating officer of Blue Star Strategies, a Democratic lobbying firm which was hired by Burisma Holdings to combat corruption allegations. At the time of the meeting, Hunter Biden was serving on the board of directors for Burisma Holdings. CBP AGENT CHARGED WITH SMUGGLING, TRAFFICKING IN MAJOR CARTEL CORRIDOR The profits from illegal activities along the border are a great temptation, even for law enforcement. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has a telling example []. A federal agent in a border region long known as a major corridor for Mexican cartels smuggling narcotics and Islamic terrorists into the United States has been arrested and charged with alien smuggling and drug trafficking. The case involves a Customs and Border Protection (CBP) officer in El Paso, Texas, where Judicial Watch years ago uncovered [] [ unprecedented partnership between Mexican drug cartels and jihadists as part of a decade-long investigation into crime, terrorism and corruption in the southern border. Back in 2017 Judicial Watch also produced an investigative documentary [] detailing an elaborate narco-terrorist cell operating out of El Paso, which the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) confirms is a primary hub for Mexican opioids and methamphetamine enroute to every corner of the U.S. Corruption within the law enforcement ranks has also been a problem in the region at both local and federal levels, Judicial Watch investigations show, with a number of federal agents caught taking bribes over the years. Back in 2014 Judicial Watch reported [] on the criminal indictment of Jesus Campa, the chief deputy of the El Paso County Sheriff’s Office (EPCSO), a Texas agency responsible for patrolling more than 1,000 square miles with a population of about 870,000. After nearly two decades with the agency, he left abruptly amid allegations of embezzling $5.6 million in Homeland Security Investigation (HSI) funds. His boss, Sheriff Richard Wiles, was embroiled in several scandals. Besides looking the other way as one of his trusted deputy chiefs embezzled millions of dollars, Wiles attended a fundraising event at the home of a convicted felon with connections to the illegal drug trade while serving his third term as sheriff. The recent CBP case involves an agent, Manuel Perez, who federal authorities say has helped smuggle illegal immigrants and cocaine for six years on the El Paso border. In multiple instances the disgraced 32-year-old agent admitted vehicles driven by illegal immigrants at the Paso Del Norte Port of Entry in El Paso as part of human smuggling operations, according to a statement [] issued by the Department of Justice (DOJ). Additionally, Perez conspired to possess cocaine from 2019 to February 2025 as part of an operation to distribute the drug throughout Texas, Louisiana, North Carolina and elsewhere in the country. The officer is charged with one count of conspiracy to bring aliens to the United States for financial gain, three counts of bringing aliens to the United States for financial gain, and one count of conspiracy to possess a controlled substance with intent to distribute. He faces decades to life in prison, according to federal prosecutors. Perez’s case indicates that little has changed since Judicial Watch first traveled to El Paso over 10 years ago to expose the reality gripping a city long promoted by local officials as one of America’s safest. The truth is that the municipality, which sits along the Rio Grande across famously violent Ciudad Juárez, Mexico, is a key smuggling route for Mexican drugs, illegal immigrants, and Islamic terrorists. Cartels smuggle foreigners from countries with terrorist links into a small Texas rural town near El Paso by using remote farm roads—rather than interstates—to elude Border Patrol and other law enforcement barriers, Judicial Watch reported [] a decade ago. We also broke a story [] [ 2015 about an ISIS training cell just a few miles from El Paso in an area known as “Anapra” situated just west of Ciudad Juárez in the Mexican state of Chihuahua. Law enforcement and intelligence sources on both sides of the border confirmed to Judicial Watch that cartel-backed “coyotes” help smuggle ISIS terrorists through the desert and into the U.S. between Acala and Fort Hancock, Texas. The areas are targeted for exploitation by ISIS because of their understaffed municipal and county police forces and the relative safe havens the terrain provides for unchecked large-scale drug smuggling. With four years of open borders under the Biden administration and corrupt federal agents like Perez, there is no telling how many terrorists have entered the country to plan attacks. After all, in 2016 Judicial Watch uncovered [] an operation in which Mexican drug traffickers helped Islamic terrorists stationed in Mexico cross into the U.S. to explore targets for future attacks and among them was a Kuwaiti named Shaykh Mahmood Omar Khabir, an ISIS operative who at the time lived in Chihuahua not far from El Paso. Khabir trained hundreds of Al Qaeda fighters in Pakistan, Afghanistan and Yemen, according to information provided to Judicial Watch by government sources. ## Texas Supreme Court Dismisses Paxton Case
The Texas Supreme Court ruled on Friday to [dismiss the case](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO5CAQRL8GZz0CZsBLQHCJs730wlHb9Hhai8GCnrX370-7yUWXVqlKeu_P-_0dOXNZf-NGUc5HvVttHWgLxt0Tcv6634YUZ52CGSia8Rq81eEahmfUPrnRo7GGwuxcGpdA3jkdgp_HYHHg-H2mrXHGuLeru_jxzXuPI83ob8mQumlKLLVd5ElCJ_ZH_qqf1C5L3YYcnyJ7V9dfyk7KTsdxXD5OLN-lslOhoys7_cxgr5mFl39Bf-2NNoKlvppA4r5x79ShCwrBjK1DxqO_WABX5NIFPqjAjqfUAo_aYHlizlRWLitYbTXsjTonKsKYgTItwrUoOw0tpv3gnLn7Ud30uiHnHwL5r9LPaP8GAAD__2LofQA) against Attorney General Ken Paxton for allegedly seeking to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election. The State Bar of Texas, which brought the lawsuit after Paxton challenged former President Joe Biden’s victory in battleground states in 2020, asked for the case’s dismissal when the “[nearly identical](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvpCAURn-NdhhAQCwstrF7225pLnIdbxbByJ3nvH-_mem3Os2Xk3znz9fyBZQoP37DgRO_trJoqa2QWii7RKD0s5g2TkHGUbU4qaEfnZZjP7b7BBKDjT1Yb5yUPnoFFnsvty2Opsexpektk1pZpazvbecG75yDAQM4ExU2RmIkLlfHOzK-oG7pp3zj1a3laNO0M5-16X81em70fN9398xUsgjPlJApv2eNnjPe9Q1gKhlSo-ePS9TneeGBYi3Pi0WkelCtWEVlYBQBLoG801rFWo4zAWUW8ADK9U3xF7M44cUlN3qGi2lNuITNKy0HJ6weVmH9FkUAGISxIUTjTXQydDsfqb2meN6UElU3NEY-DqD0ucX_7fw96X8BAAD__-vhghk)” charge against Paxton aide Brent Webster was dropped by the court in December. It’s Paxton’s latest victory in a series of legal wins, as the formerly-embattled Republican called the case a "witch hunt” that “wasted valuable resources.” The lawsuit dates back to May 2022 and sought to sanction Paxton—an action that could have carried a wide range of consequences, from a private reprimand to disbarment.
## NY Doctor Fined For Breaking Texas Abortion Law
A Collin County judge fined New York doctor Maggie Carpenter over $100,000 for [prescribing abortion pills](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2PpDAMQH9N6DxKQoChSHEN3V575SgfZrDOk6Akuyz__sROfe3Ts_XsPx-PD0dM6fnbvdC27zU_tNQDSA1qeERHfD5MF62XcVYdWjX186jl3M_dZlX0EgN61Q9rHPp-mn0wd4-mn702Zu7IXsukVoNSw70fbuN0H8fRTejdaKJCYSRGarnc2oYNv11d-cxfWG4hvzq2W2t7Ff0voRehl7pjaOXzxTk4TnjUyxJ6SWcVegmYWnEM6RR62TNTo3DxK0HoRWqhF2UuHQ84c_kLMYeWC1CFlRJGoAQ_DQBhc-X5Jpw_qZJLDq4ucD6XRjnBTsz1PVJbhbxC3Qg5ArujdsXG_SBmquMkjHy-HPHPTe2_T_6y-l8AAAD__5LHgZ8) to a 20-year-old Texas woman in May of last year. Attorney General Ken Paxton sued Carpenter in December for violating the state's abortion ban. Carpenter [failed to appear in court](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j72SrCAUhJ8GMiw4_CgBwU3M5qYbWrgcZqhFsZQa9O23nHyzDr7uru_rMT18yml9_vcLunrGMgEHzTgwoafgU74mRYObebCCohO9tAa4lZa-nNBaeQvKq2Hu5YwYwWIcpASNXltBk7vHOAgthB6k7kw_GGN8j7M3KggkimNItexdfWHF0x8xX-WNe_ddFprdq9btIPIfgZHA2FrrYjnViu24AQLjHQmMnyrzc9lrKivbUs4HW3zKLKYVA1uxsavsP3R3YWsp53SYnij-vJnPV_1T_u3gNwAA___nsV1Q) for a hearing on the charges, prompting District Judge Bryan Gantt to render a default judgment in favor of prosecutors and issue an injunction prohibiting Carpenter from prescribing abortifacient drugs in Texas again. Carpenter is the founder of Abortion Coalition for Telemedicine, a national group of abortion providers who have agreed to prescribe mifepristone and misoprostol to women in states that have banned or restricted abortion. The case is a test of [so-called "shield laws"](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L1uwyAUxfGngY0IMB_2wNDFW7p2tK7NTbgqNhZGSfz2VbJ3PtL5Sf-f63QFyrTdv2HF0F63MmmprZBaKDtFoHxOhscwyzgojkH5bnBaDt3AU-ixB78YqdBJQC1jZx1E563C2Ur0nML7TGpllbJ9Zy_O98458DiDM1EhMxIjtVIvLWHDFxy3fJYH1stSVp5Dam0_WPfF9Mj02BImyvm9MT3uJdNyMj0mhNzSAhWZHq0yppdebPgUZ6m_IpallSpgLrVR2cROOR_iRhtG8RGZHnkNcX9SznQ4z4y8r0Afhrd_mzyC_gsAAP__WdVkKQ) in Democratic states that aim to provide legal protections to doctors who provide abortions to women in states where the procedure is banned.
## Texas Leads U.S. in Top Tier Universities
Texas has surpassed all other U.S. states in the number of [top-tier](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQRL_GdI5sgw0ULq6hy7VXogVvYHUGI3tDkr8_Jf3Vo3kzej_X8QoUaV--YUPPz1sajTJWKiO1HQNQfI1NFfykQq8r9Lqte2dUX_fV6uegpjB1plNdq53VXdf00AawvW31NGNF_g1TRlutbVfbi2s75xy0OIFrgkbRKAzEKV94RcYnlFt8pRPzZU5bFf3KfBRRfwkzCDOsKYVIO75DYYY3W5hBGWGGT1eWez6gFCxyhki3lHcCCXuQOz7kK-Vf-SBeJa8ot1RYcjokE2aZsSDkeZX3nU7MhZiwfEbrJaUl4njSsiMzVtmH40ExUnGtaNSyAcXPW_5X3-nNXwAAAP__9WB0nA) research universities, according to a list released Thursday by the American Council on Education and the Carnegie Foundation. By adding [five institutions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOrCAUhJ8GOwwgohYUt7Hb297SHOW4nlwEA7juvv0ft_-bKSYzXzLz7zE9gDyF51_Y0Zb3GiclVMuF4rKdHJD_TLpydhZukBVa2TWDUWJohmqzwgxiaLAFDbA2Ujs9S2m0Ud2MvTFNRfaGCSVbKdu-aWvT9cYY6HAGo51EpgU6KjHVZcOCb8ir_8QXpnqJe-XtVsqRWfOHqZGpsdCOOa4UHEH91a9zZ5ka0Z0LFIqBqTHgle_CTeQhXtwjuMzLhvzMnAIv8eCFMPEz0AtTpkKYeT7TATlTePKAF__E9J9DcHwBT2tMgYCpEVKhxWPe4sXUKGWvtNKmrZc9V8m64yLvKZuOafHcgfx3Svn125dVPwEAAP__oll_FQ) with a Tier 1 designation for a total of 16, Texas passed up California and New York, with whom Texas was tied in the previous listing from 2022. Texas' [new additions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAUhH8N3rDgYeN4YOjClq4dLQwv8VOxsYDEyb-vnL3bSXe673Q_1-nqKNJ2_3Yrmvq6pQkE9FwAl_0UHMX31DXBzCKMskEjBzVqEKMam8XMUrnOa9GhCq6ftUYQ8zwOwwwd-KAaMmeZANlL2V9U3-rhorV2A85Od0Ei6wQGqim3dcGKL1du8Z2emFuf1iaapda9MPXFwDKwx3G0v8XV02RgNzwKAxuTd5GBPVEMrAAGVioG1qetPFbM_Azy4njGrfKQ0174h8XrRxJmLvljoyfmQpWw8B0rX8nn5BfauU_r7rY39zEVPJFNNmE_KEYqemCduK-O4mdy_ffDp4G_AAAA__-m0HTv) include four medical institutions as well as Southern Methodist University. Tier 1 universities, also called R1, spend at least $50 million on research and award an average of at least 70 research doctorates each year.

clean_body: The Texas Supreme Court ruled on Friday to against Attorney Gen. Ken Paxton for allegedly seeking to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election. | | | | | | Saturday, February 15, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1876, Texas passed the Constitution of 1876, which remains the basic law of Texas, subject only to the U.S. Constitution. () We hope your Valentine's Day was lovely yesterday, and if you're still in the festive spirit, Valentine's photos of tiny babies in a Texas NICU may warm your heart even more. () We're sponsored today by , offering a high quality butcher delivery service that, for a limited time, is offering a special sale to Texas Flyover readers. Abilene ☀️ 63/28° | Amarillo 🌥️ 40/20° | Austin ☁️ 73/40° | Brownsville 🌥️ 82/63° | Corpus Christi 🌥️ 70/52° | DFW 🌥️ 68/31° | El Paso ☀️ 62/39° | Houston ⛈️ 73/50° | Laredo 🌥️ 78/49° | Lubbock ☀️ 53/24° | Midland ☀️ 61/26° | San Antonio ☁️ 74/43° | Tyler 🌧️ 65/35° | Waco ☀️ 68/35° | Texas Supreme Court Dismisses Paxton Case The Texas Supreme Court ruled on Friday to against Attorney General Ken Paxton for allegedly seeking to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election. The State Bar of Texas, which brought the lawsuit after Paxton challenged former President Joe Biden’s victory in battleground states in 2020, asked for the case’s dismissal when the “” charge against Paxton aide Brent Webster was dropped by the court in December. It’s Paxton’s latest victory in a series of legal wins, as the formerly-embattled Republican called the case a "witch hunt” that “wasted valuable resources.” The lawsuit dates back to May 2022 and sought to sanction Paxton—an action that could have carried a wide range of consequences, from a private reprimand to disbarment. NY Doctor Fined For Breaking Texas Abortion Law A Collin County judge fined New York doctor Maggie Carpenter over $100,000 for to a 20-year-old Texas woman in May of last year. Attorney General Ken Paxton sued Carpenter in December for violating the state's abortion ban. Carpenter for a hearing on the charges, prompting District Judge Bryan Gantt to render a default judgment in favor of prosecutors and issue an injunction prohibiting Carpenter from prescribing abortifacient drugs in Texas again. Carpenter is the founder of Abortion Coalition for Telemedicine, a national group of abortion providers who have agreed to prescribe mifepristone and misoprostol to women in states that have banned or restricted abortion. The case is a test of in Democratic states that aim to provide legal protections to doctors who provide abortions to women in states where the procedure is banned. Texas Leads U.S. in Top Tier Universities Texas has surpassed all other U.S. states in the number of research universities, according to a list released Thursday by the American Council on Education and the Carnegie Foundation. By adding with a Tier 1 designation for a total of 16, Texas passed up California and New York, with whom Texas was tied in the previous listing from 2022. Texas' include four medical institutions as well as Southern Methodist University. Tier 1 universities, also called R1, spend at least $50 million on research and award an average of at least 70 research doctorates each year. | Flying together with our sponsor Customize your box with over 100 options, including USDA Choice & Prime steaks, 100% grass-fed beef, organic chicken, and wild-caught seafood. Good Chop offers a diverse selection of high-quality meats and seafood, all sourced from American farms and fisheries. Currently, they're running a promotion where new customers can choose free ground beef, thick-cut bacon, or chicken wings with every order for the life of their membership, | ➤ Dallas: Joe and Herdercine Nash renewed their wedding vows in a county courtroom yesterday after 65 years of marriage. ( ➤ Huntsville: Richard Tabler was executed on Thursday night for multiple murders in 2004, expressing regret and asking forgiveness from his victims' families in a final statement. () ➤ Katy-based Igloo has recalled more than a million coolers after consumers reported amputated fingers, fractures, and lacerations while using the product. () ➤ San Antonio -based H-E-B has issued a statement regarding the nationwide egg shortage, saying they remained in "a good supply" of eggs and would work to keep prices affordable amid the shortage. () ➤ A recent report suggests that Texas could face oil supply issues as refineries have reduced purchases from Mexico's state-owned Pemex company due to the amount of water in the oil. () ➤ El Paso: Mexican military personnel continue to search for underground tunnels between Juarez and El Paso to end their use as passage for illegal immigrants into the U.S. () Enjoy reading The Texas Flyover?mailto:?cc=editor@thetexasflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0A%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Texas%20Flyover%2C%20and%20I%20think%20you%20would%20like%20it%20a%20lot.%0A%0AIt%20covers%20a%20wide%20range%20of%20Texas%20news%2C%20and%20it%20doesn't%20have%20the%20bias%20that%20most%20media%20coverage%20is%20full%20of.%0A%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0A%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fthetexasflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3DDL%0A%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will! to share with your friends and family. | ➤ San Antonio Spurs star Victor Wembanyama told reporters he will not take it easy during the 2025 All-Star Game. “ If it turns out like every other recent game, slow and just playing around, I hope I can bring that contrast of a single guy who goes crazy, dives on the ball, hustles every play ,” said Wembanyama. () ➤ Dallas Stars defenseman Thomas Harley will be a late addition to Team Canada for the 4 Nations Face-Off after Shea Theodore announced he would miss the rest of the tournament. () ➤ Houston Texans head coach DeMeco Ryans said that the rehab of star wide receiver Tank Dell is “on the right track.” Dell suffered a devastating injury during the 2024 regular season, tearing his ACL, MCL, and LCL. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/Ymfzy452Vywt9jGCyBDx0hO2AL0-_t-8z4P0fvOyESctcNugHF1nZhhHoifxl_ayzYT2BTYyaTywHFLcpNkb41pmpUkKJc3Nu-JeMr0C_U5G416x-9LQ23VsTkyQz9LqLLX7OiIWEyJ1IexQfx3-D6u80XpQUakf7_q8_cs6jpx2-NhscpZIO-sXT9lGmLxZNL0DJCPg86rdD1A6fCtUd4Tji5Yq0hrlu_sFRzFLtpWKRJMmn00IIjOI2VAAqpsqnidqCBzk06VYnH9NF0A7RXPb1Qj1ngjFC0qZGSi_joBlDuM4zFQ8GiNh29MverLOs_CeDjpvrvxU8u3TfdKD9WJc4gJI8j7i97nyIYxlsSZb8cdeRAinWi8fkCYFt1tKmW3Gozcw7d7T7d_PV6gSTn15ouFiBlLFozqRl1WDK6ipsn16QrLrTL2qmADUZbWFcmZfa5GHHGxZNSbA0iO2lPU--GZPyCA5I4DsEopD8Bo/KEc33QktOqWl7hRB3HtwmnQ1_ZROWcKu/6)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/xfZmHk_YK_ORRvLsxFblYVn-QAB5_gmHXZdhwuxpE72BaPszqD2RHEbLeVMigoJ3wJlrW7EH_8lEhyd0rnAT6PIJ7RkPZyM0WjamUZctsasn_y7aDDDvdNdaeAQG5MZbgnaDcDOz99ZyK_hYGG7l8VM_H-dug7jP1HNXfMm_Gp5e5weUTsFp6eeCMw_ZIRnGWm8h676ZLcuhwSqICnfuTJd8gXl_-gf-s3Gcmu9fytRKX7X0uMQPPfTMDpxqaeI_cga0m0UqixKXRB4W7RkJfJPkTdjE5u-VAGN8Vev1UBhUYquHwtPvBF_9G7juRZSdJXz7iyJJzebp9_8a5O1ZH0KNWQs2FHKYufRa9X8Xu7ahxUEmHRIGvpuuPv-eJx2mplxQFbLGNXwvbbmiSRFRZ5FVoml7tkLcMea5r66PtbibO5a6Ly4xrBbDNQ52EOYpPW2kSpdIWJm0jIb9paF2ZAXWuyQDwYA0apEzOUtUIZs/PbIBbYZ89O8ibQhr5rzvnimMmWYup9j1/6)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/cQVhcuYq-CkNm9bJBHBKChqymhnBSmb0vBX9XXFLmV_BcZ7XnOM9tmxdvnv-zJdR4oT2scNr8w46Cm2cUnva6wCo2b8SQPf3T-a8ee8WGvTA3B75rEHgVBwsKpBIeLK7iwWpuo32DQcrANWfx7g2HOFCHgC3sVC27UWtgMLApI_IODve5ZSYiWn7c2OvBtblm1SxnS8u_D3Ao53suirLDPrgoF4XPanGSDTCIvqQ0_iRF4uCgyoBtp2dST60KJFjDMAJ8eGWQ5-KwHk9fu5Cdh_gW5rqUtWGNCtB4_n4VVbT-bxpjBPZNDe4vUK9aETrw1CEzw1gIsXGgKnZQUbAEHa0tkDGtRlM0kqXLwCRBbJwcYIQWDIHI4n-6L3lpzBZxoSncUyM4N_8B7lGnS7Z9AATK2OdtY3Z_4FCVHkJKQvwEwZuZ99wX-NgYvNKaOZ0USZMFctlVfmv4fZqFQ0h6YQQvafMfhRBKC6gHr6mLAk/VbFrTMYQWpGzdusPcFX-fD4e6gAwimuW/6)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/u/jHunWXbtkxQ6StUoLRSocCchMQWH8ebYkh7mNCr2xPd0cvoX3NMxYqmCU9HJWrLeZU22NdDDZ-Ty7KkVTxGYHwm9d6-ifQ0BW7B3AZdZ3rZPxApW66vcXzLJnKBxk6U-MJIIq4UhayHiMUCEa0w_v0CUXB9tQ2TDDPe79Fzr0qOArT1JQcNVtCy4k8Wa52p8VB8fbGjWtcyaSKahE86Nz6ho1rX74licNA/zcoo6u93Lo1z7TSgVaY7rf9Um0SQWWGV/6)

name: History Facts
subject: What's hidden behind Lincoln's head on Mount Rushmore
body:
Mount Rushmore is one of the United States’ most recognizable landmarks, but it contains a hidden secret: a 70-foot-long tunnel located behind Abraham Lincoln’s head. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68doxinrjzjqrtztwpxixl8d8gbu0k0sil8mwq4n8nrvhzpv0afft9bxyvpjbatjtkjjg6dttah4k1x5r7mo6dogde6lbyzao5a0kxxg7xha03s6nc4u3frpe2fr6024jpsniqjfloz2cxif6&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srq4bf&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [There’s a tunnel hidden behind Lincoln’s head on Mount Rushmore.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srq4bf&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srq4bf&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srq4bf&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| M ount Rushmore is one of the United States’ most recognizable landmarks, but it contains a hidden secret: a [70-foot-long tunnel](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srq4bf&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) located behind Abraham Lincoln’s head. The tunnel was created as the entrance to a Hall of Records conceived by sculptor Gutzon Borglum. The idea was to build a chamber inside the monument that housed important documents such as the Constitution and Declaration of Independence, which would be accessible by an 800-foot granite stairway that stretched up the mountain from Borglum’s studio to the chamber. Work began on the Hall of Records in July 1938 as crews constructed the 70-foot tunnel. However, in 1939, Congress halted work on the chamber and instructed Borglum to focus on carving the presidents’ heads instead. Borglum died two years later in 1941, effectively putting an end to the side project and leaving the Hall of Records unfinished.
---
Almost 60 years later, the Mount Rushmore National Memorial Society brought part of Borglum’s vision to life, installing a box at the chamber’s entrance containing 16 porcelain enamel panels. The panels explain the story of the United States and include biographies of the presidents featured on Mount Rushmore. They were sealed beneath 1,200 pounds of granite capstone as an homage to Borglum’s initial vision.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srq4bf&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srq4bf&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The Lincoln Memorial contains a misspelled word.
On May 30, 1922, the Lincoln Memorial was dedicated in a grand ceremony on Washington, D.C.’s National Mall. The project was an incredible investment, costing around $2 million to build (more than $36 million today). Construction lasted eight years and required 38,000 tons of marble. Despite all the time and effort, one [mistake](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srq4bf&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) went unnoticed: The word “FUTURE” was accidentally etched into the marble as “EUTURE.” The error is found in the text of Lincoln’s second inaugural address, which is carved into the north wall of the monument. The extra line was corrected, but the slightly off-colored stone is still visible today.
Thank you for supporting our advertisers!

clean_body: Mount Rushmore is one of the United States’ most recognizable landmarks, but it contains a hidden secret: a 70-foot-long tunnel located behind Abraham Lincoln’s head. | M ount Rushmore is one of the United States’ most recognizable landmarks, but it contains a hidden secret: a located behind Abraham Lincoln’s head. The tunnel was created as the entrance to a Hall of Records conceived by sculptor Gutzon Borglum. The idea was to build a chamber inside the monument that housed important documents such as the Constitution and Declaration of Independence, which would be accessible by an 800-foot granite stairway that stretched up the mountain from Borglum’s studio to the chamber. Work began on the Hall of Records in July 1938 as crews constructed the 70-foot tunnel. However, in 1939, Congress halted work on the chamber and instructed Borglum to focus on carving the presidents’ heads instead. Borglum died two years later in 1941, effectively putting an end to the side project and leaving the Hall of Records unfinished. Almost 60 years later, the Mount Rushmore National Memorial Society brought part of Borglum’s vision to life, installing a box at the chamber’s entrance containing 16 porcelain enamel panels. The panels explain the story of the United States and include biographies of the presidents featured on Mount Rushmore. They were sealed beneath 1,200 pounds of granite capstone as an homage to Borglum’s initial vision. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Percentage of Mount Rushmore that was carved using dynamite 90% | | Year Mount Rushmore was designated a national memorial 1925 | Year Mount Rushmore was designated a national memorial 1925 | | Height (in feet) of George Washington’s head on Mount Rushmore 60 | | Cost to complete Mount Rushmore (upwards of $20 million today) $989,992.32 | Cost to complete Mount Rushmore (upwards of $20 million today) $989,992.32 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- The Lincoln Memorial contains a misspelled word. On May 30, 1922, the Lincoln Memorial was dedicated in a grand ceremony on Washington, D.C.’s National Mall. The project was an incredible investment, costing around $2 million to build (more than $36 million today). Construction lasted eight years and required 38,000 tons of marble. Despite all the time and effort, one went unnoticed: The word “FUTURE” was accidentally etched into the marble as “EUTURE.” The error is found in the text of Lincoln’s second inaugural address, which is carved into the north wall of the monument. The extra line was corrected, but the slightly off-colored stone is still visible today. body:

| |
---
| | | I'm running out of time.

The media labeled my district a serious **battleground** race, naming _**ME**_ one of America's most vulnerable Republicans right now.

The Democrats have unleashed a fundraising juggernaut in Montana before, and now, they just dumped $50 MILLION into House races across America to destroy conservatives. _**[My campaign could be over before it even starts, and our conservative reforms could be dead in the water if I don't raise the necessary funds in the next 48 hours.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/PZJLFy83nMxrGYiuBAJobHGulXkk56iHm61m0YpeEXybCvNZFT2XBjqnM9idpiA9V6NLLo_htLvka4yxWxoa88iqP5O1P5Dw4AplL5bfZviLfVwtn1P0tZuvIyGAX53UOF_T4pUcgMlGaAkkmRmXJed0Ja8AUQSjH771qHP4jKBLbyYFifbgLmXMfh1noX1tco9KqNzjCHho2-mc118lqrTN313jQFzlqM5JVtlfvCiw_hfbh3Casz6195iqt-GIEekOZGIVFM-5WX_G9JJGwMBdmzKYJ_tDQf53U3EvDbmcobjbDilEHjDGLUW9ULFfpZRYW1z2e8QvNNmvJTWTldJj1ZfechjPMepGxrsIzAv5wWRSKC8V6vtGaM7_MfXnedaXHA6U7udHSLtCnN3D7dpcFLGltFPKSudBvBX3RWImzswkQXPdxpycvaeVzFtUC1HmUS1jBZoCHKTiNRHwUd2nE9S8WK69XEKx0_I9SuDpy9V80p_lkr9JoF78eL0-eknGJtelXT44ew/mGrMsYCB5UeTCqJFNUv71N-nKXQPQ1WN/6 "My campaign could be over before it even starts, and our conservative reforms could be dead in the water if I don't raise the necessary funds in the next 48 hours.")**_

It's not just my seat that's on the line. If the Democrats can take me down, they'll crush any hope of Republicans holding the majority in Congress. With only a 3-seat Majority, conservatives' odds of winning are quite slim.

As a Navy SEAL and Cabinet member for President Trump, I've fought for this nation my entire life. But I've never faced a challenge like this. **Democrats are on the warpath to get revenge after their embarrassing loss last year, and liberal elites are willing to open their checkbooks to make it happen. **

I only have 48 hours to do a complete 180 and keep up with their war chest. That's why I'm turning to you. I need your help to blow my fundraising goal out of the water and stop the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation and our values.

**_[If you donate right now- right this minute, we WILL crush our fundraising goals and stop the Democrats' revenge tour from destroying our great nation.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/I6AY2fC32w3aUzPv6qtBx_40nOY6GXqhZ-vFHXSch6vCCM21pM0slX5pE6M5ev0PJhYyZy7zE2aZFhQfiNe8bvZf8PrnRUchI29SH8vmthu4XSrO0p3hElnpQJdPhRrJ0FYy4kBJyjxaVy8FgQcp6e_9P7C_n-F0qiq8FNbV5zN2OtxYG-YHFugfRN8Uvqk36gsiQz4ACTGD1EDWqACKwA36RdUNrAxOFwA9DYnt1Turpz51_pZEVhoHxs87ISG_ZM1swvJa55T6SKSkuOZL_PnfH_S1JB12aIszz_6ewQxzScT4g5bgQAKeIe0P2OZVsvzjDdatnzYmllzPs_2kvRfhMfrqt7oYKpQrUi5a7U22weX32RjEPBfzObJCcjLBxrDjU7X4JiW_4rj5Lr-gd6GrI3lqPtr6jmWrHYwxea-dnFbPHaT2p123Jfrckh2bXEEMuA2Z5D9XVTrXH0oLPd2DMjrVqfcfCdxAqjIAKCvqwQS8fE2qZ1gbAW8XwZLaPJP0OELp0NzEpA/61o0UrYWD0Ipf6G_r4M74IJOdiweDuU8/6 "If you donate right now – right this minute, we WILL crush our fundraising goals and stop the Democrats’ revenge tour from destroying our great nation.")_ **

name: GOP Alerts
subject: Democrats are SLANDERING Elon & DOGE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We need 1,000 patriots to defend Elon

| | | **[**Before you read this email, could you please sign your name in support of Elon Musk and D.O.G.E? We need 1,000 signatures before midnight tonight >>**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-ai20hQA_pO0xwqQ)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter,

The Democrats and their media lapdogs have found their next target: Elon Musk.

Just weeks into his leadership at DOGE, they’re already smearing him – calling him a _“Nazi,”_ accusing him of a _“coup,”_ and claiming he’s _“taking over the government.”_

Why? **Because he’s exposing their decades of wasteful spending and saving American taxpayers BILLIONS.**

---
Friend,
---
They truly never learn...
---
**“Donald Trump Impeachment Articles Filed. Here's What Happens Next”** [Source: _Newsweek_]
---
Voters like YOU made your voices heard loud and clear last fall when you sent President Trump back to the White House with Republican majorities in Congress.
---
But the Democrats couldn’t care less about the will of the _PEOPLE_.
---
In fact, the Radical Democrat who filed these articles even claimed that impeachment doesn’t require a crime at all. He simply said, “the word _misdemeanor_ means misdeeds.”
---
In other words, the Democrats believe they can **IMPEACH** the duly elected President of the United States so long as they don’t like him.
---
_That’s how little the Left respects our Republic._
---
Friend, make no mistake, there’s only ONE thing that should _“happen next:”_ **These sham articles of impeachment should be thrown to the ash heap!**
---
_Which is why I’m reaching out to every grassroots patriot I can to ask that you sign your name to demand the Democrats' latest sham impeachment hoax be SHUT DOWN IMMEDIATELY._
---

clean_body: Imagine this scene of heartbreak! SHUT DOWN the Democrats’ new impeachment hoax. | Friend, They truly never learn... “Donald Trump Impeachment Articles Filed. Here's What Happens Next” [Source: Newsweek] Voters like YOU made your voices heard loud and clear last fall when you sent President Trump back to the White House with Republican majorities in Congress. But the Democrats couldn’t care less about the will of the PEOPLE. In fact, the Radical Democrat who filed these articles even claimed that impeachment doesn’t require a crime at all. He simply said, “the word misdemeanor means misdeeds.” In other words, the Democrats believe they can IMPEACH the duly elected President of the United States so long as they don’t like him. That’s how little the Left respects our Republic. Friend, make no mistake, there’s only ONE thing that should “happen next:” These sham articles of impeachment should be thrown to the ash heap! Which is why I’m reaching out to every grassroots patriot I can to ask that you sign your name to demand the Democrats' latest sham impeachment hoax be SHUT DOWN IMMEDIATELY. Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040 Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

subject: Passages of breathtaking beauty
body:
Imagine this scene of heartbreak!

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=834ac752d90c4169bf3100abe9bd54b8&_e=TcviVXJLP3T13325aEPFwEk4zIV-DU1NZVmW8-tb-YwFvq85cGgtNryUeC7KWXU_Fj26kQLkmQe_wHocKIDqupCjavB_XrWaelxF3wlVdlYFv4pbdF8LptpIHFjghVInvxdkjXG4yMCr5gfs64kujrF5ivgE27RZWXsYagK2Pi2tgJjeR5P9xYwo1kEzgTpM9gH213KOk3hUFBxoUQZI6kwoNW4QstAOjKbCF6V1HjJyL44dNYftC9Ylw8mdReENktvzDtNU_XYO67uzxoVamwd0W171vC2esbQ3SKjaMTq1W9k_2yTUmipdkLj8UiyaB5LTL7PnPMfVEMvVmDlC3jhixr3XgmcDEO69OZy-LoGnymcKhCsArdf2r-tX2EjsuSvXX-Nr9zywJW_PVQsbRw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Among the many passages of breathtaking beauty in _Paradise Lost_ is Milton's description of Adam seeing Eve for the first time after the Fall. They had separated for the day to complete their happy labors in the Garden, where Satan found and deceived Eve. Adam, blissfully unaware, had prepared a garland of roses to present to his bride upon their reunification.

When she appeared, he immediately knew disaster had struck: _From his slack hand the garland wreathed for Eve _ _Down dropped, and all the faded roses shed_
Imagine this scene of heartbreak! Imagine the feeling of all the world coming to ruin! Yet for Adam and Eve, as for us, there is hope in redemption. Milton is a master of building a world, describing tragedy, and depicting renewal.

Join Professor Stephen Smith as he guides us through John Milton's epic poem of power, envy, sin, forgiveness, love, and hope in one of our most beautiful online courses to date. Click the link below to register.

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/paradise-lost**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=834ac752d90c4169bf3100abe9bd54b8&_e=TcviVXJLP3T13325aEPFwEk4zIV-DU1NZVmW8-tb-YwFvq85cGgtNryUeC7KWXU_Fj26kQLkmQe_wHocKIDqupCjavB_XrWaelxF3wlVdlYFv4pbdF8LptpIHFjghVInvxdkjXG4yMCr5gfs64kujrF5ivgE27RZWXsYagK2Pi2tgJjeR5P9xYwo1kEzgTpM9gH213KOk3hUFBxoUQZI6kwoNW4QstAOjKbCF6V1HjJyL44dNYftC9Ylw8mdReENEmjMM3aAbELuVJD7myK8Xau2jnFdSNypc97kcdZ9u44Ho_U6vaG5T2uuf9ZG5j_zxWlUQCcNw9C2cmgyyFwlNyDuZ_bdXH17-QJzGG_28e3tNR6qRoBw34PTxJFWj_9Kh1qeFmdZCxSZDGyelZYMiA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Imagine this scene of heartbreak! This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Among the many passages of breathtaking beauty in Paradise Lost is Milton's description of Adam seeing Eve for the first time after the Fall. They had separated for the day to complete their happy labors in the Garden, where Satan found and deceived Eve. Adam, blissfully unaware, had prepared a garland of roses to present to his bride upon their reunification. When she appeared, he immediately knew disaster had struck: From his slack hand the garland wreathed for Eve Down dropped, and all the faded roses shed Imagine this scene of heartbreak! Imagine the feeling of all the world coming to ruin! Yet for Adam and Eve, as for us, there is hope in redemption. Milton is a master of building a world, describing tragedy, and depicting renewal. Join Professor Stephen Smith as he guides us through John Milton's epic poem of power, envy, sin, forgiveness, love, and hope in one of our most beautiful online courses to date. Click the link below to register. Happy learning to you! Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

body:
#################################
Fellow Patriot,

**[BIG NEWS:](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2115d77b41cd4bfc9e76be9d5e01fdc4&_e=cg83T9waThz8De6mIB8NFxfI50hjDiLQCbLU9Pd3CqS9dPdBVZy7P5XsY2ythMkFd4dBzjJnaLu4nEGP5EQJqMFnd03pp0PAT3S1va36IwOlKyw9lOMHypiSD-5P7Xo_weDf-d3gsjs-G9rLmU3JSnE-t6on0Pftf94Kl_0KqulNWZJBiS3MXdCfMGeOo5ZnpuRoVlO1oG1z3INfLGjfNSO5zednjru-VA-6b9JZ_OB4prONKZOCw1gnP3XJJd2ZxCH0bYLLZYxO9DVBYD3-hYIPOliVBgidDfvYOJfDwlcQtIfk8Pi7f3O6qAqLFKwuh8YVfiaAlbNvxCXNb4VA6Eh6lEIBvMzOsLGmPxQ5hi4QkhU9g2Ud4uMVMnMQhcIofKDVebyN_e_yAphtJse9jPnQ2zvPDI7EFsZUxHFUxajWA9HeHh03CbnX--iLzS9brtIX5eNKNXYezwKjUUwMR2jJpWvi-f7ZNvqr8tx7bxs%3D) **Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But here's the thing...

_... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025._

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: A Tale of Two Tax Plans – House Vs Senate
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/housevssenate?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **Two competing tax plans are being considered by the Mississippi legislature. **The House plan, published in January and voted through already as HB1, offers to eliminate the state income tax. The Senate this week published their rival proposal.

Which of the plans is more conservative?
---
|
---
_White, Lamar, Hosemann: House plan eliminates income tax. Senate plan doesn’t._
| **Speaker White’s House tax plan is without question the more conservative proposal.** It offers:

* Full elimination of the state income tax over the next decade,
* Net $1.1 billion reduction in the amount of money the state government takes from taxpayers, and
* A cut in the grocery tax.

**White’s plan is the product of careful deliberation and public consultation.** White organized a public Tax Day, open to everyone. Rep Trey Lamar, who authored a lot of the detail, fielded all sorts of suggestions. The plan they produced reflects that collaboration and candor.

Delbert Hosemann’s Senate plan only offers a $330 million cut in the tax take. **The Senate plan would leave politicians in control of a far larger share of your money – which a cynic might say is its purpose. **

The Senate plan was produced behind closed doors, only being unveiled halfway through the session. **The Senate plan should be seen as a deliberate attempt by anti-tax cutting politicians to try to head off Governor Tate Reeves / Jason White’s conservative tax cutting agenda.**

Hosemann’s tax plan would still leave the income tax in place, albeit at a reduced rate of 2.9 percent. The Senate plan would be to cut the grocery tax to 5 percent, rather than the 4 percent the House wants.

I'm not wild about the idea of any increase in the sales tax. What I don’t like about either plan is that they won’t just raise the gas tax, but they frontload that gas tax increase before the tax reductions kick in elsewhere. The House suggests raising the gas tax by 15 cents a gallon, while the Senate suggests 9 cents.

**If revenue needs to be raised to improve our roads, a more conservative approach might be to have time-limited taxes, with revenues earmarked for specific infrastructure projects. **

That said, it would be disingenuous for any supporters of the Senate plan to attack the House plan from the right, given that the Senate is also proposing to increase the gas tax while continuing to tax your paycheck every month.
---
|
---
_George Bush. Read my lips, no new taxes _
| **I worry that the Senate plan is primarily an exercise in political positioning, rather than income tax elimination. **

“Read my lips” I imagine those that drafted it want to be able to say “We support tax cuts! Here’s a token cut in the grocery tax, and a slightly lower increase in the gas tax. We’re not RINOs! Really”.

**That kind of distraction strategy might once have worked if no one paid attention and the local media only ever criticize you from the progressive left. I’m not sure it will work anymore. **If you posture as a tax cutter but put all your energy into a tax plan designed to dilute actual tax cuts, you will be called out.

Delbert Hosemann is reported as saying he believes full elimination of the income tax would be over ambitious. **Since when was it “over ambitious” for Republicans with a super majority to get on and do conservative things? **

I don’t see President Trump and Elon Musk holding back from doing what needs to be done because it is “over ambitious”.
---
|
---
_Conservatives in office should be ambitious. _
| **Our legislature needs to recognize that Mississippi has a historic political and economic opportunity to eliminate the state income tax.** Mississippi is starting to see real growth, thanks in large part to the tax cuts we have already implemented. It is not a coincidence that when Arkansas cut their income tax rate, they set it at 3.9 percent in order to be just below our current rate of 4 percent.

Implementing the Senate plan, which would retain the income tax rate at 2.9 percent, rather than abolishing it, would make Mississippi less competitive than our neighbors**. If passed, the Senate plan would squander the chance to deliver bold reform, while institutionalizing our economic uncompetitiveness. **

Conservatives should support the House plan, with some possible modifications.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=914429ae79&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **Ps. I’ll be speaking at Lafayette County Republicans in Oxford **on Tuesday at 7pm about how to achieve the change we need in Mississippi.

I would love to see you there.
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, Two competing tax plans are being considered by the Mississippi legislature. The House plan, published in January and voted through already as HB1, offers to eliminate the state income tax. The Senate this week published their rival proposal. Which of the plans is more conservative? | White, Lamar, Hosemann: House plan eliminates income tax. Senate plan doesn’t. | Speaker White’s House tax plan is without question the more conservative proposal. It offers: Full elimination of the state income tax over the next decade, Net $1.1 billion reduction in the amount of money the state government takes from taxpayers, and A cut in the grocery tax. White’s plan is the product of careful deliberation and public consultation. White organized a public Tax Day, open to everyone. Rep Trey Lamar, who authored a lot of the detail, fielded all sorts of suggestions. The plan they produced reflects that collaboration and candor. Delbert Hosemann’s Senate plan only offers a $330 million cut in the tax take. The Senate plan would leave politicians in control of a far larger share of your money – which a cynic might say is its purpose. The Senate plan was produced behind closed doors, only being unveiled halfway through the session. The Senate plan should be seen as a deliberate attempt by anti-tax cutting politicians to try to head off Governor Tate Reeves / Jason White’s conservative tax cutting agenda. Hosemann’s tax plan would still leave the income tax in place, albeit at a reduced rate of 2.9 percent. The Senate plan would be to cut the grocery tax to 5 percent, rather than the 4 percent the House wants. I'm not wild about the idea of any increase in the sales tax. What I don’t like about either plan is that they won’t just raise the gas tax, but they frontload that gas tax increase before the tax reductions kick in elsewhere. The House suggests raising the gas tax by 15 cents a gallon, while the Senate suggests 9 cents. If revenue needs to be raised to improve our roads, a more conservative approach might be to have time-limited taxes, with revenues earmarked for specific infrastructure projects. That said, it would be disingenuous for any supporters of the Senate plan to attack the House plan from the right, given that the Senate is also proposing to increase the gas tax while continuing to tax your paycheck every month. | George Bush. Hi. I bet that's not what you were expecting on a big red hat these days

_(But don 't you worry, I'm about as pro-Trump as they come!)_

_My name 's Marlin Stutzman._ I'm a 4th-generation farmer raising the finest Wagyu cows this side of the Mississippi. When I'm not herding cattle and hauling hay, I'm fighting the good fight in the People's House.

I ran for office because the Democrats AND even some Republicans have stabbed farmers like me in the back for as long as I can remember.

Ask any farmer - they'll show you the scars.

**I swear elites in DC think meat and produce *magically appear* at Whole Foods - not because farmers devote their blood, sweat, and tears to their trade. **

That's how they can sleep at night knowing...
* China is buying up our farmland
* Democrats taxed us into oblivion
* Liberals want to replace beef with fake meat made from God knows what
* Politicians get rich at our expense
* We're left to pick up the scraps

My entire life is focused on bringing all that to a screeching halt. And the political class knows I can't be bought off or bribed. That's why they're mobilizing the powers-at-be to silence me so they can keep the gravy train rolling.

_And holding the line here will be tougher than a $3 steak._

**[That's why I'm left with no choice but to ask you for a small donation today to keep me in Congress. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Baaj Nwaavjo I’tah Kukveni – Ancestral Footprints of the Grand Canyon National Monument
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I am calling on you to stand with me and defend our public lands.
#

Peter —
The Grand Canyon isn’t just a landmark. It’s sacred land to Arizona’s tribes. It protects our biodiversity, helps us fight climate change. It’s an essential part of our state and national history.
**Last year** , we celebrated the creation of Baaj Nwaavjo I’tah Kukveni – Ancestral Footprints of the Grand Canyon National Monument in Arizona, and the million acres it safeguards.
**A week ago** , Secretary of the Interior Doug Burgum released a directive to the Department of the Interior to reassess Baaj Nwaavjo I’tah Kukveni and all other national monuments designated under the Antiquities Act — with the goal of opening them up for oil, gas, and mining speculation.
**Today** , I am calling on you to stand with me and defend our public lands.
Trump and his administration tried this the first time he was in the White House. We stopped them back then, and we can do the same now.
Peter, please: [**Add your name and sign on here to support our public lands. It’s on us to step up and prevent the abuse and degradation of national monuments like Baaj Nwaavjo I’tah Kukveni.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_250214_public_lands/?source=em250215-1-120&akid=3719%2E734936%2EfY3cGY)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_250214_public_lands/?source=em250215-1-120&akid=3719%2E734936%2EfY3cGY)
Thanks for stepping up,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=3719%2E734936%2EfY3cGY). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=3719%2E734936%2EfY3cGY). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=3719_734936_fY3cGY&akid=3719%2E734936%2EfY3cGY)

Our records show that you haven’t made your $75 Political Contribution Refund (PCR) donation to the Minnesota House DFL yet this year. Through the PCR program, you can contribute $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state of Minnesota. The process is simple:

* * *
Friend, Elon Musk, the richest man in the world, is waging an all-out war on the federal government. Let us explain:
* **First:** Musk spent an estimated $200 MILLION to elect Donald Trump last November.
*
* **Then:** Trump gave him full authority to GUT the federal government with his “Department of Government Efficiency” that has tried to dismantle key agencies like USAID.
*
* **Now:** Musk has access to YOUR critical information, including Social Security and Medicare data:

**Let us be clear, friend: this is a clear conflict of interest – and it requires our immediate attention.** [**That’s why we’re calling on 43614 Democrats to sign the petition demanding Congress to REVOKE Elon Musk’s access to critical government data. Click here or below to add your name.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102174199/528337121/1887581061?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDllNDE1ZC1hOWViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QGj_qCoty94i0s55wb0SepgNP4jFWPTFqImFTv5IuNo=&emci=00da4441-44e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c49e415d-a9eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26828920) | | **[SIGN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102174201/528337122/1887581061?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDllNDE1ZC1hOWViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QGj_qCoty94i0s55wb0SepgNP4jFWPTFqImFTv5IuNo=&emci=00da4441-44e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c49e415d-a9eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26828920)**

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: They STILL don’t get it
body:
Peter, I’ve been reading about all the absolutely insane things our government has been spending OUR tax money on as uncovere
|
---
| Peter, I’ve been reading about all the absolutely _insane_ things our government has been spending OUR tax money on as uncovered by Elon Musk as a part of his DOGE cuts. Maybe you’ve heard of some of these:
* $80 million dollars [FEMA spent](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/2dc0cfc9351b7047e9b00677257b4965/eJyNkEFvwjAMhf9LzvXSpoBYbwghVJVxmLbzFDUuRNAkShygoP73hW3itEk72v78_J5vjNBIQ7ViFbvQVYiSZcxjq51GQ0trSLZfUzGdFGWRsaM2h7W30bHq9uvyA7i3y9l8njEaHCbk7XWxbOrt-mNTb5tEOunTjf_pTJ5nD53Vy6LesHH8Uxh7TatT0g6sIh_xnkjplIre_THxeyIXKs7N4Gygp9b2XORiynPBC8FjAIPnwJXdIexlgCLPIZDsOvQBUt3HcICTPQcgC502CgoCbaCNlFo-9o4nE9I5NOrngw0O31bGT73tePw=) on NYC hotel rooms for illegal immigrants
* $8 million [numerous government agencies paid](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/7ef1e502762fc67c57fe05217b24fe67/eJyNkMFuwjAMht_F54aqlDHWG0IIVWUcpu08ZamrWbRJlLgUhvruMxvaLpvE1f78-bfPwGi15bKGAo78MZ3mkEBAQ57Q8spZ1uarO72bZXmWQEt2vwmu91Cc_xz-AS7lfL6YJ8Anj4I8Py1XVbnbvG7LXSWk10F23OaZPfx61o_Lcgvj-K8YO-L1QdwRCg49Xi6qSa7il9AK_87sY5GmwzBMGne0OMSJcV3qXUtMJqY1SjbuxKAOyBi0jUo3jaYQldHWYBtVdr_Yq9i_RRPIMzlBrvNO-eAkhvYebX39YYWn7zDjJxDbfdg=) for fancy Politico subscriptions
* The $149,000 the [Department of Defense spends on soap dispensers](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/6259627d82b3144e2d735ef3d9a2ebff/eJyNkUFrAjEQhf9Lzsa47lZ0oRQRkUXrobTnEpJZDW4mIZlorfjfm63FUws9zfDmzTd55MIIUCI1mtXsgz7H45INWABlvAGkhUOS6ns6fqiKshiwzuBhFVzyrL78unw39HI5mVYDRmcP2fL6Ml-sm-3qfdNs19npZcg3_sepZpM7Z_k8bzbsev0TDNbQ8pjZkdUUEvSJtMmp6C102b8n8rEWApRDZ40iYyEODWojb61yViCcojBIEDCrDmUnUhRFORpx5doWgKvkI5eouTtC8MEo0Dw66bk20QNGCJHnSnLnkPeKNrjjCTUE3ubncBk5dHlmUzzwLm9rtwNOKWDkyfM9SBIykFEdxL07iaKYFtOqnMyGysanNjj7aHXIgaXv6T-_tYbzLfb1C_iio6k=)

It’s enough to make your blood boil. But do you know what’s even crazier? Some on the Left want to stop DOGE from uncovering and cutting this wasteful spending. Look no further than Mikie Sherrill. The leading Democratic candidate for New Jersey governor is now [fear-mongering seniors](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/906bff5a11b62220b50540130a72319f/eJyNkEFPwzAMhf9Lzs2qtWOC3qZpmqqOHRCcUZRazCxNItullKn_nRTQTiBx9Xv-_J4vSsAbL3WrKvUuH0VRqkwRWIwIXrbBi7FfanGzWpbLTDn05z2FPqrq8uvy1TCPy_VtkSkZIyTL48Nm29TH_fOhPjbJGQ2lG__jrO7WV87uflMf1DT9CYYOZfeW2KwqoR7mRi2mVvJELvlPIpGrPB-GYYGesQXyrwsbupxPQITOae5jDCSsPQzawQuyM4LBawmagIXQiu56PrM21gLzLAiB4Z5G3ULqJl1KkKc4Jkbw7c8vGxi_Q02fM8qBcA==) saying Social Security and Medicare are at risk of being cut by the DOGE team. Under that guise, she and her Democratic colleagues are backing new legislation aimed at stifling DOGE’s ability to streamline government. That just doesn’t fit the reality. And–even worse–they’re misleading seniors to justify their attempts to hide and protect the extreme government bloat that Musk and his team are bringing to light. And while those on the Left are attempting to stop the Trump Administration’s critical work to end waste, fraud, and abuse, they are also gaslighting New Jersey voters on Immigration. Politico [ran this story](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/c1218927a873ae36139af18f8a68de1a/eJyNkMFOwzAMht_F53bJ0m1ivU3TNFUdOyA4o5BGYGgSK3UpZeq7kwHaCaRd7c-f_fsEbL32XDVQwgd_KlVABtEaJLSet8GzNt9dtVzMi3kGLfq3fQw9QXn6c_gCnMvF6kZmwCPZhNzfbbZ1ddw_HqpjnUjSMe24zrNYry6e3e2mOsA0_Su2Dnn3ntwdlBx7e07UYErFD7FN_AszdaUQwzDMKLTIaMLMBCe8HTqhpFoKqYRcC_-aR0v9U4tG-y5PLkc5OofPUTMGn1NEp-OYS6lkoaRMyzWR9c3v52o7_pwwfQFTKHZz) claiming Republican candidates for governor are focusing too much on Immigration. Really? As if New Jersey voters don’t care about Phil Murphy’s sanctuary state, absorbing our tax dollars and making residents less safe. **One thing is clear: They still don’t get it.** After their shellacking in the 2024 Election, the Left still doesn’t understand why voters chose to give Trump and Common Sense a mandate. They don’t get why the average voter cares more about making ends meet than they do about the latest diversity initiative. They don’t get why voters rather see their tax dollars spent wisely on real needs instead of wasted on government bloat. **They don’t get it. They don’t get us. And they shouldn’t be in charge.** This is why we at the Common Sense Club are committed to calling out the Left and its lunacy. The more New Jerseyans know about the Left’s insane policies, the less likely they are to vote for them at the ballot box. And while the nation spoke decisively in the 2024 election, we here in New Jersey still have an important election year ahead of us. It’s time for all Common Sense New Jerseyans to get loud. And we need your help to amplify their voices. Are you in?
---

| Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

clean_body: Peter, I’ve been reading about all the absolutely insane things our government has been spending OUR tax money on as uncovere | | Peter, I’ve been reading about all the absolutely insane things our government has been spending OUR tax money on as uncovered by Elon Musk as a part of his DOGE cuts. Maybe you’ve heard of some of these: $80 million dollars = on NYC hotel rooms for illegal immigrants $8 million = for fancy Politico subscriptions The $149,000 the = It’s enough to make your blood boil. But do you know what’s even crazier? Some on the Left want to stop DOGE from uncovering and cutting this wasteful spending. Look no further than Mikie Sherrill. The leading Democratic candidate for New Jersey governor is now == saying Social Security and Medicare are at risk of being cut by the DOGE team. Under that guise, she and her Democratic colleagues are backing new legislation aimed at stifling DOGE’s ability to streamline government. That just doesn’t fit the reality. And–even worse–they’re misleading seniors to justify their attempts to hide and protect the extreme government bloat that Musk and his team are bringing to light. And while those on the Left are attempting to stop the Trump Administration’s critical work to end waste, fraud, and abuse, they are also gaslighting New Jersey voters on Immigration. Politico claiming Republican candidates for governor are focusing too much on Immigration. Really? As if New Jersey voters don’t care about Phil Murphy’s sanctuary state, absorbing our tax dollars and making residents less safe. One thing is clear: They still don’t get it. After their shellacking in the 2024 Election, the Left still doesn’t understand why voters chose to give Trump and Common Sense a mandate. They don’t get why the average voter cares more about making ends meet than they do about the latest diversity initiative. They don’t get why voters rather see their tax dollars spent wisely on real needs instead of wasted on government bloat. They don’t get it. They don’t get us. And they shouldn’t be in charge.** This is why we at the Common Sense Club are committed to calling out the Left and its lunacy. The more New Jerseyans know about the Left’s insane policies, the less likely they are to vote for them at the ballot box. And while the nation spoke decisively in the 2024 election, we here in New Jersey still have an important election year ahead of us. It’s time for all Common Sense New Jerseyans to get loud. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4427532c-ebae-447b-bfd8-2332fcedfd05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Peter, It’s clear that our nation’s president is a racist. All the way back in the 1970s, Trump was sued by the Department of Justice for allegedly refusing to rent apartments in his housing developments to Black people – and the Justice Department found evidence that he and his father “failed and neglected” to follow the Fair Housing Act. And his racist actions certainly didn’t stop there. He constantly has pushed the racist conspiratory that President Obama wasn’t born in America. And he attacked Congresswomen Ilhan Omar, Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez by telling them to “go back” to the countries they came from – even though they are all American citizens. Now, he’s stocking his Cabinet full of clowns who spread lies about diversity programs, and he’s already rolling out executive orders to stop federal agencies from celebrating all the different people that make our nation truly great. Because of Trump, several federal agencies have stopped observing Black History Month. [So this Black History Month, we need to rededicate ourselves to standing up to racism. At Blue Amp Action, we’re working hard to challenge Trump and his racist allies and to get Democrats elected who will fight for justice for ALL Americans. Will you help support our work with a $5 contribution today? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1278651-21b6-4796-b9a3-c17a805653ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75794bbc-158a-46a1-be90-3121d92d3828/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: 🌤️ Please do not click away from this important message from Kamala Harris’ team. 🌤️
disclaimer_text: paid for by huge cuts to programs the rest of us rely on like Medicaid, Medicare, Head Start and more
body:
There has never been a more important moment to have a strong Democratic Party.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=391%2E2563979%2E3tyaP2)

🌤️ To all Kamala Harris supporters, 🌤️
Please don't click away from this important message.

As you read this, Republicans are preparing to pass massive, permanent tax cuts for the richest people of this country -- paid for by huge cuts to programs the rest of us rely on like Medicaid, Medicare, Head Start and more.
The Democratic Party needs your help to stop them.

If everyone reading those donated even just $5 to the Democratic National Committee they’d have the resources they needed to organize in districts we can convince moderate Republicans to vote no. We only need a few of them.
But not everyone gives; that's why we need people who understand the importance of this moment to chip-in today.

The amount of the donation isn't as important as the donation itself. If you can give $5, we're asking you to give $5. If you can give $25 or more, give that. It will all add up.
If stopping Republicans from passing destructive tax cuts for billionaires seems worth $5, $25, or whatever you can afford, please make a well-time, generous donation today:

[**Can Kamala Harris count on you to contribute directly to the Democratic National Committee today? Their average online donation is around $50. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that you are helping Democrats stop Trump's tax cuts for billionaires.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250215&refcode2=391_2563979_3tyaP2&akid=391%2E2563979%2E3tyaP2)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Conservativeum
