## DHS cuts over 400 employees * WorldNetDaily * by Hailey Gomez, Daily Caller News Foundation
The U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) said Friday that it cut 405 employees from various components. The Trump administration has focused on cutting government waste through groups like the Department of Government Efficiency and offered payouts to government employees. The majority of the cuts came from the Federal Emergency Management Agency, which saw more [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/5GStVInlyeIa8kElyWeMIIdB8cl8jB65XX_4sg6H3dsqLCJ7fn_3FEO5g8bxBe-mgS9v83YOWkyKYIX_Ejzap8-HQjsGu9HKaQrK3eVmARjVxmiscwvX1pWxnRXzd3_HhZMEB_xNm_gmdnYdhRq1HKVdccBsje6gW3sFHFDhtZznxgs4QrOZ8GUVVfAT7F9UrxxFXJHzvbrJIEyJoTugE-oeufFtB4x1gMo-3uzVgRAkATXsr-Q6Fb0vGKj15ENLuO5549GIOLm3TpUGWrpg6xgQJahOS8hntqCA0bzlmDv-F9ZBGNhD0r6IosAlIm627tDjN8H_1rAXxThnBppFceAb-uVwuy_jrzes_QrC_lf-KdcOg11CT3oUBZVsEl4/fKpTjaX0UuHzTN5V29xsUNS_GRinx8wK/6)

## Hungary’s Victor Orban reveals biggest threat to the West * WorldNetDaily * by Tucker Carlson
Hungary’s Victor Orban WATCH: Hungary’s Viktor Orban is by far the longest serving head of state in Europe, and by this point has been vindicated on pretty much everything. So when he says that going forward it’s Ukraine, not Russia, that may be the biggest threat to the west, it’s worth paying attention.... pic.twitter.com/QeZmaMFJhy — [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/O1DptUqc_CbyqBRr5dIV5Ohg5u252im-ame-sN49jk2PGQ2YmQb-b7uxNUAzdzJ04aB2b5WpdlwMJM3_RFatanu4sQEvI6ClaQYNModC-lYCkXbaagCU9NEdTbzPMIITVJotXlMr0f74H5vqaQFDGZrgoAm2yIwkp874Or-o1yMKgVHBjKFOPtFfX7iuZrt7aFpPYpLKiCrE9bNz6Inp4qp7R39sbMXaiBZLboCq0eJQAe9V-RK5Pg0brtmtxMkIkOW_gD8McMjHrD4Z94x9LIFXOuJb46w52mWLdI2ZJHO1e4g9DNyWJzwI2BnwHeaVRj5N0NElrcjZOWCc6YH12ja5kawRXF-kxm1fymQag1NUhC9DqVjrcrRv_WYZF796kg/srTuzWQTTx1m9_LKGM8wboLnwemYhWDR/6)

In late January, it was announced the Trump administration would begin to tariff Canada and Mexico due to perceived trade deficits. President Donald Trump also mentioned possible tariffs on China for the amount of Fentanyl that pours into the country through the southern border. name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: re: staying in the fight →
body:
This is a longer email — we hope you’ll read all the way through.
---
Derek, this is a longer email about the 2024 election, where Democrats stand in 2025, and where we go from here. It’s important, so we hope you’ll stick around. Donald Trump won the presidential election in November, but that doesn’t mean our hard work was in vain. It might not feel like it, but all of our contributions — whether it was knocking on doors, making phone calls, or chipping in $5 — made a big difference. Republicans have an extremely slim House majority, and Democrats won battleground neck-and-neck Senate races because of the work we did together. That’s an important lesson. We’re already seeing the consequences of November’s election as Trump’s Project 2025 agenda comes to life — but we’re also seeing how important it is that we have as many Democrats as possible in offices up and down the ballot, willing to fight back and protect the people they serve. _Now, we need to elect more of them._ That work starts now. We need to organize early, invest in races across the country, and build the strongest possible Democratic Party to take on Trump and the GOP in 2026 and beyond. But we can’t do it without your help. Your support today powers the movement that will defend our democracy, protect fundamental rights, and elect Democrats who will fight for all of us. Every dollar helps us mobilize voters, strengthen our infrastructure, and push back against the damage Trump and his allies are already doing. We know this won’t be easy. But if we stay engaged, invest in the right places, and keep doing the work, we can win. We’ve done it before, and with your help, we’ll do it again. Thank you for staying in this fight. The Democrats **This moment demands a Democratic Party that can not only mobilize against Trump and Elon Musk’s disastrous agenda, but build the long-term infrastructure to elect Democrats at all levels of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states.** [**If stopping Trump’s worst policies and electing Democrats everywhere is worth a few dollars to you, we hope you’ll make a $3 contribution now to help:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250215_2794_fr&refcode2=2794_22930333_4ao8GU&akid=2794%2E22930333%2E4ao8GU) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250215_2794_fr&refcode2=2794_22930333_4ao8GU&akid=2794%2E22930333%2E4ao8GU)**

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: I grew up next to one of Donald Trump's golf courses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102176753/528345195/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGI0YTg4ZS1hZGViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrqsKARIx2OyG5rnQOPnKqwL8AB79SgpXYkeg42TJ78=)
---
Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102176757/528345199/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250215_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGI0YTg4ZS1hZGViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrqsKARIx2OyG5rnQOPnKqwL8AB79SgpXYkeg42TJ78=) Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain.

I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips.

**I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102176760/528345203/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250215_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGI0YTg4ZS1hZGViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrqsKARIx2OyG5rnQOPnKqwL8AB79SgpXYkeg42TJ78=) My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family.

Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families.

You see, the New York City government shoveled over _$100 million in government aid_ to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. _They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street._

But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: **Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families.**

When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it.

I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress.

Right now, the threat of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families _– and they’re raising millions to pull it off._

But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. [**Can I count on you to join our coalition today by chipping in $3 toward our $10,000 mid-month goal? If thousands of people like you each chip in what they can afford, I know we can take on their dark money and handle whatever the GOP trifecta throws our way. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102176763/528345207/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250215_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGI0YTg4ZS1hZGViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrqsKARIx2OyG5rnQOPnKqwL8AB79SgpXYkeg42TJ78=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102176817/528345271/-864556716?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250215_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGI0YTg4ZS1hZGViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrqsKARIx2OyG5rnQOPnKqwL8AB79SgpXYkeg42TJ78=)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102176823/528345273/-864556716?amount=7&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250215_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGI0YTg4ZS1hZGViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrqsKARIx2OyG5rnQOPnKqwL8AB79SgpXYkeg42TJ78=)
[Or a custom donation »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102176825/528345288/-864556716?amount=10&amounts=3,7,10&refcode=RTFC_20250215_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGI0YTg4ZS1hZGViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrqsKARIx2OyG5rnQOPnKqwL8AB79SgpXYkeg42TJ78=)
Thank you,

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families. When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it. I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress. Right now, the threat of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families – and they’re raising millions to pull it off. But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a=. Click here to . Click here to . | | = =

## **Associated Press: Ad wars begin in closely watched Wisconsin Supreme Court race**
The GOP-backed candidate in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race, Judge Brad Schimel, launched a $1.4 million ad campaign last month. Schimel, who’s supported the state’s extreme 1849 abortion ban and defended egregiously gerrymandered maps in court, is facing off against Judge Susan Crawford. body:
Unelected, unchecked, and completely out of control. We must make a stand.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102177924/528348820/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGRkYjQzZS1hZWViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iG79bE2nvTcteWytI4RMYGgx1fYqs7hGqLanoM4c6ec=&emci=fd0ebf95-06eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4dddb43e-aeeb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15759664)
---
Derek, Elon Musk is**illegally dismantling our democracy** – and Donald Trump is just letting it happen. Unelected, unchecked, and completely out of control, Musk has seized control of government agencies, fired career civil servants, and replaced them with his Silicon Valley loyalists. **This is not how democracy works. This is not what the Constitution allows.** We refused to let a billionaire tech bro play dictator while Americans suffer. **[Derek, will you sign our petition right now to condemn Elon Musk’s illegal power grab and demand real accountability?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102177925/528348821/903017251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGRkYjQzZS1hZWViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iG79bE2nvTcteWytI4RMYGgx1fYqs7hGqLanoM4c6ec=&emci=fd0ebf95-06eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4dddb43e-aeeb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15759664)** | **************[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102177926/528348822/903017251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGRkYjQzZS1hZWViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iG79bE2nvTcteWytI4RMYGgx1fYqs7hGqLanoM4c6ec=&emci=fd0ebf95-06eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4dddb43e-aeeb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15759664)**************
---
Musk’s unchecked power is only possible because Trump is too weak to stop him. The same MAGA Republicans who sound the alarm over the “deep state” are now celebrating the rise of an unelected billionaire ruling our country. **Enough is enough.**
[_**We need every Democrat, every voter, and every American who believes in democracy to take a stand. Sign the petition now – let’s fight back before it’s too late.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102177927/528348823/903017251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGRkYjQzZS1hZWViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iG79bE2nvTcteWytI4RMYGgx1fYqs7hGqLanoM4c6ec=&emci=fd0ebf95-06eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4dddb43e-aeeb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15759664)
**************[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102177928/528348824/903017251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGRkYjQzZS1hZWViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iG79bE2nvTcteWytI4RMYGgx1fYqs7hGqLanoM4c6ec=&emci=fd0ebf95-06eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4dddb43e-aeeb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15759664)**************

Thank you,
– Team DPVA

subject: You're Invited to an Exclusive Virtual Townhall on Februrary 27th
body:
| | |
---
|

| | **Dear Friends,** We hope this message finds you well. **The New Pennsylvania Project** and **Why Courts Matter** **– PA** are excited to continue our crucial work of providing civic education to our communities. As a voting rights organization, our mission is to offer current, accurate, and accessible information on the importance of voting in every election. We would like to invite you to join us for our **Why Courts Matter – 301 Virtual Town Hall** : **Event Details:****Date:** Thursday, February 27, 2025
**Time:** 6:30 – 7:30 PM (via Zoom)
**Speakers:** Kadida Kenner, Founding CEO, New Pennsylvania Project [**Registration Link**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YhVueAlOBMb0se9nBbj0OBKxWIYHr3D3kJ-2BAjmyFPsLuymF0mxxwaGghlOMuBCigl8O281r9tbscAcsxkWxIuGbCS72FkVTxAGUkQmgkuXbuFUbR_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYX8gZIKCkGs1b21-2Fkxvv7tmqyL4teJTnbt37xUbuFpSbTTBBzSkKYKhGffOxzG2ZMmfhyjxR-2Bh3IID-2FkW6snxA5NRhMbkqolphH-2FpJkXMB0cXFOGus2Rs1FZR40LT1P8ynfcmrzf9-2FvP0N63XnZrhK2VCTK81FWJK8HPCtgHy7RhR5iufzbsT80QdUefcjT34) **Why Attend?** This town hall will focus on the importance of our federal courts, their impact on our daily lives, and how we can engage in the state judicial election process to protect the independence of our federal courts. During the event, we will discuss:How federal judges are appointed and confirmed for a lifetime, and their long-term impact on our lives. The 2025 Pennsylvania judicial elections, including retention elections for three seats on the PA Supreme Court. Your participation can make a significant difference. A civically engaged electorate is crucial to ensuring fair and independent courts. **Please register below to attend** , and feel free to share this invitation with friends and family:
---
[ RSVP HERE](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YhVueAlOBMb0se9nBbj0OBKxWIYHr3D3kJ-2BAjmyFPsLuymF0mxxwaGghlOMuBCigl8O281r9tbscAcsxkWxIuGbCS72FkVTxAGUkQmgkuXbudXk9_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYX8gZIKCkGs1b21-2Fkxvv7tmqyL4teJTnbt37xUbuFpSYJuzzNh3Kg4XsywyDUNjNoe6pfVGhfPZdI4zFeUt90N4INj4cqoYutUzgY-2FDuRYCB31LDV3aqQjAbf-2FjnLUtJyYV5oVlDypA9ERapxI6qvUbal-2B1z-2Bnbi7mXmUUUD4YFh5HhY0L8qI7H5tis0v908n)

name: Survival Food Kit
subject: The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis.
body:
Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20306/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/2b02de21f5dae9282ce991f4b64793a47455fe18). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20306/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/2b02de21f5dae9282ce991f4b64793a47455fe18?message_id=IjgwMWIxNjYwLWNlMDYtMDEzZC0xNGUxLTFlYmI3MTAwYmQwNUBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20306/6374453/2c4f320ad6ab919aa17a8f27265291dfb994e76e/2b02de21f5dae9282ce991f4b64793a47455fe18)
---
---
|
---
**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis**
---
---
**This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20306/6374453/a2f5dba1e13a0ed461e3e1a86cb35d27aba4d197/2b02de21f5dae9282ce991f4b64793a47455fe18). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20306/6374453/a2f5dba1e13a0ed461e3e1a86cb35d27aba4d197/2b02de21f5dae9282ce991f4b64793a47455fe18) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20306/6374453/a2f5dba1e13a0ed461e3e1a86cb35d27aba4d197/2b02de21f5dae9282ce991f4b64793a47455fe18) on these survival food kits while you can. **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**

We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. name: Josh Harder
subject: Why I’m in this fight
body:
An important reminder.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102178061/528349111/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWZiNGE4OGUtYWRlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p944PoZcZ9clWJq7YDl1kS_Tyae-yGKk-pdxDLbYoI8=) | Peter, In times like this, it’s important to remember why we’re in this fight. Today I want to tell you a story about my brother and his impact on my life. A few years after my parents had me, they decided to adopt my younger brother David. David was born 10 weeks premature and spent the first two years of his life in and out of hospitals. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102178062/528349112/-1062586212?&refcode=E12228-20250215-HealthcareStory-Image-HealthCare&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWZiNGE4OGUtYWRlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p944PoZcZ9clWJq7YDl1kS_Tyae-yGKk-pdxDLbYoI8=) My parents received a medical bill over 100 pages long. If it weren’t for my dad’s health insurance, we would have been in huge trouble. It was very scary and even at that age I knew something was terribly unfair. That fear and anger at our healthcare system came to a head a few years later. When I saw my hometown Republican Congressman vote to take healthcare away from people like my brother, I knew I had to do something about it. So I decided to run against that Republican. And I won. That feeling of having to actually _do something_ to fix the system still drives me today. Our healthcare system is still leaving millions behind, and I’m terrified of what RFK Jr. or Elon Musk are going to do to make it even worse. This is what’s at stake right now for our families. I’m ready to once again step up and fight back. [**I wanted to share this story so you know why I do this work. And why it’s so important that we keep fighters in Congress.** _**If you’d consider chipping in to help me fight back, I’d appreciate it.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102178063/528349140/-1062586212?&refcode=E12228-20250215-HealthcareStory-SL-HealthCare&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWZiNGE4OGUtYWRlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p944PoZcZ9clWJq7YDl1kS_Tyae-yGKk-pdxDLbYoI8=) As for David, he’s doing great! I even had the chance to speak at his college graduation from Stan State. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102178064/528349141/-1062586212?&refcode=E12228-20250215-HealthcareStory-Image-HealthCare&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWZiNGE4OGUtYWRlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p944PoZcZ9clWJq7YDl1kS_Tyae-yGKk-pdxDLbYoI8=) Thanks for listening,
Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. [**Josh doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so please chip in now to our campaign!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102178065/528349142/1618730853?refcode=E12228-20250215-HealthcareStory-footer-HealthCare&amount=25&refcode2=footer3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWZiNGE4OGUtYWRlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p944PoZcZ9clWJq7YDl1kS_Tyae-yGKk-pdxDLbYoI8=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102178066/528349143/-1860252395?refcode=E12228-20250215-HealthcareStory-footer-HealthCare&amount=25&refcode2=footer3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWZiNGE4OGUtYWRlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p944PoZcZ9clWJq7YDl1kS_Tyae-yGKk-pdxDLbYoI8=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102178067/528349144/1618730853?refcode=E12228-20250215-HealthcareStory-footer-HealthCare&amount=25&refcode2=footer3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWZiNGE4OGUtYWRlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p944PoZcZ9clWJq7YDl1kS_Tyae-yGKk-pdxDLbYoI8=) If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. [Click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102178068/528349145/-1814317133?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWZiNGE4OGUtYWRlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p944PoZcZ9clWJq7YDl1kS_Tyae-yGKk-pdxDLbYoI8=&emci=df0ea460-53ea-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9fb4a88e-adeb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=6455652) to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7te8sxLvVUSDWs_e-jVleA2?unsubscribedata=n4C%2B0NZb%2FBdQSsNQ14X0T6X%2BvzgZEk1qtxEDy1FHtm%2F3bkZvzc6U7d6eXBKn%2BLU953CUT2jh7hR65asZU%2F%2FNaHtg649Kd3TbJrzV%2BNdZsdnjiqDlF8pXOugKwxgIHJ%2Fmx6y1GASfNalnBn0l%2BSPVJOxpgiPqo2LCntT7CqVrDca3KPOiPEvQ%2Bbm8fxqFi1RBXG%2BLedUIOo3%2Ba0flH%2FZ8g2bcTnfBsWhV1AmBDD0%2BMdCe5DLmqPKuD0PLKyxVjqXWVpZVwKjISlnxmBvJNDuE6QKBsepDvnSd%2FLUKSMqE02WIk247%2FldZBmCKIahRocoUP6suiBbDa%2BMN6AzzcvcPqFeLHB9n%2B8YecLQbiOYZlNbSmAMfLzotCcx9In2eBEQ5wTpgk4ca3wKwf1okahh3rjwflDU%2FanLj%2BHNzVRuIpcmqQutxYhqR5ZGQBBBEFqNk). name: National Alerts
subject: 3 Foods That Fight Memory Loss
body:
| | | | [](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
---
| | Why do some people stay sharp as a whip as they get older, while others have trouble recalling names, dates, and even conversations?

New research from Harvard University suggests age may not be the culprit.

And one Boston medical doctor now says memory problems are often caused by the foods you're eating — or NOT eating.

Dr. George Karanastasis, MD says: _"Your brain needs fuel to create new brain cells, recall memories, and focus on tasks. And where does it get that fuel? From the foods you eat."_

However, due to a change in modern dietary habits, Dr. K says most of us aren't getting the nutrients our brain needs. He says this lack of nutrients can cause brain fog, forgetfulness, or worse.

_"When your brain doesn't receive the right nutrients, it literally starts to starve. And that's when you start to suffer those embarrassing senior moments. You might forget people's names, walk into a room and forget why you're there, or even get lost driving to familiar places,"_ Dr. K says.

Fortunately, Dr. K developed a simple protocol that can help fight memory loss.

FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration. Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government? Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch? Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service? Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats? You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it never will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. And that’s why I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign. I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before: They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on). We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts. The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract. You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight. Sincerely, | | David Horowitz P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “ On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues.” | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | | ---|---

They deserve our support in this moment. | | | | | ---|--- While millions of Americans live paycheck to paycheck, Donald Trump is focused on renaming the Gulf of Mexico and making Canada the “51st state.” While families struggle to afford groceries, Elon Musk’s unelected DOGE crew is targeting the Department of Education and checking off Project 2025 line items. While consumers face rising costs and brace for extreme tariffs, out-of-touch MAGA Republicans are cheering on a right-wing oligarchy. It’s pathetic. State Democrats nationwide are using their power to expand economic opportunity, create new jobs, lower costs, and fight for working families – but they need our support to expand Democratic power seat by seat. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | From funding public education and advancing paid family and medical leave to addressing housing costs and expanding Medicaid, state Democrats are prioritizing policies that have a real, tangible impact on the folks they represent. But state Dems need your support to strengthen their numbers, flip seats from red to blue, and combat the MAGA agenda in state legislatures nationwide. Thank you for joining us in this fight. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The truth about the CFPB
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Warren for Senate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/370?source=em-header&t=1001&akid=2491%2E4032634%2EYOjyXD

By trying
to kill the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, Elon Musk and Donald
Trump are trying to make it easier for Big Banks and corporate CEOs to
trick, trap, and scam you.

This is a way for them to reward their rich and powerful friends who
profit by hurting consumers. And a way for them to get rid of the watchdog
that could stand in the way of their own financial interests.

It’s as simple as that.

But look, their attempts to shut down the CFPB are illegal. It’s also as
simple as that.

The CFPB is still the law. It’s still funded by the law. Elon Musk and
Donald Trump are illegally blocking it, and we’re in the courts right now
to get them to stand down and follow the law.

Another powerful way to fight back is to tell the real story
of the CFPB and how it has helped working people. Trump is saying that
people "in the Midwest and areas" have come up to him and told him that
the CFPB is "destroying" them. I think he just had “concepts of people”
telling him those stories. We need to call out these lies and fight back
with the truth.

I’ve asked this community to share how they have been personally helped by
the CFPB — and hundreds of you wrote in. I want to share a few of the
stories submitted below, and I'm asking you to share them too. Forward
this email, paste the stories into a social media post, read them out loud
to a family member or at an organizing event — it all adds up. Sharing
these stories is how we can push back against Trump and Musk's false
narrative with the facts.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-cfpbresponse/?source=EMZ24U_FIN_E_20250214_V1S1&t=1006&akid=2491%2E4032634%2EYOjyXD ]If you or someone you know has gotten help from the CFPB, please click
here and share your story with our team.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I was the victim of a mobile banking scam involving Zelle. I was scammed
out of $3,000. My bank claimed they were not responsible because Zelle
transactions did not provide the same fraud protection. I contacted the
CFPB to report the issue. Within a week, I heard from the bank’s top
executive. They were refunding the money!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I’ve suffered from various health conditions for most of my life and my
credit has suffered as I have not always been able to pay all of my
medical bills. I’m so grateful there’s a chance that these debts might be
removed from my credit reports as having bad credit has significantly
impacted my life negatively. The only debts on my credit reports are due
to medical bills that I couldn’t afford to pay. If this agency ceases to
exist then I will never know what it’s like to have decent credit and all
the things this allows in life, and that would be very sad and unfair to
me and others in my situation.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

We had replaced a failing router with our cable company and then wanted to
cancel our cable less than two years later. The company wanted to charge
us a $1,000 cancellation fee. They stated that by replacing our router we
had signed a new two year agreement with them. The CFPB helped us get it
reversed.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

The CFPB helped me have leverage against criminal student loan
organizations (literally criminal, ACS and their counterparts) when I had
no recourse. I learned that I could file a complaint with CFPB and then
use that as leverage to get them to listen to me and work with me on
repayment of my loans. It worked every time. If I did not have CFPB on my
side against for-profit student loan lenders, I would have continued to
get every door slammed in my face. When you report people to CFPB and show
evidence of the filed report, people start LISTENING to you and stop
passing the buck. I am so grateful.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

The CFPB helped me when my student loan servicer, Navient, kept insisting
that I owed money on a student loan after I had already paid it off. I
filed a complaint with the CFPB, and they got Navient to stop sending me
bills.

Additionally, a friend had a plane ticket to Thailand in March 2020, right
as the pandemic was starting. The airline canceled her flight and would
not give her a refund initially. I told her about the CFPB, and they
helped her get a refund for the ticket.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Chase tried to keep the $750 it owed me for a signup bonus for an account,
based on some b.s. about how "the offer didn't attach." Which would have
been *their* problem, not mine.

I went to the easy, intuitive CFPB site and within minutes had filed a
complaint.

Less than one week later, Chase realized they had been wrong and put the
money in my account.

I didn't know the government could be so EASY.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

My parents’ home was saved by The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.
The home I grew up in. The home they have lived in for 35 years. The home
to countless sisters, nephews, and cousins that have found themselves lost
but always found warmth and comfort because my parents door was always
open. The bank tried to take it but my father got the CFPB involved...Our
family truly believes the CFPB saved our family home. We are grateful to
them and will fight to do everything we can to show this administration we
will not be silenced.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Several years ago, I received a letter which stated I owed a collection
agency over $1,000 in debt that was supposedly over ten years old, and I
knew for a fact I owed no such thing. Because I was already aware
contacting the collection agency to dispute the debt could potentially
ensnare me in a nightmare of liability even though I was positive I didn't
owe a single dime, I did research on the CFPB website so I could educate
myself on my rights and how to move forward with confidence in disputing
the debt. I followed the CFPB's advice, and I never heard from the
fake-zombie-debt agency again, not even to acknowledge that they received
my certified letter refuting the debt. We need the government to protect
us, not shake us down to feed wealthy interests' insatiable greed. That's
not a business success, that's a crime.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

The CFPB has helped me about 4 times in the last couple of years when I
had credit report issues with what stores were doing. They were reporting
credit accounts that I did not have. I had contacted these particular
stores over and over to no avail. I contacted CFPB and they took care of
it and got them to respond to my issues, saving me more months of
aggravation.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

When I purchased my home everything was so confusing. However, I
distinctly remember a couple of pages that were very clear with what I was
signing. On top it said CFPB. Those papers I trusted. I had read about the
CFPB. Those papers I read carefully. I am so grateful because it provided
clarity in one of the most important parts of my life.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Thank you to everyone who shared. These are just a few of the millions of
hard-working Americans who’ve gotten help from the CFPB.

They deserve to be heard. I’m carrying their words in my heart as I bring
their fight to the U.S. Senate. [ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-cfpbresponse/?source=EMZ24U_FIN_E_20250214_V1S1&t=1007&akid=2491%2E4032634%2EYOjyXD ]If you have a story about the CFPB to
share, please submit yours here.

I appreciate everything you do to make this fight possible.

Elizabeth

Donate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2929?t=1010&akid=2491%2E4032634%2EYOjyXD

Facebook: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=1002&akid=2491%2E4032634%2EYOjyXD
Twitter: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=1003&akid=2491%2E4032634%2EYOjyXD
Instagram: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=1004&akid=2491%2E4032634%2EYOjyXD
YouTube: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=1005&akid=2491%2E4032634%2EYOjyXD

Folks, we’re done licking our wounds.
We’re done feeling sorry for ourselves.
We’re done watching Trump and Elon Musk dismantle our democracy.
This is a fight for our future, and we’re gearing up to win.
_**The road to 2026 starts RIGHT NOW, and we’re working overtime to ensure the Youth Vote is ready to take back Congress.**_
[If you’re with us, chip in $26 right now to help jumpstart the fight for 2026 and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102180143/528354479/-635375887?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWI1ZjM0Ny1iM2ViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uF_1kb-vYIsfhCgCUaIUSK2S89BcnsXtZnVO7LYRUPY=&emci=aa184e24-dfea-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=41b5f347-b3eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=6787172)

In the few weeks since being sworn into office Trump and his crew of MAGA loyalists have made it clear his priorities aren’t with the American people.
And even with their slim majority, congressional Republicans are happily bowing to Trump’s agenda.
_But you already knew that._
What you might not know is that our strategy to take back Congress in 2026 starts t _his year_ with key state elections.
**Virginia’s** statewide elections — including the governor’s race — will likely be a bellwether for next year’s congressional races. And **Pennsylvania’s** State Supreme Court race could be the difference between protections for abortion access and a complete ban.
MAGA extremists in both states will be working overtime to take control and reinforce Trump’s victory. **We’ll be fighting to make sure that doesn’t happen.**
Young voters in Virginia and Pennsylvania will be the key to defeating the MAGA agenda at the state level. Victories in these battleground states will show the nation that the Youth Vote isn’t going to bow down to Trump and Elon. **_That's how we win back Congress._**
But to make those victories possible, we’re going to need your support.
[Our average donation is just $26. If everyone reading this message donated that much right now, we’d hit our fundraising goals before the end of the day. clean_body: | Folks, we’re done licking our wounds. We’re done feeling sorry for ourselves. We’re done watching Trump and Elon Musk dismantle our democracy. This is a fight for our future, and we’re gearing up to win. The road to 2026 starts RIGHT NOW, and we’re working overtime to ensure the Youth Vote is ready to take back Congress. | In the few weeks since being sworn into office Trump and his crew of MAGA loyalists have made it clear his priorities aren’t with the American people. And even with their slim majority, congressional Republicans are happily bowing to Trump’s agenda. But you already knew that. What you might not know is that our strategy to take back Congress in 2026 starts t his year with key state elections. Virginia’s statewide elections — including the governor’s race — will likely be a bellwether for next year’s congressional races. And Pennsylvania’s State Supreme Court race could be the difference between protections for abortion access and a complete ban. MAGA extremists in both states will be working overtime to take control and reinforce Trump’s victory. We’ll be fighting to make sure that doesn’t happen. Young voters in Virginia and Pennsylvania will be the key to defeating the MAGA agenda at the state level. Victories in these battleground states will show the nation that the Youth Vote isn’t going to bow down to Trump and Elon. That's how we win back Congress. But to make those victories possible, we’re going to need your support. | | | | | | Together, NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | = |

clean_body: We’re just hours from the halfway mark for our first mandated Federal Election Commission (FEC) Fundraising Quarter Deadline of the 2025-2026 Election Cycle. | Peter, We’re just hours away from the halfway mark for our first mandated Federal Election Commission (FEC) Fundraising Quarter Deadline of the 2025-2026 Election Cycle. A donation you make ahead of tonight's fundraising deadline will have DOUBLE THE IMPACT compared to a donation made right before our election to defend this MUST-WIN Republican Seat and our Senate Majority. That’s why I want to give you an exclusive behind-the-scenes look at what your 2x IMPACT DONATION will help us plan out for months in advance. 📱 Phonebank operations 🥡 Food for volunteers 📎 Office supplies 🛡️Defense from Leftist attacks 📺 Ads for TV, Radio, and Internet ↑ Ads for Montana’s last Senate race started ONE YEAR OUT If just one of these critical components of our campaign is underfunded, we’re giving the Democrats a significant advantage in this race. Advertising for Montana’s last Senate race started ONE YEAR OUT. Having the flexibility to plan and organize this far out in advance will ensure we have the resources to wage the most aggressive Senate race in the Country. Democrats are already preparing their budgets and target lists to retake the majority. We don’t have the luxury of D.C. lobbyists cutting a blank check. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

Team -
When you make a $5 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC, just know that it helps our work to save lives from gun violence.

name: Bonta HQ
subject: JD Vance misunderstands the Constitution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Whether JD Vance understands the Constitution or not, Rob will hold him and Trump accountable.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250215&t=1&akid=1638%2E1088799%2EBmUQZm)
The Trump administration has overstepped its authority time and time again since retaking office.
Now, Vice President JD Vance seems to misunderstand the separation of powers clearly outlined in the Constitution.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250215?refcode=em20250215-1638&amount=5&refcode2=1638_1088799_BmUQZm&akid=1638%2E1088799%2EBmUQZm)
But Rob is making his message to the administration clear: Judges play an important role in checking the executive branch, and he will keep bringing the administration to court when they break the law.
**Rob will hold Trump, Vance, and their billionaire cronies accountable** to protect the people of California and communities across the country – but he can’t do it alone.
**[That’s why we’re asking you to pitch in $5 or more before our critical mid-month deadline. Your donation will make sure Rob has the support he needs to keep fighting this administration in court.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250215?refcode=em20250215-1638&amount=5&refcode2=1638_1088799_BmUQZm&akid=1638%2E1088799%2EBmUQZm)**

Thank you,
Bonta HQ

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: House Democrats have decided, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102181916/528358183/1517715629?recode=EM_F_250215split_N_HJ_90DO_8_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWI4YjhmMi1iNWViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43ovFd890m6QL_T30ND4bQIoUGXsq16WTLaXUtQLt34=) Unelected, unaccountable and out of control billionaires are buying power and influence in Trump’s Washington, Peter.

**What kind of America are we trying to create?**

Housing costs are too high.
Grocery costs are too high.
Insurance costs are too high.
Childcare costs are too high.
Utility costs are too high.
**America is too expensive, Peter.**

It is **not** acceptable -- in the wealthiest country in the history of the world -- for countless families to be forced to live paycheck to paycheck.

As Trump's Billionaire-First agenda takes shape and his wealthy benefactors claim exclusive access to our democracy, Democrats are the only ones committed to lowering costs for hardworking taxpayers.

**Here's my question for you, Peter:** Are we going to allow Republicans to spend the next four years building a country of the billionaires, by the billionaires and for the billionaires?

**Or are we going to stand together, build a strong foundation to fight back against the greed and corruption of extreme MAGA Republicans and the billionaire class?**

[**Democrats have already decided, Peter: We will not sell out working people, families and seniors to give the ultra-wealthy a tax handout. We can't secure a more affordable future by ourselves. We need your support. name: Brad Finstad
subject: Did you see what Elon said?
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ2v0BGIy40Aggk7Aw3f3Ojd_86HlnwkK4wlX5dS17GxKZrBPebu4zc1Ns8Io)
---

In a recent Oval Office address, Elon Musk, leading the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), emphasized the need to streamline government operations.
Musk stated, "_We are actually trying to be as transparent as possible... all of our actions are maximally transparent_."
Musk is teaming up with President Trump to cut red tape and get America back on track. From slashing burdensome regulations to prioritizing innovation over bureaucracy, this is the type of leadership we need.
But we need your input. **[So please let us know where you stand on draining the swamp and freeing America from excessive government overreach.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ2v0BGIy40Aggk7Aw3f3Ojd_86HlnwkK4wlX5dS17GxKZrBPebu4zc1Ns8Io)****[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ2v0BGIy40AgglLAw6K7nHeD1ZFekgJTmrdq3N8W4-fklkt0GT3Os1LQ9qrM)**[********](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ2v0BGIy40AgglLAw6K7nHeD1ZFekgJTmrdq3N8W4-fklkt0GT3Os1LQ9qrM)

[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ2v0BGIy40Aggk7Aw3f3Ojd_86HlnwkK4wlX5dS17GxKZrBPebu4zc1Ns8Io)
---
| [TAKE THE DOGE POLL NOW](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ2v0BGIy40Aggk7Aw3f3Ojd_86HlnwkK4wlX5dS17GxKZrBPebu4zc1Ns8Io)
---
Thank you,
---

Brad FinstadMinnesota's 1st Congressional District

clean_body: | | | | In a recent Oval Office address, Elon Musk, leading the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), emphasized the need to streamline government operations. Musk stated, "We are actually trying to be as transparent as possible... all of our actions are maximally transparent." Musk is teaming up with President Trump to cut red tape and get America back on track. From slashing burdensome regulations to prioritizing innovation over bureaucracy, this is the type of leadership we need. But we need your input. | Thank you, Brad FinstadMinnesota's 1st Congressional District | | | | | | | PO Box 923, New Ulm, MN 56073

subject: DOGE’s new target is Social Security
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102182357/528359162/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI1OWYxYy1iNmViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kSDT-4JXjnXG8yvNOdySsp9zztcHXoI9ohubARCGaB4=&emci=42259f1c-b6eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=47259f1c-b6eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=13185894) [**Elon Musk's DOGE to target Social Security**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102182359/528359164/1407896248?refcode=email_021525_socialsecurity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI1OWYxYy1iNmViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kSDT-4JXjnXG8yvNOdySsp9zztcHXoI9ohubARCGaB4=) Elon Musk and his crew shuttered USAID. They gained access to the U.S. Department of Treasury's payment system – including personal data. And now, they’re targeting Social Security.

That’s not just dangerous—it sets the stage for an outright attack on the people who worked their whole lives to earn these benefits.

Derek, folks didn’t vote for Elon Musk (with his massive conflicts of interest) and his crew to have control over data and our government. And Western PA sure as hell didn’t vote for our hard-earned benefits to be taken away.

Social Security is a promise this country makes with its citizens: that after a lifetime of hard work, folks have earned the right to retire with dignity. I won’t let that promise be broken. **[In Congress, I’m fighting tooth and nail to protect Social Security and Medicare, pushing back against corporate power, and ensuring our government works for the people—not just powerful robber barons. clean_body: = Elon Musk and his crew shuttered USAID. They gained access to the U.S. Department of Treasury's payment system – including personal data. And now, they’re targeting Social Security. That’s not just dangerous—it sets the stage for an outright attack on the people who worked their whole lives to earn these benefits. Derek, folks didn’t vote for Elon Musk (with his massive conflicts of interest) and his crew to have control over data and our government. And Western PA sure as hell didn’t vote for our hard-earned benefits to be taken away. Social Security is a promise this country makes with its citizens: that after a lifetime of hard work, folks have earned the right to retire with dignity. name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: Here's how Democrats like me are fighting back:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Make no mistake: We are working hard every day to end this nightmare
| | |
---
Friend,

I know that in this endless stream of alarming news from the Trump administration, a lot of folks are feeling unsure about what we can even do right now. **That's why I wanted to personally reach out to share how I'm fighting back alongside my fellow Democrats in the Senate – and what _you_ can do to help us.**
First and foremost, let me just say: I'm in the Senate to make life better for hardworking families, and I'll work with anyone to deliver for Nevada. But with Donald Trump consistently putting his ultra-wealthy allies over everyday Americans, you better believe I'm doing everything I can to stop him.

That's why I'm calling Trump out for giving Elon Musk unprecedented access to Americans' personal information – including Social Security numbers.

And for not doing a _thing_ to help families who have been getting squeezed by the high costs of groceries after campaigning on a promise to lower grocery prices.

And for signing an executive order that would make it harder for Medicare to lower prescription drug prices.

It's also why I've taken to the Senate floor to strongly oppose Trump's recklessly unqualified and dangerously extremist Cabinet nominees – joining my colleagues to speak out against Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s confirmation as Secretary of Health and Human Services and oppose Russell Vought to lead the Office of Management and Budget.
But friend, I need to be blunt with you: **With Trump in the White House and the GOP in control of both chambers of Congress, our power to block the worst parts of their Project 2025 agenda is limited. That's why it's absolutely crucial to take back the Senate next November – and with a steep climb ahead of us, we've got to start building up grassroots resources _now_.**
**But right now, we're still $2,843 short of our mid-month goal, and we've only got a few hours to close the gap before our midnight deadline._[Please, friend, will you chip in $5 or more now to help us lay the groundwork to take back the Senate, stop Trump's Project 2025 agenda, and get back to making progress for you and your family?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102183551/528361982/1850686560?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5455-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzA3NzJhNC1iNmViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N1SThyCEQ5Bfudb8ArsezDGMnmixOAAOJkJEscgvhC8=)_**

clean_body: Make no mistake: We are working hard every day to end this nightmare | | | Friend, I know that in this endless stream of alarming news from the Trump administration, a lot of folks are feeling unsure about what we can even do right now. That's why I wanted to personally reach out to share how I'm fighting back alongside my fellow Democrats in the Senate – and what you can do to help us. First and foremost, let me just say: I'm in the Senate to make life better for hardworking families, and I'll work with anyone to deliver for Nevada. But with Donald Trump consistently putting his ultra-wealthy allies over everyday Americans, you better believe I'm doing everything I can to stop him. That's why I'm calling Trump out for giving Elon Musk unprecedented access to Americans' personal information – including Social Security numbers. And for not doing a thing to help families who have been getting squeezed by the high costs of groceries after campaigning on a promise to lower grocery prices. And for signing an executive order that would make it harder for Medicare to lower prescription drug prices. It's also why I've taken to the Senate floor to strongly oppose Trump's recklessly unqualified and dangerously extremist Cabinet nominees – joining my colleagues to speak out against Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s confirmation as Secretary of Health and Human Services and oppose Russell Vought to lead the Office of Management and Budget. But friend, I need to be blunt with you: With Trump in the White House and the GOP in control of both chambers of Congress, our power to block the worst parts of their Project 2025 agenda is limited. That's why it's absolutely crucial to take back the Senate next November – and with a steep climb ahead of us, we've got to start building up grassroots resources now. But right now, we're still $2,843 short of our mid-month goal, and we've only got a few hours to close the gap before our midnight deadline.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for coming through with your support. **What kind of America are we trying to create?**

Housing costs are too high.
Grocery costs are too high.
Insurance costs are too high.
Childcare costs are too high.
Utility costs are too high.
**America is too expensive.**

It is **not** acceptable – in the wealthiest country in the history of the world – for countless families to be forced to live paycheck to paycheck.

name: Latimer HQ
subject: We’re taking on Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
Elon Musk’s chaotic power grab in Washington is not only unacceptable — it’s an outrage.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=UADLf9Ab1Lwbn%2FdExdfVNH1n4vEnDwUcCAKUhOBA%2FOhekTZVTq2BrUntvzkuAMuUeMJqUHf0cm9syWPAHvoLf2xiCzh43Ya86pirPLRKNqyCxXFlp%2B0H3x3jxSdpxZrELGWWNVVd9UFs3M%2FWLcCqQTLS%2FHmCp3uWFQajeFX3OV34%2Bgi%2Fmh47lHNiRtDwl2B6zQ4Du1XJsNRCUm%2BXpAXK%2FXBse1CqHamRkhMvhRueCVxeBJrMa9WUmDoXEpve3lUUcHpS68l1Eina7RCbWXwJRnfqVKfpMQ98n5N4Xr8wLAxyfTKBnkjVn%2BLW9e9IyBS1z3%2Fi0PzpD%2Fi2qUaSXXHg7FlgVFzv3ArDgd%2FYR3iBynyMkv0jv1Rsr4EY4HfScL4Tl5v4rSz7Ykm150B1%2Bu4iQ%2Fe7%2FDmdWsHauRsLBHKgG9pwcMXz8dsSHJdxI%2FpALJZJ)
---
| |
---
Peter, it’s Latimer HQ. If you’re anything like us, witnessing Elon Musk’s chaotic power grab in Washington is not only unacceptable — it’s an outrage. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, it’s Latimer HQ. Team,

This open GOP House seat is in play—and can be flipped red to blue in less than 50 days. Let me explain.

We have a rare opportunity to stop Trump from ripping up the Constitution and trampling law and order: Democrats have *_overperformed_ * in special elections like this one.

Trump’s approval rating is dropping quickly as he continues to attack workers and undermine the rule of law. And Elon Musk has been allowed to run rampant throughout the Oval Office, acting as an unelected Shadow President.

All of this means that **if we do the work to boost Democratic turnout, persuade undecided voters, and register new voters, we can win this thing**._

Your support—right now—is the key to winning this election._**

Friend, can I rely on you to help us keep this incredible momentum going?**

name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m a Democrat, Derek.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
My team says we’re about $2,200 short of our February mid-month goal.
#
Hey Derek, it’s John. 👋
I’m reaching out because my team says we’re about $2,200 short of our February mid-month goal, and I’m hoping you can help us make up the difference before midnight. [**Will you pitch in $5 here if you can?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250215?refcode=em20250215-9905&refcode2=9905_434096_6PXNH3&akid=9905%2E434096%2E6PXNH3) 🙏
I know some folks want to make me out to be the next Joe Manchin or Kyrsten Sinema just because I took a couple of meetings with Republicans.
**But I’m a Democrat, and that’s not changing. Period.** I’m fighting for the same things I always have:
* Health care access for EVERYONE
* The union way of life
* Equal rights for LGBTQ+ folks
* The freedom for women to make their own health care decisions

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Why USAID is in Elon Musk’s crosshairs
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
They’re slashing essential government programs as quickly as they can to lay the groundwork for a massive, trillion dollar tax cut for billionaires and corporations.
#

Team — Mark Kelly here.
About 40 years ago, I was on a ship carrying food assistance to Egypt. It was a goodwill mission, part of our foreign policy in the 1980s.
It’s a mission that’s very familiar to the thousands and thousands of Americans who have served with USAID since it was established in the 1960s. There are millions of people around the world who were fed, clothed, given medical care, educated, or otherwise supported by USAID in the 60 years since.
Foreign aid — much of which passes through USAID — is less than 1% of our budget. For that investment we do an enormous amount of good in the world, and we keep our own nation safe by preventing pandemics and conflict.
By now, most of you have heard that Elon Musk and the Trump administration are dismantling USAID. It’s a bad move, and I want to be clear about this: They’ll be held accountable, one way or another.
But the bigger question of why this is happening — why foreign assistance, why USAID, with all of the good it accomplishes — is essential to consider. **They’re slashing essential government programs as quickly as they can to lay the groundwork for a massive, trillion-dollar tax cut for billionaires and corporations.**
The White House and Elon Musk are flooding the zone with outrageous, illegal, and unconstitutional actions to try and keep us off balance. But we’re fighting back in the Senate with every tool available to us, and lawsuits challenging these actions are rising through the courts at a rapid pace.
They want us off balance, but I am holding my ground. They want you to feel powerless, but you are not. They want us to think they have full control, but the rule of law still exists.
I am not going to back down, but it’s going to take all of us doing what we can to push back.
[**So, please. If you can, chip in $3 or anything you can afford to support my work. It’d mean a lot to have you with me.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-feb25/.w4QhX4&refcode=em250215-1-f&t=1&akid=5970%2E6688874%2Eua8Ieo)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-feb25/.XxstsR&refcode=em250215-1-f&t=20&akid=5970%2E6688874%2Eua8Ieo)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-feb25/.rnlvy0&refcode=em250215-1-f&t=21&akid=5970%2E6688874%2Eua8Ieo)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-feb25/.BpgaxC&refcode=em250215-1-f&t=22&akid=5970%2E6688874%2Eua8Ieo)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-feb25/.KIksq4&refcode=em250215-1-f&t=23&akid=5970%2E6688874%2Eua8Ieo)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-feb25/.pLTcAh&refcode=em250215-1-f&t=24&akid=5970%2E6688874%2Eua8Ieo)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-feb25/.2Qo7_e&refcode=em250215-1-f&t=25&akid=5970%2E6688874%2Eua8Ieo)**
---
****
Hold fast, we’ll get through this.
Thank you,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=5970%2E6688874%2Eua8Ieo).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/187b040a-cf8a-4267-b501-1ccd55124bc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
Let me tell you something, folks, in the realm of cutting government down to size, Elon Musk isn't just playing the game; he's rewriting the rules with DOGE. In a time when our government's belly seems to grow larger with every passing fiscal year, here comes Musk, wielding DOGE like a scalpel to trim the fat, the waste, and the downright nonsensical spending.
First off, let's talk about the frivolous government waste that Musk has his sights set on; the kind of spending that makes you wonder if our tax dollars are being used to sponsor a circus rather than uphold a nation. Take, for instance, the absurdity of sending condoms to Gaza. I mean, really? While our borders are in shambles and veterans are neglected, we're out here promoting safe sex abroad? Musk, through his DOGE initiative, has been vocal about pulling the plug on these misadventures in federal spending.
But it's not just about the pennies; it's about the ideological overreach. Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) programs abroad, transgender musicals and operas - these aren't just line items in a budget; they're emblematic of a government that's lost its way. Musk has made it clear that under his watch, DOGE will ensure these programs don't just get a trim; they get a reality check. Why should American taxpayers fund what amounts to ideological theater on the global stage?
Now, let's touch on something even more mind boggling - funding sex change surgeries in Guatemala. If that doesn't scream "government overreach," I don't know what does. Musk's approach with DOGE is about returning to the core functions of government, not underwriting every social experiment under the sun.
But here's where the media, in their infinite wisdom, decides to twist the narrative. They accuse Musk of "lack of transparency." Transparency? With DOGE, Musk has opened the government's books like never before. There's an X account called "DOGE" that lays out everything - every discovery, every action taken against wasteful and ideological spending. This level of openness is unprecedented in the annals of government accountability.
_**Now, a brief word from our sponsor (Piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Presented By 4Patriots](https://substack.com/redirect/167bf016-6b5c-4dce-ae14-3656c10035de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **SHOCKING REPORT: CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/167bf016-6b5c-4dce-ae14-3656c10035de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**FBI's Urgent Warning Has Been All Over The News**_
Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown.
Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also targeting attacks on our city water systems.
Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we trust to keep us safe.
Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.
Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink.
We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants.
Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom...
**But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.**
If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether.
It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes.
Mistakes like... **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.**
If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.
**Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.**
Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.
Well we have great news to share. Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released...
**NEW AND IMPROVED...**
**[The Ultimate Water Filtration System!](https://substack.com/redirect/167bf016-6b5c-4dce-ae14-3656c10035de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**But hurry - we have limited stock, and these Ultimate Water Filtration Systems are first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.**
**[Get Your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems](https://substack.com/redirect/167bf016-6b5c-4dce-ae14-3656c10035de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**
[Shop Now](https://substack.com/redirect/167bf016-6b5c-4dce-ae14-3656c10035de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dc0f00c6-a5fc-4d78-aec5-1c044384f8ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**(Continued)**_
Let's not forget, the very essence of DOGE is transparency. Unlike the opaque dealings of yesteryear's bureaucrats, DOGE operates in the sunlight. Every tweet, every post, tells a story of how our money is being spent, or rather, how it's being saved from being misspent.
Yet, the media, perhaps out of fear, ignorance, or malice chooses to criticize rather than commend. They fail to see that Musk, through DOGE, isn't just cutting government; he's redefining it. He's pushing for a government that's lean, focused, and devoid of the ideological baggage that weighs down our future.
Now, the media is even trying to drive a wedge between President Trump and Musk in a desperate attempt to stop DOGE's progress. We see headlines and quips like "President Musk" aimed at manipulating Trump to turn on Musk. I hate to break it to you, but both of these gentlemen are far too smart for those sorts of games, and they already see right through it.
What Musk is doing with DOGE isn't just about reducing government size; it's about restoring government sanity. It's about ensuring that when we talk about taxpayer money, we're talking about roads, schools, and security, not about funding the latest avant-garde opera in Paris or a condom drive in conflict zones.
Elon Musk, through DOGE, has become the steward we never knew we needed but desperately deserve. He's not just fighting the good fight; he's winning it, one transparent X post at a time. And let me tell you, America, this is one battle where we all come out on top.
* * *

body:
| | | Y'all...Ohio and Florida. **Ohio and freakin' Florida!**

As pissed as I am that Trump and his followers are back in charge, they could be giving us two HUGE chances to take back the Senate.

Putting JD Vance's and Marco Rubio's seats up for grabs in special elections? I mean, they might as well be handing us a personalized invitation to get right back in this!
