name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c8bb54166aec4cf3b2c3155ae3af71bb&_e=jrERgGV9xiEY7jVUF-4HdK-tz18hFTfBck2dKhCw9h6FhLFJP4TfJ-x7vlWggUDOQqyVWD8FHIyY6GmHoC0JpRXbhO0QsTFDROvpaITZ2Wr8kj2lVHNCkP24poWmgf0EiAZF39YASHQoI9JywBOI3Y1X7Y5zcNVtkPoXbI2cHjFc9-Hj0svNzP6bAUvUeF9FkO665iokk7lLzzoKQJTiPl_NDzOqhYGvpMP75ium8Xb-a5r_U8BfNMeKovXmSTx5UCACFvg_k5nx7pvfUa7vM65hUkHtwUoHRvb_6pelWl8juUVg8i7XMPRoahES_-qkfzoNe_BHiQnjNOf4WKIJi-QVQOxj24WX_YVCfKTVBH5C0gwiWRblZk7C7pjxlJeNk29DyLSCg_u0P2J8mGRFpmfwEh4ThK3ZXvxx3m5LHgcERWSgWxJpVQx53Gd3nWNc)
---
| | Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c8bb54166aec4cf3b2c3155ae3af71bb&_e=jrERgGV9xiEY7jVUF-4HdK-tz18hFTfBck2dKhCw9h6FhLFJP4TfJ-x7vlWggUDOQqyVWD8FHIyY6GmHoC0JpRXbhO0QsTFDROvpaITZ2Wr8kj2lVHNCkP24poWmgf0EiAZF39YASHQoI9JywBOI3Y1X7Y5zcNVtkPoXbI2cHjFc9-Hj0svNzP6bAUvUeF9FkO665iokk7lLzzoKQJTiPl_NDzOqhYGvpMP75ium8Xb-a5r_U8BfNMeKovXmSTx5UCACFvg_k5nx7pvfUa7vM7rzKxMYbgx2rYGGt0tEqBK5Wds3mZz446e5w3q0Ml5X87Zue7YzZYGIpVqxgvzuylgoJnMNmIlJaeC6xgeP0hPKV8qzM0D_48T-sDMKt-1-BFXAfAL00Lh-igU0SXvfkC6WWMNts8MWK3jSLkK9g6hBlGAgPisfIINIwf_8wvqE)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c8bb54166aec4cf3b2c3155ae3af71bb&_e=jrERgGV9xiEY7jVUF-4HdK-tz18hFTfBck2dKhCw9h6FhLFJP4TfJ-x7vlWggUDOQqyVWD8FHIyY6GmHoC0JpRXbhO0QsTFDROvpaITZ2Wr8kj2lVHNCkP24poWmgf0EiAZF39YASHQoI9JywBOI3Y1X7Y5zcNVtkPoXbI2cHjFc9-Hj0svNzP6bAUvUeF9FkO665iokk7lLzzoKQJTiPl_NDzOqhYGvpMP75ium8Xb-a5r_U8BfNMeKovXmSTx5UCACFvg_k5nx7pvfUa7vM6ZPqE93lRs3Tguod_LRBOOL8NuVkyCMClnZmuq7EikpuycPGEqx_NLaKESw3kUOshOohU6hrQR-DUqsTQOtK6J37ZcCanIb9ngiB3jwRQcwk9AtYpROzcOBn7_emKC9l76fOFbqIwOArGwJ-fY77AIte7iXxqwfGgggJdZbEaNJ)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c8bb54166aec4cf3b2c3155ae3af71bb&_e=jrERgGV9xiEY7jVUF-4HdK-tz18hFTfBck2dKhCw9h6FhLFJP4TfJ-x7vlWggUDOQqyVWD8FHIyY6GmHoC0JpRXbhO0QsTFDROvpaITZ2Wr8kj2lVHNCkP24poWmgf0EiAZF39YASHQoI9JywBOI3Y1X7Y5zcNVtkPoXbI2cHjFc9-Hj0svNzP6bAUvUeF9FkO665iokk7lLzzoKQJTiPl_NDzOqhYGvpMP75ium8Xb-a5r_U8BfNMeKovXmSTx5UCACFvg_k5nx7pvfUa7vM3I36RyEy5trmOakCo7MjcF1D8CdgYASvmA-NurjS4Fb2A7Wsocv8vxqKXHEbSQXeqwJRkH5KXZPoFYLgyiWSPW75lF4OS3EUuIX9tt_xa6I8YXAhu7TO7PL9LmeyZ34o0q6nvnrjOXn-1DVdZnrk_9RKUAG41eLQgXfg8BNyPwA).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: We Can Take Back Our State!
body:
Are You With Us?
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
| | |
---
| | Peter,
The last thirty days have been amazing for our country. President Trump has been righting the wrongs of the last four years in record time.
No more gay pride flags brandished on government buildings, no more flushing taxpayer dollars down the toilet for the sake of promoting a worldwide woke agenda, and no more persecuting and prosecuting innocent Americans.
Nationwide, citizens are boldly emerging from the shadows to embrace common sense and patriotism. Here in Colorado, however, we are still trying to pull our state out of the rut of ruin, which is difficult when lawmakers are committed to voting for destructive policies.
Coloradans who have lived here for generations can no longer afford housing, groceries, or the barrage of government fees.
Our tax dollars are squandered on wasteful projects and regulations that destroy economic growth, industry, and opportunity.
We are being forced to surrender the most beautiful landscape in the world to the elites, but the Rocky Mountain Voice refuses to give up on our state or the truth. Our people deserve to hear both sides of the story.
Our mission is to be the news source that calls out politicians who vote for detrimental policies and trade our freedom for personal gain.
Across our country, we are seeing an awakening, and with your gift of [$25, $50, or even $250](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), we can spread that trend in our communities.
We amplify _your_ voice and _your_ values in our news stories and podcasts, putting the truth and the citizen first. Will you [contribute](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to our efforts and help us turn the tide in Colorado?
---
[Turn the Tide!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
| | |
---
| | | **For Colorado,**
**Heidi Ganahl** **CEO, Rocky Mountain Voice**

clean_body: Are You With Us? | | | | | | | | | Peter, The last thirty days have been amazing for our country. President Trump has been righting the wrongs of the last four years in record time. No more gay pride flags brandished on government buildings, no more flushing taxpayer dollars down the toilet for the sake of promoting a worldwide woke agenda, and no more persecuting and prosecuting innocent Americans. Nationwide, citizens are boldly emerging from the shadows to embrace common sense and patriotism. Here in Colorado, however, we are still trying to pull our state out of the rut of ruin, which is difficult when lawmakers are committed to voting for destructive policies. Coloradans who have lived here for generations can no longer afford housing, groceries, or the barrage of government fees. Our tax dollars are squandered on wasteful projects and regulations that destroy economic growth, industry, and opportunity. We are being forced to surrender the most beautiful landscape in the world to the elites, but the Rocky Mountain Voice refuses to give up on our state or the truth. Our people deserve to hear both sides of the story. Our mission is to be the news source that calls out politicians who vote for detrimental policies and trade our freedom for personal gain. Across our country, we are seeing an awakening, and with your gift of , we can spread that trend in our communities. We amplify your voice and your values in our news stories and podcasts, putting the truth and the citizen first. Will you to our efforts and help us turn the tide in Colorado? | | | | | | For Colorado, Heidi Ganahl CEO, Rocky Mountain Voice | | P.S. name: Newsletter via Our Revolution
subject: Nobody Elected Elon Musk. Bernie joins us on Capitol Hill - the climate fightback begins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Fight Trump & The Oligarchs | Stop Elon Musk | The Climate
Fightback Begins | Making Democrats a True Opposition Party | New
Endorsement! | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

NOBODY ELECTED ELON MUSK. The world’s richest man is illegally rifling
through our government for ways to cut programs like Medicaid and Social
Security — in order to pay for trillions in tax cuts for the ultra
wealthy! It’s sick.

Protests are popping up in D.C. and across the country. Our movement is
mounting a massive opposition to this brazen corporate coup. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21529?t=1011&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Get your
"Nobody Voted For Elon" sticker now and help fund our work!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Trump is unleashing vicious attacks on crucial social programs, vulnerable
communities, our very democracy, and the planet. It can feel overwhelming,
but we are not powerless — and we are not alone.

Our Revolution is building out our Citizen Action Team — our growing
grassroots army with networks in Washington, D.C. and every congressional
district in the country.

The team met on Thursday for our first first strategy and training
session, and we’re already planning actions and developing tools to fight
back against Trump and the Oligarchs.

There will be opportunities to leverage our movement in the upcoming
budget and tax fights in Congress — as well as influence the Democratic
Party to present a unified opposition.

Now is the time we need every person of conscience to get involved —
there’s something everyone can do to help, big or small. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20584?t=1012&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Sign up to be
part of the Citizen Action Team, and we’ll loop you in on our next
meeting!

★ ★ ★

Trump has forged an unholy alliance between Big Oil and Big Tech to ravage
our planet — but we are not powerless.

This week, we kicked off actions with our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21530?t=1013&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]LIVE Climate Town Hall Monday
night — zeroing in on the legislative and budget fights ahead where we’ll
have leverage to fight the worst of Trump and the Oil Oligarchs’ agenda.

Our coalition is joining forces to block Trump’s money pipeline to Big
Oil. Leading climate organizers joined the call like Aru Shiney-Ajay of
Sunrise Movement, Erich Pica of Friends of the Earth, and Jaime Minden of
Zero Hour.

While we go on the offense, we’ll also stand with Greenpeace USA as they
defend free speech and the right to dissent. Tim Donaghy said Greenpeace
will share weekly videos of their trial, starting Feb. 24th, as they
battle a lawsuit trying to silence activism and opposition.

★ ★ ★

The strategy: Target the budget reconciliation process in March with a
demand to end fossil fuel subsidies. “We can’t keep drinking out of the
firehose,” said Our Revolution leader Joseph Geevarghese.

We have a chance to strike a blow against the oil and gas industry and
also hit oil executives in a way that undermines Trump’s entire platform.
But, we’ll need Democrats to hold the line. Read more in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21531?t=1014&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]The New
Republic.

On Wednesday, we [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21532?t=1015&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Rallied on Capitol Hill with Bernie Sanders, Ilhan
Omar and our Coalition to End Polluter Handouts to launch a fight to stop
our tax dollars from funding climate destruction.

People are experiencing the devastation of climate change right now. As
Bernie said: “If we don’t cut carbon emissions and stop giving polluters
huge tax breaks and corporate welfare, the planet we will be leaving
future generations will be less and less habitable.

Our event attracted a lot of press to get our message out and also
featured powerful testimony by climate allies like Sens. Ed Markey and
Chris Van Hollen, Robert Weissman of Public Citizen, Rev. Lennox Yearwood
of the Hip Hop Caucus.

Learn more and sign the petition at [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21533?t=1016&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]EndPolluterHandouts.org

★ ★ ★

As the Trump Administration attacks clean energy and environmental
programs, community-owned clean energy projects are more important than
ever.

When we organize, we can fight to protect the good green jobs, cleaner
air, and lower energy costs created by Direct Pay and other programs from
Biden’s Inflation Reduction Act.

This week, the Congressional Progressive Caucus Center joined Organized
Power in Numbers to release a new report — [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21572?t=1017&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Building Equity with Direct
Pay: Seizing the Moment for Racial Justice, Community Ownership, and
Worker Power.

This report shares success stories from the first two years of
implementation and what has been learned — including the importance of
investing in organizing, technical assistance, centering workers and
racial justice, and filling the gap on financing.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21573?t=1018&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]If you can, chip in a donation of any amount to help fund our climate
fightback against Trump and the Oil Oligarchs. Thank you!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

BEATING BACK THE PARTY ELITE

To defeat Trump and the Oligarchs, we need a true Opposition Party that
isn’t bought by the billionaires.

That’s why Our Revolution organized to beat back the Political
Establishment - and its billionaire backers - to help elect Ken Martin as
the new chair of the Democratic National Committee.

Ken - chair of the Minnesota state party - defeated his main rival who was
backed by Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer, and bankrolled by billionaires
like Reid Hoffman and ‘liberal’ dark money groups.

We hosted the only grassroots DNC Candidate Forum of the race, flooded the
voting members with calls, and rallied in-person at the DNC Election — and
it worked. Our voices were heard, but we have more work to do to steer the
Democratic Party away from corporate control and recenter the working
class.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21444?t=1019&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Our Revolution is one of the only grassroots political groups doing
this work inside the party. Can you chip in to help us keep up the
pressure for change?

★ ★ ★

And, we have to keep up the pressure on elected Democrats to HOLD THE
LINE. This week, Senate Dems voted in lockstep against Robert F. Kennedy
Jr., Tulsi Gabbard, and other Trump nominees. But that hasn’t been the
case in recent weeks!

It was totally unacceptable that Democratic Senators like John Fetterman,
Kirsten Gillibrand, and others voted YES on dangerous, far-right nominees
like Marco Rubio for State Department, fracking CEO Chris Wright for
Department of Energy, and more.

We are organizing citizens across our Republic to stand up to Trump’s
corrupt regime, and we’re demanding a unified opposition from the
Democratic leaders.

Collaboration is unacceptable. We must stand united to stop the slide into
authoritarian capitalism. Add your name at the link below, we’ll deliver
the message straight to Senate offices and keep up the temperature with a
flood of calls into the Senate.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21442?t=1020&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]TELL YOUR SENATORS TO REJECT TRUMP NOMINEES

★ ★ ★

With our impact on the direction of new DNC leadership, we now have a
foothold to push for real change in the party.

So far, more than 10,000 grassroots volunteers, donors and local leaders
have signed on demanding these necessary reforms. It’s time for the
Democratic Party to reject corporate money, increase transparency and
rebuild a multiracial, working-class base. Let’s get to work!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21147?t=1021&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]SIGN THE PETITION

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

NEW ENDORSEMENT!

Our first endorsement of 2025, Our Revolution is proud to support Aisha
Braveboy in a special election March 4th for County Executive in Prince
George's County, Maryland.

This is a big year for down-ballot elections — and we need candidates like
Aisha who will help make our communities more resilient under Trump and
our state and local governments more responsive to We the People.

Aisha has been a champion of raising the minimum wage, criminal justice
reform, and preserving our environment. As State’s Attorney for Prince
George’s County, Braveboy ended cash bail and created the state’s first
conviction integrity review unit — which led to the release of seven
people sentenced to life as juveniles.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Oligarchy is no longer at the gate, it’s busting through the door — and we
need our movement to be activated. Our Citizen Action Team is 30,000
strong and growing, and we’re organizing in every Congressional district
in the country.

This means getting in the streets, showing up in Senate offices, raising
the pressure through media and targeted actions, and mounting a public
show of force that cannot be ignored.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20584?t=1022&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]JOIN OUR CITIZEN ACTION TEAM!

★ ★ ★

We’re mobilizing a Citizen Army of grassroots activists to fight back
against Trump and the Oligarchs, seizing the reins of the Democratic
Party, and electing the next generation in hundreds of down-ballot races
across the country.

We have a 3-point plan to Defeat Trump & the Oligarchs, Transform the
Democratic Party, and Elect Progressives up and down the ballot in 2025.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21444?t=1023&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]It’s up to us to create a well-organized and effective opposition to
the Trump regime. We are not powerless in this moment, but we need your
help! Please pitch in a donation to help fund our fightback.

★ ★ ★

NOBODY VOTED FOR ELON MUSK. The world’s richest man is illegally rifling
through our government for ways to cut programs like Medicaid and Social
Security — in order to pay for trillions in tax cuts for the ultra
wealthy! It’s sick.

Protests are popping up in D.C. and across the country. Our movement is
mounting a massive opposition to this brazen corporate coup. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21529?t=1024&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Get your
"Nobody Voted For Elon" sticker now and help fund our work!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17429?t=1025&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=revreport._Ro8z9&t=1007&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport.T4WXik&t=1008&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=revreport.Wps0N4&t=1009&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=revreport.HCFlph&t=1010&akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7717%2E5885482%2E1hXwqd

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

name: GOP Polls
subject: President Trump’s bold new plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Do you support this?

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-0UICFMrnSZxSOsPg)
---
Peter, President Trump has unveiled his latest BOLD plan for America, showing just how serious he is about National Security.

He has proposed constructing our very own Iron Dome missile defense system. This would be a major step forward and send our enemies a message that we are ready for anything. **[Now, we need to hear YOUR opinion on this new plan. Do you agree with President Trump’s latest National Security plan?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Jg)**
---
[ TAKE THE POLL](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-WeMh6mDAFlnFq3mD1g)
---
Thank you for your answer,GOP Polls

subject: I’m a target in 2026

body:
Here’s why

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102189500/528374240/-1347152751?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM3_250215_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQ1YzNiZi1iZWViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iE3VARmmkC8VIZWRb7KWekRY2x7CpqFefzTnTcK4Q6s=) Derek,

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**_chip in to my re-election campaign before our big fundraising deadline at midnight tonight,_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102189505/528374244/-1347152751?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM3_250215_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQ1YzNiZi1iZWViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iE3VARmmkC8VIZWRb7KWekRY2x7CpqFefzTnTcK4Q6s=) but first, I want to tell you why I’m a target for defeat in 2026.

Yes, it’s true that the Republican Senate campaign committee believes they can secure 55 Senate seats in 2026, and that they can do so by defeating me in the Commonwealth. That’s alarming in itself.

**But the _real_ reason I’m a target is simple: I’m not afraid to speak out.**

I’m not afraid to speak out about how our unelected co-president is gutting federal agencies and – no shocker here – prioritizing cutting those that regulate his companies.

The richest man in the world is using the federal government to promote his business interests. Public service is about strengthening our communities, NOT enriching yourself.

**I refuse to stand idly by while our unelected co-president dismantles our federal government and rebuilds it for himself. So I’m speaking out, Derek, and that makes me a target.**

Elon Musk spent $288 million _last year alone_ to elect Republicans. We have no idea what he’s prepared to spend in 2026, but it’s a safe bet to assume that 1. it’s going to be A LOT. And 2: it’s going to be used to take down Senators like me who are holding him accountable in the public arena for his destruction every step of the way.

[_**We have to be ready. So I’m asking: will you chip in anything you can to help us prepare for the onslaught coming in name: Dave McCormick
subject: More lies from the Left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
Please read this full message
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=66821c2f22de4d41acb822b210516826&_e=RANGC-FSYZxByKa3bsX2WNntYJTNZZHHMOcq-A_0zemKz04jVWRu885sIh9N_ipWKKxQ3HHiq0sJsHkD8tqCKev6CksTyoxs2_FM2jJ9eE7MY2br96O8GezkmG6iJRtPrB_NKqhbkOhUPiiuo-O7a8FBU7hKRKlTXddemC1ZrKCK-twYITXZcwLPjnayDqhVEl-TWe1KlVvUH7XbjUXL_3tmTbA74dH9sJyI9TbLP17qPLTP1l_IbjrVnIiF8sflRtHY54kJItlml8Sat4NMBHhI1j-EfEaJtkoJV1Hq243bSw813O_EarisLJBSMTQAOBvysHk2G2CJ06ABTZZaOOBkJhqRtUo7u55eC7mmE85Z33slfoV-qtJ1BghQ47EOFWAsyjhZGgjRrWhHSjbP_Jjotijspb-arq26f0G-Ki0%3D)

Peter ,

**At West Point, we had a code: cadets don't lie, cheat, steal, or tolerate those who do. **

_In just a few short weeks, the new administration and Congressional majorities have exposed an egregious amount of WASTE, FRAUD, and ABUSE of taxpayer dollars that has gone UNCHECKED**until now.**_

I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election.

I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day.

**But the entrenched political class is terrified that we are uncovering their decades-long grift of lies and stealing from taxpayers.** **[They are doing everything they can to stop us and I WON'T TOLERATE IT.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=66821c2f22de4d41acb822b210516826&_e=RANGC-FSYZxByKa3bsX2WNntYJTNZZHHMOcq-A_0zemKz04jVWRu885sIh9N_ipWKKxQ3HHiq0sJsHkD8tqCKev6CksTyoxs2_FM2jJ9eE7MY2br96O8GezkmG6iJRtPrB_NKqhbkOhUPiiuo-O7a8FBU7hKRKlTXddemC1ZrKCK-twYITXZcwLPjnayDqhVEl-TWe1KlVvUH7XbjUXL_3tmTbA74dH9sJyI9TbLP17qPLTP1l_IbjrVnIiF8sflRtHY54kJItlml8Sat4NMBDDAAZas3CHB3peSfLzOdX58sxYtFI6RNjK-IS_dWzc5T3ldSqVLNVjSQFcF6wjKVw4Nlwc8aN9FNFwxt7U42o36MZUCd8pCH3C4lIF70c5loqVADWw3VR2ZV4lWTX6p2wPAA-F4N7YJiq4AAZyR-aQ%3D)**

**This is a long message and I hope you will read all the way to the end.**

I grew up in Bloomsburg, Pennsylvania. We lived on campus at Bloomsburg State College and my parents owned a farm ten minutes down the road.

I had summer jobs baling hay and trimming Christmas trees at nearby farms.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=66821c2f22de4d41acb822b210516826&_e=RANGC-FSYZxByKa3bsX2WNntYJTNZZHHMOcq-A_0zemKz04jVWRu885sIh9N_ipWKKxQ3HHiq0sJsHkD8tqCKev6CksTyoxs2_FM2jJ9eE7MY2br96O8GezkmG6iJRtPrB_NKqhbkOhUPiiuo-O7a8FBU7hKRKlTXddemC1ZrKCK-twYITXZcwLPjnayDqhVEl-TWe1KlVvUH7XbjUXL_3tmTbA74dH9sJyI9TbLP17qPLTP1l_IbjrVnIiF8sflRtHY54kJItlml8Sat4NMBOW395KHGSMcqxfB3tnDkUXBZowouwwxx_-indDgkvn1WzPEYs0ZfhqgSwb9fwInwFBfRuBC5tZsu694lAaYUKFTORPV7z8TnKOysgre5QbR2m1-xtLxwmHrmuqDnK5UMvJZIWy_HzfrGMWkfuWxb7s%3D)

clean_body: Please read this full message Peter , At West Point, we had a code: cadets don't lie, cheat, steal, or tolerate those who do. In just a few short weeks, the new administration and Congressional majorities have exposed an egregious amount of WASTE, FRAUD, and ABUSE of taxpayer dollars that has gone UNCHECKEDuntil now. I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election. I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day. But the entrenched political class is terrified that we are uncovering their decades-long grift of lies and stealing from taxpayers. This is a long message and I hope you will read all the way to the end. I grew up in Bloomsburg, Pennsylvania. We lived on campus at Bloomsburg State College and my parents owned a farm ten minutes down the road. I had summer jobs baling hay and trimming Christmas trees at nearby farms. My dad started his career teaching history, economics, & democracy at Punxsutawney High. My mom began teaching fourth through sixth graders at a public school near Pittsburgh. I'm incredibly proud that my dad was chosen to be president of Bloomsburg State College (now Bloomsburg University) at only 34 years old. I'm so proud of my parents' teaching careers and to have been raised in Bloomsburg. It was there that I wrestled and played football and was nominated to the U.S. Military Academy at West Point. And it was there that I came home to a parade after serving in combat during the Gulf War. After the Army, I earned a Ph.D. in international relations before moving to Pittsburgh to start a career in business. I worked my way up to become the CEO of FreeMarkets, a successful tech startup that employed hundreds in Western Pennsylvania. I was then called to service again, this time in the highest levels of government as Under Secretary of Treasury and as Deputy National Security Advisor. Following this, I joined Bridgewater Associates, one of the largest, most successful investment firms in the world, which manages the pension plans of groups including teachers, firefighters and law enforcement. I have lived the American Dream. When I ran for the U.S. Senate to bring my decades of experience and love for our country to fix our broken economy that is a direct result of policies supported by the far left, I became a national target for outright LIES from mainstream media outlets like The New York Times and CNN. I have been asked why I ran for political office. I opened myself and my family up to attacks from the left, and every day felt like a battle. But I believe in America 's strength and resilience. And I believe our nation needs leaders who place service to others above all else. Thanks to the support of TENS OF THOUSANDS of grassroots patriots, I was able to fight back against the lies with the TRUTH about my life and business record. I'm no stranger to fighting for what is right and if we don 't continue pushing every single day to clean up the mess the career politicians made, we will lose America as we know it! Here's where I need your help, Peter . We need to combat the Democrats ' lies and attacks with the TRUTH about how American tax dollars are being spent. I hate asking for money -- I'm not a career politician, and it's not in my nature -- but I have no choice but to ask if we're going to hit our fundraising goal this month. The Democrats know if they lose ground to the outsiders working to bring CHANGE, it will be IMPOSSIBLE for Democrats to take back their majority in the next election. That's why I'm hoping you can spare Your donation will take us one step closer to bringing the CHANGE Americans voted for in November, and I am so grateful for your support. Thank you, Dave McCormick P.S. Democrats from all over the country are panicking and pulling out all the stops to attack Republicans who are shaking up Washington. Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick. Our mailing address is: PO BOX 23537 PITTSBURGH, PA 15222

name: VoteVets
subject: Word of the day: Enshitification
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
In the tech world, enshitification is the gradual degradation of online platforms over time to extract maximum value for shareholders. In this case, it’s a gradual reduction in the quality of services Veterans depend on over time in an effort to push privatization.
#
Peter —
The Trump administration is making a huge effort to convince the public that they’re not doing anything that might harm Veterans.
And, to be frank, it’s complete BS.
Just to start, nobody has forgotten Trump’s insults to the fallen, the wounded, and everyone who wore the uniform. “Suckers” and “losers” isn’t going to wash off, Donnie.
But let’s go through a quick list:
House Republicans put out their budget starter this week, and within: Services to Veterans on the chopping block. Massive cuts to SNAP — when 1 in 20 Veterans receive SNAP benefits. Massive cuts to Medicaid — when 1 in 4 Veterans qualify for Medicaid.
Elon Musk is working to kill the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau — which fielded 100,000 consumer complaints every month from Veterans and Active Duty. They’re laying off the people protecting our Troops and Veterans from financial scams.
Trump’s order to freeze funding might have been paused by a federal court, but here in the real world there are rampant reports of impacts to the VA, and to Veterans benefits. Clinics shut down for lack of funding, researchers told to stop work, indiscriminate cuts and mass firings.
And just two days ago, Trump and Elon gave 1000 VA employees their notice. 1000 VA employees, fired.
There’s actually a word for this, and it was coined by the same tech bros that Trump’s letting run the government: **Enshitification.**
In the tech world, enshitification is the gradual degradation of online platforms over time to extract maximum value for shareholders. In this case, it’s a gradual reduction in the quality of services Veterans depend on over time in an effort to push privatization.
**Privatization of the VA is their end goal.** Always has been. But fortunately, we’ve got some experience with this.
VoteVets has swatted down efforts by the GOP to privatize the VA for decades. We’ve beaten them back every time. What it takes to get this done is a united front — and it’s critical you stick with us.
[**We’re asking you to chip in $5 so that we can fight every effort from Trump, Musk, and the GOP to privatize the VA. We can beat them again, but only if we do it together.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250215-1-f&t=1&akid=34170%2E3013755%2EiAPLG9)

name: MAGA SUPPORT TRACKER [From Team Scalise]
subject: Should we call it quits?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
But we’ve been trying to get ahold of you for DAYS.

| |
---
| | | **Should we call it quits?**

We can't afford to lose you, Peter. But we've been trying to get ahold of you for DAYS. The Democrat Machine is ready to pounce.

_As you read this, House Democrats are behind closed doors scheming to IMPEACH our 47th President and destroy his second term. _

name: Jimmy Patronis [FL-01 Special Election GOP Nominee]
subject: As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, Jan 28th…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House.
I’m officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.
| |
---
| | | Hi - my name is Jimmy Patronis.

**As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, January 28th, I 'm officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.** I'm honored to have the trust of voters AND of President Trump whose endorsement helped put me over the top.

While I'm over the moon to be here today, I'm also reminded of the stakes of this Special Election...

House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House. I'll say this in a different way: If Democrats manage to win this Special Election and the two others for Mike Waltz and Elise Stefanik, they'll sweep back into power THIS YEAR.

That's why I'm working with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to sweep all three Special Elections - and save our Majority - so we can deliver on President Trump's agenda.

**_[If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b2135f5d3cca4bf3a380575e5aa6cb3e&_e=r2GK30XBXr5rHY2ZQC5K7e-7cgBqKLON-rhkrmj95j49oZewMRC_X_VfSCYqbhZTQGwFPkscy7xPHVm9HQVOaeShD8lCHiviTDqSo1mXvKvz1OfCuM14x4e391aqY90oGiaXdcFPGVw8_nGWuzF6jiR9Z8aA5u6O9aSL4GV67cgp4ahaqLWDAAWcUw5LgmARm0Zgmd5Q8zmkEGyHjTXkMvSahbL4N9O4mu8LK8B-g0dKV7zpF83in_D7s9j5i2LPOnS44SE8G34rDCIiagEsedlPDS_xOweaOrP-t7PHdl2CwYx-Sre8mR5MUqqqtdKTcjDhikMYNHAwOyIEKIvSA474AZq62RBI3uEsR4IxfqZEK_5vYxXjl9SYGCkLxx_JO8IjU6WJ1n7dvD9a0qM-c8k44auDIIuAhUPHgWzCrS4%3D "If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election. ")_**

_Would you be willing to step up when we need you most? _

Serving the State of Florida has been an honor of a lifetime. I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family's seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz.

But I can only take this experience to Congress if I defeat the Democrats in this race.

Special Elections are notoriously expensive and Democrats are desperate to win back the House. **_[That's why I'm teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b2135f5d3cca4bf3a380575e5aa6cb3e&_e=r2GK30XBXr5rHY2ZQC5K7e-7cgBqKLON-rhkrmj95j49oZewMRC_X_VfSCYqbhZTQGwFPkscy7xPHVm9HQVOaeShD8lCHiviTDqSo1mXvKvz1OfCuM14x4e391aqY90oGiaXdcFPGVw8_nGWuzF6jiR9Z8aA5u6O9aSL4GV67cgp4ahaqLWDAAWcUw5LgmARm0Zgmd5Q8zmkEGyHjTXkMvSahbL4N9O4mu8LK8B-g0dKV7zpF83in_D7s9j5i2LPluY0u7sog3QPOTHxuIJwZBMeSkwYWjVvQolNmqD4q3dQvgMmmqVopxW-cZubhLXFoWAkNgugwo34dfQOZClvZF6GHBB-hQ-JLEvku9FkyYjzXGD1ao966Rq4s5jW2x2jUX1zxw5vA-LG-KDOMqDgud05X96pYtLL_t6PwDNjpPs%3D "That’s why I’m teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.")_**

I JUST won my primary so hitting this goal so quickly would be a major show of force in this race.

**I know we can get there as long as everyone reading this agrees to send in just ten or twenty bucks. Can you do that for me?** ****[**YES >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b2135f5d3cca4bf3a380575e5aa6cb3e&_e=r2GK30XBXr5rHY2ZQC5K7e-7cgBqKLON-rhkrmj95j49oZewMRC_X_VfSCYqbhZTQGwFPkscy7xPHVm9HQVOaeShD8lCHiviTDqSo1mXvKvz1OfCuM14x4e391aqY90oGiaXdcFPGVw8_nGWuzF6jiR9Z8aA5u6O9aSL4GV67cgp4ahaqLWDAAWcUw5LgmARm0Zgmd5Q8zmkEGyHjTXkMvSahbL4N9O4mu8LK8B-g0dKV7zpF83in_D7s9j5i2LPeQ90thMMESBGeEtJy1CGVCwpYnmTegNpviFxULJtNDIHfTmJSPl5e2GTgv_UIArzbKY-SkvG-BqHms_cyE2nRN83gjby_nGsHfBvuyEc7XhewxAfWsPJE92tyGBfh8Ppmri3CNzjbn60wrgHfVQU8722mc07pNpVjHm0GYJoTyE%3D)_[**NO >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b2135f5d3cca4bf3a380575e5aa6cb3e&_e=r2GK30XBXr5rHY2ZQC5K7e-7cgBqKLON-rhkrmj95j49oZewMRC_X_VfSCYqbhZTQGwFPkscy7xPHVm9HQVOaeShD8lCHiviTDqSo1mXvKvz1OfCuM14x4e391aqY90oGiaXdcFPGVw8_nGWuzF6jiR9Z8aA5u6O9aSL4GV67cgp4ahaqLWDAAWcUw5LgmARm0Zgmd5Q8zmkEGyHjTXkMvSahbL4N9O4mu8LK8B-g0dKV7zpF83in_D7s9j5i2LP9QWtv1_LYS1itgboQFKUbztbptz_v6Z4IjjP17TFCBg1muwHMngRZWucG2dJzxe3jJr6OUUgNdoKXfNsgKwyKtDZSGdwLYOA4A43j-owNO2nRcTgyCBDikCuWr_HwZY4NZHIx4aoXTf4GGY7hNx92UykhfEm2-uItzKHBFtr9Hw%3D)****Thank you for hearing me out.

clean_body: House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House. I’m officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress. | | | | | Hi - my name is Jimmy Patronis. As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, January 28th, I 'm officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress. I'm honored to have the trust of voters AND of President Trump whose endorsement helped put me over the top. While I'm over the moon to be here today, I'm also reminded of the stakes of this Special Election... House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House. I'll say this in a different way: If Democrats manage to win this Special Election and the two others for Mike Waltz and Elise Stefanik, they'll sweep back into power THIS YEAR. That's why I'm working with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to sweep all three Special Elections - and save our Majority - so we can deliver on President Trump's agenda. "If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election. " Would you be willing to step up when we need you most? | "Jimmy Patronis and Donald Trump" Serving the State of Florida has been an honor of a lifetime. I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family's seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz. But I can only take this experience to Congress if I defeat the Democrats in this race. Special Elections are notoriously expensive and Democrats are desperate to win back the House. "That’s why I’m teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours." I JUST won my primary so hitting this goal so quickly would be a major show of force in this race. I know we can get there as long as everyone reading this agrees to send in just ten or twenty bucks. Can you do that for me? ** you for hearing me out. I look forward to fighting for the America First values that you, me, President Trump, Leader Scalise, and Matt Gaetz believe in. God bless you, - Jimmy JIMMY PATRONIS GOP Nominee for the FL-01 Special Election | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey" so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. body:
I know it doesn't sound like much, but my entire fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102192093/528382606/-1997846894?refcode=jtk1811-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWNkNDkzNi1jM2ViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_QE28wOMYGwpFqBg-vSUmxYq8X5s3Av2y8YV-zjFYg=)
---
$15.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $15 to my campaign today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102192094/528382607/-1997846894?amounts=6,25,50,100,500&amount=15&refcode=jtk1811-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWNkNDkzNi1jM2ViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_QE28wOMYGwpFqBg-vSUmxYq8X5s3Av2y8YV-zjFYg=) – but first, I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure _real_ wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe-to-toe with far-right lawmakers around the nation, I have made it clear that New York will not back down from protecting our fundamental freedoms and our very democracy.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. But, thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we approach my mid-month deadline at midnight, I _must_ keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $15 to hit my mid-month goal today, on the 15th, and help me continue my fight for progress. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102192095/528382608/-1997846894?amounts=6,25,50,100,500&amount=15&refcode=jtk1811-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWNkNDkzNi1jM2ViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_QE28wOMYGwpFqBg-vSUmxYq8X5s3Av2y8YV-zjFYg=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102192096/528382609/-1997846894?amounts=6,25,50,100,500&amount=15&refcode=jtk1811-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWNkNDkzNi1jM2ViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_QE28wOMYGwpFqBg-vSUmxYq8X5s3Av2y8YV-zjFYg=)

Thank you for all of your support.

Letitia
With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Why the Left doesn’t run as many primary challenger campaigns…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
One reason why the Left doesn’t run primary challenger campaigns as often as Republicans is because conservative primary challenges have billionaires behind them — and progressive primary challengers do not.
Alexandria started Courage to Change, her leadership PAC to support people-first progressive candidates who fight tooth and nail for social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.
_Moving politics in the direction of the working class requires the working class._
As we look to the next four years, we need the resources to support our fellow progressives who are facing off against Republican opponents who want to drag our country backwards.
[ Will you help ensure we have the resources to help by splitting a $5 contribution between Alexandria and Courage to Change today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250215-ctc.0BXPEK&refcode=em20250215-8159-P_FND_EGR_CTC&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8159%2E2526796%2EJsEAGY)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250215-ctc.0BXPEK&refcode=em20250215-8159-P_FND_EGR_CTC&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8159%2E2526796%2EJsEAGY)**
Thank you for your help. None of this would be possible without you.
Our sincerest thanks,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250215-ctc?refcode=em20250215-8159-P_FND_EGR_CTC&t=21&refcode2=8159_2526796_JsEAGY&akid=8159%2E2526796%2EJsEAGY)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250215-8159-P_FND_EGR_CTC&t=22&akid=8159%2E2526796%2EJsEAGY)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8159%2E2526796%2EJsEAGY) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8159%2E2526796%2EJsEAGY) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8159%2E2526796%2EJsEAGY)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Andy Beshear
subject: We're In This Together. Join me!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
We’re showing what happens when you govern well by focusing on the daily concerns of our people and bringing people together instead of sowing division.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102192370/528383742/1615663690?ms=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&refcode=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&source=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=IRCloVC5kPNnadBszeqXf+PdRNzzuQjiS+UOMu6mEYqt2VrhLXpWSv+JyVD2FWekj/y/kDLzQx20GTdTnnB0iP0+riizbNCd0nPzijOnEsxUi1er+tLZjHa5ZSIEuIC/FjzqcxlqLgcwe21a2euJhXT4X4Gmey6ZLqcshqpjT3zLpWGbahpRYu4/NT2lAx41&refcode2=3a515156-c4eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2E1MTUxNTYtYzRlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xPuD-jPCygTEb3kXyV_DlaM-_pfnNYiojLZ12oxXBy0=&emci=25960666-0deb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=3a515156-c4eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=17458827) Peter,

Kentucky’s economy is booming, we’re attracting thousands of good-paying jobs, making record investments in our infrastructure, delivering clean water to communities that have for far too long been overlooked and underserved and positioning our Commonwealth as a global leader in electric battery manufacturing.

The Kentucky success story stands in stark contrast to the chaos, dysfunction and division we’re seeing in Washington, D.C.

We’re showing what happens when you govern well by focusing on the daily concerns of our people and bringing people together instead of sowing division.

In my reelection campaign, Kentucky showed the nation that decency, compassion, and courage are the ingredients to a winning formula. We won big by sticking to our shared values, promoting unity over division, and rejecting the anger politics that have come to dominate our country.

**We have a roadmap to winning elections in tough states, and want to replicate our success both here in Kentucky and across the country.**

That’s why I'm excited to introduce you to In This Together PAC. In This Together is here to support good people and good candidates running for local, statewide, and federal office in red or purple states. We help candidates who demonstrate a commitment to leading with empathy and compassion, and have the backbone to always do what’s right — _regardless of politics._

Our success in Kentucky wasn't a fluke, and In This Together PAC is working to build on our success by supporting candidates nationwide who lead with compassion and reject the anger politics being used to divide us. [**Team: Add your name today to join the In This Together PAC team and send a message that America is stronger when we remember we're all in this together >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102192371/528383743/1615663690?ms=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&refcode=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&source=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=IRCloVC5kPNnadBszeqXf+PdRNzzuQjiS+UOMu6mEYqt2VrhLXpWSv+JyVD2FWekj/y/kDLzQx20GTdTnnB0iP0+riizbNCd0nPzijOnEsxUi1er+tLZjHa5ZSIEuIC/FjzqcxlqLgcwe21a2euJhXT4X4Gmey6ZLqcshqpjT3zLpWGbahpRYu4/NT2lAx41&refcode2=3a515156-c4eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2E1MTUxNTYtYzRlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xPuD-jPCygTEb3kXyV_DlaM-_pfnNYiojLZ12oxXBy0=&emci=25960666-0deb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=3a515156-c4eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=17458827) [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102192372/528383744/1615663690?ms=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&refcode=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&source=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=IRCloVC5kPNnadBszeqXf+PdRNzzuQjiS+UOMu6mEYqt2VrhLXpWSv+JyVD2FWekj/y/kDLzQx20GTdTnnB0iP0+riizbNCd0nPzijOnEsxUi1er+tLZjHa5ZSIEuIC/FjzqcxlqLgcwe21a2euJhXT4X4Gmey6ZLqcshqpjT3zLpWGbahpRYu4/NT2lAx41&refcode2=3a515156-c4eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2E1MTUxNTYtYzRlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xPuD-jPCygTEb3kXyV_DlaM-_pfnNYiojLZ12oxXBy0=&emci=25960666-0deb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=3a515156-c4eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=17458827) In November 2023 in Kentucky, we did something remarkable. We faced off against Mitch McConnell's protege, who had Donald Trump’s endorsement. We continued to stand our ground and do the right thing— _and we won because of it_.

With everything that is going on in our country, the American people are desperately seeking leaders who will stand up for what is right, reject partisan games, and lead with compassion and decency.

In Kentucky, I won reelection because I stuck to my values: I stood firm for abortion rights by vetoing four anti-choice bills, along with every single anti-LBGTQ+ bill that came to my desk — including one of the nastiest anti-trans bills in the entire country. I’ve used executive orders to ban conversion therapy statewide and to restore voting rights to nearly 200,000 Kentuckians.

In This Together PAC supports candidates nationwide who will stick to our shared values, provide steady leadership focused on the issues that matter most to people, and work to find common ground and common sense in our politics.

[**Support In This Together PAC by adding your name today and join us now to help elect leaders across the country who have the courage to stand up for what’s right >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102192373/528383745/1615663690?ms=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&refcode=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&source=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250215_GABWS1_adv_gq_owbf_003_AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=IRCloVC5kPNnadBszeqXf+PdRNzzuQjiS+UOMu6mEYqt2VrhLXpWSv+JyVD2FWekj/y/kDLzQx20GTdTnnB0iP0+riizbNCd0nPzijOnEsxUi1er+tLZjHa5ZSIEuIC/FjzqcxlqLgcwe21a2euJhXT4X4Gmey6ZLqcshqpjT3zLpWGbahpRYu4/NT2lAx41&refcode2=3a515156-c4eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2E1MTUxNTYtYzRlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xPuD-jPCygTEb3kXyV_DlaM-_pfnNYiojLZ12oxXBy0=&emci=25960666-0deb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=3a515156-c4eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=17458827)

Thank you for your time,

Andy Beshear
_In This Together PAC_

Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend,

Donald Trump and Musk's goons have their next target: Medicare and Medicaid. They've made it clear that these programs are the next to fall in their extremist agenda.

For Americans across the country, these initiatives aren't just programs — they're lifelines . Millions can access doctors, medications, and care that otherwise wouldn't be possible.

Since taking office, Trump has already rescinded President Biden's order that extended enrollment periods for the Affordable Care Act, which helped more people get access to healthcare. And recently, Musk tweeted about "fraud" in Medicare payments.

Let's be real: These MAGA extremists will use any excuse they can get to cut these vital health programs. That's why we need to hear from you.

name: Rep. Dave Min
subject: 51% vs. 49%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
Our proven strategy in California |

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102194164/528388915/1841815421?refcode=20250215_FR_45DO_MinSurrogate&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjJhNzRhYi1jN2ViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=27RraL_LtpYZtx7KkBb3ypM1fRcQTTeFNYLJbl_bU-U=) Hi there — I’m newly elected Congressman Dave Min. Last November, I was elected in CA-47 to replace outgoing Rep. Katie Porter in **one of the closest Congressional races across the entire state and country.** We were rated as a “tossup” by numerous election forecasters. Plenty of talking heads and pundits thought this seat was one of the blue districts that would flip red. **[But we won a close victory. Because Democrats like you supported our strategy that centered early grassroots organizing and people power. Now, we have an opportunity in front of us to run the same successful playbook again and retake the U.S. House. Will you split a donation between my swing seat campaign and the California Democratic Party today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102194165/528388943/1841815421?refcode=20250215_FR_45DO_MinSurrogate&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjJhNzRhYi1jN2ViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=27RraL_LtpYZtx7KkBb3ypM1fRcQTTeFNYLJbl_bU-U=)** The 2024 election was extremely disappointing in the Presidential race. But here in California, **_we defied the national environment_** and flipped three seats from red to blue — all while defending vulnerable blue districts like mine in CA-47. But these races weren’t a foregone conclusion. Many of them were incredibly close, including my own race. Aren’t convinced? _Take a look below_ : [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102194166/528388944/1841815421?refcode=20250215_FR_45DO_MinSurrogate&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjJhNzRhYi1jN2ViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=27RraL_LtpYZtx7KkBb3ypM1fRcQTTeFNYLJbl_bU-U=) **51% to 49%, it doesn’t get much closer than that.** If we hadn’t had early support from volunteers, organizers, and grassroots donors, this race might’ve gone a very different way. _Republicans could’ve flipped this seat and expanded their House Majority_. Instead, we won critical races and Republicans went into 2025 with one of the smallest majorities in our country’s history. And it’s because folks like you pitch in $35 or $55 to open regional offices, hire staff, print literature, and mobilize long before Election Day. **[Now, we have the chance to run this winning playbook again and take back the U.S. House. clean_body: Our proven strategy in California | | = Hi there — I’m newly elected Congressman Dave Min. Last November, I was elected in CA-47 to replace outgoing Rep. Katie Porter in one of the closest Congressional races across the entire state and country. We were rated as a “tossup” by numerous election forecasters. Plenty of talking heads and pundits thought this seat was one of the blue districts that would flip red. = The 2024 election was extremely disappointing in the Presidential race. But here in California, we defied the national environment and flipped three seats from red to blue — all while defending vulnerable blue districts like mine in CA-47. But these races weren’t a foregone conclusion. Many of them were incredibly close, including my own race. Aren’t convinced? Take a look below : = 51% to 49%, it doesn’t get much closer than that. If we hadn’t had early support from volunteers, organizers, and grassroots donors, this race might’ve gone a very different way. Republicans could’ve flipped this seat and expanded their House Majority. Instead, we won critical races and Republicans went into 2025 with one of the smallest majorities in our country’s history. And it’s because folks like you pitch in $35 or $55 to open regional offices, hire staff, print literature, and mobilize long before Election Day. = = = = = = Thank you so much for your support in the past and going forward. When Democrats take back the U.S. House, and put a “check” on Donald Trump, it will be because of you. Yours, \- Dave Min | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. body:
This budget would cause irreparable harm to working-class families across Kansas and add trillions of dollars to the national debt

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102194507/528390142/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjgzMDA2Mi1jOGViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tEjUgInTGHTgXnU38yl61LxZjxxfLOVifvWu3zT3I0E=) Earlier this week, House Republicans introduced a new budget plan. And I don’t say this lightly: Throughout all my time in Congress, I have never seen a more extreme, more harmful proposal than this. **The House GOP’s new budget plan calls for cutting $880 billion from Medicaid. It calls for cutting $220 billion from nutrition assistance, including SNAP benefits. And it calls for cutting $330 billion in public school funding.** Let’s be clear: Reducing SNAP benefits would force American children to go hungry. Slashing Medicaid would rip away affordable health care from millions of families while driving up costs for everyone else. And gutting funding for public education would cause immeasurable harm to children across Kansas, especially low-income students. I haven’t even reached the truly enraging part yet. In that very same budget, National Republicans are calling for a **$4.5 trillion tax cut for big corporations and the ultra-wealthy.** That means this budget would cause irreparable harm to working-class families across Kansas _and_ add trillions of dollars to the national debt. **It’s a lose-lose situation — unless you’re a billionaire like Elon Musk.** **I want you to know that I will use every tool at my disposal to fight back against this outrageous plan.** In the coming weeks, I will not stay silent as House Republicans try to make life easier for a handful of billionaires while leaving working-class families high and dry. [_**If you’re against these dangerous, reckless cuts to health care, education, and nutrition assistance, sign your name to my new petition today. We need to show House Republicans that working-class families strongly OPPOSE their plan to rip off the American people.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102194508/528390143/-1208484490?refcode=email_021525_Budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjgzMDA2Mi1jOGViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tEjUgInTGHTgXnU38yl61LxZjxxfLOVifvWu3zT3I0E=&emci=9c762afe-46ea-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8b830062-c8eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=22117458) | | [Sign Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102194509/528390144/-2136100585?refcode=email_021525_Budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjgzMDA2Mi1jOGViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tEjUgInTGHTgXnU38yl61LxZjxxfLOVifvWu3zT3I0E=&emci=9c762afe-46ea-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8b830062-c8eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=22117458)

With Trump starting to implement Project 2025, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. 10 states are holding elections that require our immediate attention. The MAGA movement could easily pour millions of dollars into our Republican counterparts' campaigns, and the only way we can keep up with them is if we have the resources to compete. $7 from youis all we’re asking for to help fund state Democrats in our fight to secure a VICTORY in upcoming elections in states like Minnesota and Pennsylvania. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Together, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. body:
Please don’t leave us

|
---
| | | | |
---
| |
OFFICIAL EXTERNAL HOUSE GOP COMMUNICATION

TO [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/FakPFZc9x99Du2VRIR9z641bPMxMb9bDhCzkdnWxVGi2Xtpg2xwFkzlCcjKsw81cuGAN4ZKBpjoqwBKUZNsBnloasBRMFDr14YLsVVzjUAFUgHBRxeiFhQaJ1Ea2WvpX8lFu0wg0iHScDBgbfXDHLz_Q7vqyBoNfiUHaDe9s2X9yHiHHwEyJ6c3MrNMB_NgiW2VpkBMRWXUYCDMm8B0LIUbmdYOkyVufi8x4VIS-AVkEUK-6ZzllMuZFqel_ZMY1SJayIS6FqfFqnvvlBD7QHmi3fCToqKFGiSAukUOHdtdQTZx_Fvwyeg0NAcSjBfQnsAM-woO-Lik6Tuam7G5v79cZ26gyny_NtF8xh4TZ_kHNrDd47PFNby-d8zWapBmQtTL_u2Z0iXW_q9ga6cS-E-A2OPcrflD_KwuvSpSmfGI5y0yca7QgJCPD3Gwk-4iTmc0e6g7Dcxq-qa46EV2gTXUSD52bQ9uSbNK0eikzYRMgxzKUOWZy-_k/BMdBLAdJOwF5SyifI79bNRo9MeJmoRKl/6 "dpwillis67@gmail.com") ONLY

---

Peter - The choices we make now will determine the direction of our nation for generations to come. **_That's why it's more important than ever that we have a strong, united team standing behind our House Majority._**

But we can't do it without you - turning this country around is a TEAM effort. **That's why I was so shocked when I saw that your 2025 House GOP Membership expired.**

What happened?

---
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/vZPcl_nPsN09pQvCz6hWrQiSLfPy89LOnqR8wXoyicrWH32ApEdhv0m08k8Y_4Q-r1sMfLGG38ftKL9FJJNwJA_Xc9p4AALtsR4cEY7ut5hG4d6-jQ-tqLUVj_yapynzEaBKJZ8b7FZvgdDVMPx1hA7jQWjqnlrpVJuXUBxdxzKJ0hNpkvPur9_jShULS2NiqttpElFYQRsR7a7PdsAyA4J3Tfk-Nvh87NsjhjkWMKrAHEI92QbgKPRZvUKf3JPucI6fIOh4Zzd-RQHQn4TRePcm8cCkyHKtoO4SKLnB5J9cjFAExoJRDfU9OvpDxCPxhCywLDJbfvXxo3tvVKSM81N1hJmcGlFF2jB9VeDQhtxOgytqjq4SH0oJVzKJiefa83mrDuOuYRt_WA7egj7JwBAhQVQqmGKb7DIhre4mxoqcIzs8KOa57JTRLZ-3dxyCqPjvAZNjrvBkvR7W7byfre_j-3GbhXnCwqU3cGG5dbHUYOkKrPAsNAw/dsCIxlvzg7KuIPD9OoUtwYk7WYXgMvw9/6)
---

**We 're offering you one final chance to rejoin the team and reactivate your membership, but there's not much time, Peter!**

_At midnight tonight, this offer will**CLOSE**. The clock is ticking, and we need you in this fight with us - the Radical Left is throwing all they've got at us._

---
| | | [CLAIM 2025 MEMBERSHIP >> ](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Bj-vfC0Mm5WLTGzpNaoLjNPO7tLwoV36RP_jdtSWyZDlV9X8LzkxMAOm7Ge71C9RZjWafYBeiFlukQor4Z8Abv_kAFj7g2BcwkwDNcl8pZXwMfINAFhX09pGQShcecGusxCqv_zESfJRgSa6A-mRx2bcpyotXsDbX-BGsF11yRHax99f1poZGHITDazbEIWqwmE3kO8qXVhMxlNNgZqv7X_aKOnhenH0hOyrx2bValWlhmwJ8FhKJ-uxb2NaxfmF5TvdigBfxXyYPl-A6nPjQEQEaoNHZUNRjmxW1BJ7LmNMDXLL0_3hXs56JNCV6UIX2KdkKcIa9AgH7uPLFl-N3_f8qZ-oerIkgtFxfAgL7HUoDy69QjnQDeTWTDA6WxiCpOYhqu7Et2k1Q-x8xMYjqvKd7_6T2bkp2HzP5NSal0t7wD3SLHXMqaHY3r4vwOgGM2YyCSZjD5mCn75VhFdBGhT9hp4GMLSRvii0BT2zJ1sFa2EaTuCOpb0/plkercuZnqqpFcdruM-2qzwLPCW-o3Zu/6 "Generic Button")

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Protect SNAP Benefits—Support Families in Need
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
Dear Friend, this is Gay Valimont, FL-1 candidate, and **families need our help.** Recent reports indicate that House Republicans are proposing significant cuts to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), aiming to reduce benefits by $23 billion over the next decade. These cuts would primarily affect able-bodied recipients without children and those receiving additional benefits through home-heating subsidies. **Without us, thousands of families are in jeopardy of losing an integral part of what allows them to live.**
---
---
This proposal is part of a broader $170 billion spending reduction package designed to gain **support from fiscal conservatives for a 10-year budget plan.** However, such drastic cuts to SNAP could have severe consequences for millions of Americans who rely on this assistance to feed their families. As someone committed to supporting our community's most vulnerable members, I**firmly oppose these proposed reductions.****** Ensuring access to basic nutrition is not only a moral obligation but also a fundamental aspect of fostering a healthy and productive society. **I am running for Congress to advocate for policies that protect and strengthen essential programs like SNAP.** With your support, we can work towards a future where no family has to worry about where their next meal will come from.
---
**[Please consider contributing to our campaign to help us fight against these harmful cuts and stand up for those in need. Rushing $8 today can help us push for a better America.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102195513/528392810/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjg1ZGFlNzMtY2FlYi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AEswegqxMFAFFBrXmeTCvoJLt8MSwR54AwN2K7VQIZo=)**

name: Team Pramila
subject: We can pressure Republicans into standing up to Elon, but only with your support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Tonight we’re facing our February mid-month fundraising deadline, and we’ve set an important goal of raising $3,500 before midnight.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250215-4771-footer&t=1&akid=4771%2E420207%2EkQSet2)
Hey Peter, Team Pramila here!
Tonight we’re facing our February mid-month deadline, and we’ve set a goal of raising $3,500 before midnight. [**Can you pitch in $3 right now to help us reach it?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250215?refcode=em20250215-4771&amount=3&refcode2=4771_420207_kQSet2&akid=4771%2E420207%2EkQSet2)
Here’s why reaching this goal so important:
* Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their whole corrupt billionaire administration are on the offensive right now, _**but public opinion is turning.**_

* We need the resources to organize voters across the country and show Republicans that **the people did not vote for Elon Musk** to loot our government and line the pockets of billionaires.

* We can pressure Republicans into standing up to Elon, and then we can continue to grow our movement to defeat them in 2026 and 2028. _**But only with your support!**_

To make sure we have the resources to keep up this fight, we _need_ to hit this $3,500 goal before midnight, Peter.
[**If you’re with us, will you pitch in $3 or any amount you can right now to help us reach our goal and grow our progressive movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250215?refcode=em20250215-4771&amount=3&refcode2=4771_420207_kQSet2&akid=4771%2E420207%2EkQSet2)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250215?amount=3&refcode=em20250215-4771&refcode2=4771_420207_kQSet2&akid=4771%2E420207%2EkQSet2)**
Together,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250215-4771-footer&t=2&refcode2=4771_420207_kQSet2&akid=4771%2E420207%2EkQSet2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4771%2E420207%2EkQSet2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4771%2E420207%2EkQSet2)

Hi. I bet that's not what you were expecting on a big red hat these days

_(But don 't you worry, I'm about as pro-Trump as they come!)_

_My name 's Marlin Stutzman._ I'm a 4th-generation farmer raising the finest Wagyu cows this side of the Mississippi. When I'm not herding cattle and hauling hay, I'm fighting the good fight in the People's House.

I ran for office because the Democrats AND even some Republicans have stabbed farmers like me in the back for as long as I can remember.

Ask any farmer - they'll show you the scars.

**I swear elites in DC think meat and produce *magically appear* at Whole Foods - not because farmers devote their blood, sweat, and tears to their trade. **

That's how they can sleep at night knowing...
* China is buying up our farmland
* Democrats taxed us into oblivion
* Liberals want to replace beef with fake meat made from God knows what
* Politicians get rich at our expense
* We're left to pick up the scraps

My entire life is focused on bringing all that to a screeching halt. And the political class knows I can't be bought off or bribed. That's why they're mobilizing the powers-at-be to silence me so they can keep the gravy train rolling.

_And holding the line here will be tougher than a $3 steak._

**[That's why I'm left with no choice but to ask you for a small donation today to keep me in Congress. I don't care if it's $3 or $300 - the amount doesn't matter nearly as much as the number of people who give.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c7896cc8ab41453ca8fe7a071c7fb0df&_e=7DdD-WjDCaBnwHCNKfyi3BirjBw3462rBTSFSM4n0_UpwB0fQPmoo0kilLHoKsh08BxlhMpKmV60HQ_BEK65vx-IePe6KrZetRjAg_U_U2HY554MX_pJh6gOsddIQ_G_5DbuWJI0UZovW11LxIpRrzbhdJN0t8aM0vGRWuZgX_w_Bn_0JBdyhSS35ZZCE7de0BPFI-GldUVCzdCKpoXqQ29RV2SLQaSXtpzKn9cWDvcnFIzHKCefKA08hqmXW-DyvW4XsTjPx99mAxrizQK48tHTxwlNWX3MlaCMzEUwxHZjk2a75-dIwjgUc9RtAv0g2Ch1gxAdwiXA6tIIRBc1qmZKekfOhJDWp4BsyqYsGPK_ExmM6l6O19670EJgYIAU8jq1vrsS3SKmQ0DZGba5OQ%3D%3D "That’s why I’m left with no choice but to ask you for a small donation today to keep me in Congress. I don’t care if it’s $3 or $300 – the amount doesn't matter nearly as much as the number of people who give.")**

name: Darin LaHood
subject: Hey, friend, what is your top-priority policy for Congress?

name: =?utf-8?q?=E2=80=9CIlhan_Omar_via_Justice_Democrats=E2=80=9D?=
subject: Republicans are calling for my deportation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250215-io?refcode=em20250215-36434&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36434_1203867_HAXY2J&akid=36434%2E1203867%2EHAXY2J ]Headline: House Republican fundraises with petition to deport Ilhan
Omar

Peter — it’s
Ilhan Omar. I’m appalled.

One of my Republican colleagues in the House, Rep. Brandon Gill, sent out
a fundraising email this week calling for my deportation, and asking his
supporters to sign a petition to make it happen.

Take a look for yourself at what he sent:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250215-io?refcode=em20250215-36434&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36434_1203867_HAXY2J&akid=36434%2E1203867%2EHAXY2J ]Screenshot from Rep. Brandon Gill’s email that reads: Friend, we should
have never let Ilhan Omar into our country. And frankly, America would be
a much better place if she were to be sent back to Somalia. Sign the
Petition - Deport Ilhan Omar

Reprehensible, racist, and un-American. The email went on to say that I
was “facilitating a full-scale invasion of our country," and that I am
committing “treason.”

Threatening to deport legal US citizens because you disagree with them is
fascism. Full stop. But I expect nothing less from the GOP under Trump and
Elon Musk.

Peter,
it’s clear that the far-right has been emboldened and out of control since
Trump took office.

Just look at what they are doing to our federal government.

Elon Musk is illegally slashing crucial agencies and programs while
protecting funding for his companies, like SpaceX. They’re scaling back
the core functions of our government so they can line the pockets of their
billionaire friends. It’s like the wildest dreams of the ultra-rich
finally coming true.

Our best response to the far-right in this moment is to organize all of
our people, all our resources, all of the tools we have at our disposal,
to stand against Trump’s administration.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250215-io?refcode=em20250215-36434&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36434_1203867_HAXY2J&akid=36434%2E1203867%2EHAXY2J ]If that sounds like a plan to you, please, split a contribution between
my campaign and Justice Democrats so we can continue to fight back. We are
organizing to block Trump’s agenda in every way we can, but we need your
help to get it done.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250215-io?refcode=em20250215-36434&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36434_1203867_HAXY2J&akid=36434%2E1203867%2EHAXY2J ]Contribute $5

The far-right may be emboldened right now, but the American people are
already seeing through their extremist agenda. It’s our job to keep
exposing them each and every day.

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250215-36434-footer&t=1001&refcode2=36434_1203867_HAXY2J&akid=36434%2E1203867%2EHAXY2J

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=36434%2E1203867%2EHAXY2J

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Laurel Viles
subject: Re: Peter, utility rate hikes in Oregon have gone too far
body:
I hope you are all staying warm with this winter weather! This storm has got me thinking...| | | Hi Peter, I hope you all enjoyed the snow and have been staying warm! With this winter weather, I’ve been thinking a lot about my energy bills — and I’m sure you have too. In the last 5 months since moving to Portland, I have noticed a drastic increase in my energy bill. PGE’s rates are significantly higher than the energy bills I had in Eugene with EWEB. I’m someone who’s careful about my energy use, but with this winter storm weather, I’ve had to turn my heat up. My rental apartment still has outdated baseboard heaters, as do many other homes, which makes for super inefficient heating. It’s weather like this and outdated inefficient systems, like baseboard heaters, that drive up energy prices a lot.
---
| | That is just my story, but I know thousands of Oregonians like myself are struggling with rising utility and energy bills. **I’d like to hear from you; what’s your story?**[**Use this form to tell us yours and urge our lawmakers to help Oregonians save money and improve our climate resiliency.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102196867/528396718/1723080746?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0ZGQxMzE3LWNmZWItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wLzqB8Yu-GNP5Ex_2jlCQxpHM8qHwlAmp5PVKRFS3fM=&emci=f50ebf95-06eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=24dd1317-cfeb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)
