Why I Ran in 2024 --And Why I'm Running Again in 2026 I ran for Congress in 2024 because I saw the cracks forming long before election season. I saw the dysfunction, the failures of imagination, and the widening gap between what is politically possible and what is actually needed for human and planetary survival. And here's the thing: just in our district alone, tens of thousands of people saw it too. Despite running a campaign with almost no advertising, on a shoestring grassroots budget, in the shortest election timeline possible, over 90,000 people voted for the vision, courage, and principle I brought. That is proof of concept. That is evidence that people are looking for something different --someone who speaks plainly, who isn't owned, and who actually understands what's at stake. So yes, I 'm running again in 2026. But this work is bigger than an election. If all I wanted was a seat in Congress, I could twist myself into the shape of a "traditional" candidate. I could self-censor, manipulate people's emotions, bow to the powerful, take corrupt money, toe the party line, and play it safe. But winning for the sake of winning is not the point. Never has been, and never will be. I have always believed that our real task is to see further --to build the systems, communities, and alternative structures that will allow us to endure, outlast, and eventually replace the failing ones. That is why I haven't been publishing here for a while. I needed to see what this moment would bring, and take a deep, long breath and figure out how best to approach it - what will best serve you, us, and the future. Reacting to attacks, while necessary, isn't sufficient for long-term success. What we need isn 't just more analysis. We need strategy, resilience, and a realignment toward long-term thinking. We're fighting battles on dozens of fronts, but we need a strategy not just to win, but to outlast the war. This Substack Is Back --And Here's What to Expect This is why I'm back, and where I bring this work to you. Some of what I'll write about here will touch on my campaign--what it means to run for Congress as a principled outsider, the fights worth having, the ways we can pull the future into the present instead of getting dragged backward. Rest assured that I am, and will always be, on the side of principle, courage, standing up for the most vulnerable, and creating a world that truly works for all - and when you need an ally in any of those fights, you can trust me. Never hesitate to reach out. But some of what I publish here will go beyond politics, into work that is, or I hope will be, immediately relevant to your daily life. I want to talk about: How we build resilient communities and economies outside of broken systems. How we recognize historical patterns in real-time and navigate them wisely. How we maintain clarity, courage, and adaptability in a time of upheaval. How we build lives, families, and futures that are worthy of the world we hope to see. This is where we do that work. If that sounds like something you want to be part of, stick around. The next post will lay out what 's coming next. And if you want to see me in person--if you want to talk about this moment, this movement, and the way forward--come see me speak on February 22nd at MAPS (Muslim Association of Puget Sound), where I'll be at the AMAC Banquet with Mehdi Hasan. You can register . I look forward to seeing you there - we need to be having these conversations together. There's work to do, opportunities to build, and a future to save. Let's begin. With clarity and resolve, Melissa | | ---|---|--- "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. You 're currently a free subscriber to "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry. To support the mission and access the full experience, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Melissa Chaudhry 6727 Martin Luther King Jr Way S, Suite M, #1117 Seattle, WA 98118 ? ?

# [#]
Peter, it’s George.

I know it’s getting late on a Saturday, so I promise I won’t keep you long.

Here’s the deal: Tonight at midnight marks our February mid-month fundraising deadline, and from where we currently stand, we’re still $1,672 short from our goal.

I wouldn’t be so worried if this was a normal month, but Peter, February is the shortest month of the year, and we’ve got 3 less days than usual to make up this ground.

Falling behind isn’t an option — now more than ever we need to show our strength in numbers and take on the Trump-Musk administration with full force and confidence.

We’ve got to turn this around before midnight, which is why I’m asking: Will you chip in $ or whatever you can now? → secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-feb25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-feb25?amount=]

Thanks for standing with me.

— George

name: The Democratic Party
subject: In the words of DNC Chair Ken Martin:
body:
---

To do that, we’ll need to invest in state parties nationwide, organize year-round, and reach voters where they are — making sure Democrats’ message is breaking through on all platforms. All of this work is funded by grassroots support. It’s supporters like you, Derek, who help build a robust Democratic Party. But it’s moments like these — where the stakes are incredibly high — when we need you most. [**So we’re asking: Will you chip in $3 to the DNC today? name: Andrea Salinas HQ
subject: 5 things you need to know
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102206583/528421795/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWEwZTQzNS1mNmViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1f2dVOgBsGTX93pBSEpbhSXGYokSMIzGxkzhWo8dOzs=) We’re going to be transparent: this is a fundraising email. We don’t blame you for being annoyed. There’s enough going on without also having to deal with a bunch of requests for money from well-intentioned political candidates. We get it. **But please hear us out before you close this email.** The fact is, if you’re looking for ways to fight back against the right-wing extremists in control of Washington, [**_donating to fighters like Andrea Salinas is one of the most important ways to do that_**.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102206584/528421796/-533866197?refcode=email_021525_five-things&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWEwZTQzNS1mNmViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1f2dVOgBsGTX93pBSEpbhSXGYokSMIzGxkzhWo8dOzs=) **Here are five reasons why:** **1) Andrea is fighting hard every day to protect the people of Oregon from Trump’s attacks.** That means opposing loudly and clearly opposing legislation on the House floor that puts billionaires before working people, spreading the word to grassroots supporters how they can join the cause, and supporting efforts in the courts to rein in Trump’s unlawful actions. **2) Even as she stands up against right-wing extremism, Andrea is still working to help people and make progress wherever possible**. It may not be front-page news, but since she was sworn in last month, Andrea has pushed to strengthen access to mental health care and addiction services, provide constituents with information to help them file their taxes for free, and allow Americans to vote by mail in all 50 states. **3) The most important way to put guardrails on Trump’s presidency is to elect a Congress that will keep him in check.** That means we NEED to flip the House — and we can’t do that if we let Republicans’ billionaire allies defeat swing-district representatives like Andrea. **4) Our fundraising to start 2025 is way behind what we expected — and it’s critical we start to right the ship**. We knew there would be some dropoff, but we are going to be in some major trouble in 2026 if we don’t start building up a real campaign. **5) Andrea is not a billionaire, and unlike so many of her colleagues, she doesn’t do their bidding either**. That means if we’re going to fight back against all the Trump administration’s attacks — via legislation, in court, in the media, and at the ballot box — it’s going to take grassroots investment. Hardworking folks just giving a few dollars whenever they can to keep this fight going. [_**We know it’s a lot to ask, but if any of these five reasons resonate with you, can we count on you to pitch in $5 to help Andrea Salinas fight for our community, our democracy, and our country in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102206585/528421797/-533866197?refcode=email_021525_five-things&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWEwZTQzNS1mNmViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1f2dVOgBsGTX93pBSEpbhSXGYokSMIzGxkzhWo8dOzs=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102206586/528421798/-533866197?refcode=email_021525_five-things&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWEwZTQzNS1mNmViLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1f2dVOgBsGTX93pBSEpbhSXGYokSMIzGxkzhWo8dOzs=)
---
Thanks for reading, and for all your support.

clean_body: = We’re going to be transparent: this is a fundraising email. We don’t blame you for being annoyed. There’s enough going on without also having to deal with a bunch of requests for money from well-intentioned political candidates. We get it. But please hear us out before you close this email. The fact is, if you’re looking for ways to fight back against the right-wing extremists in control of Washington, = Here are five reasons why: 1) Andrea is fighting hard every day to protect the people of Oregon from Trump’s attacks. That means opposing loudly and clearly opposing legislation on the House floor that puts billionaires before working people, spreading the word to grassroots supporters how they can join the cause, and supporting efforts in the courts to rein in Trump’s unlawful actions. 2) Even as she stands up against right-wing extremism, Andrea is still working to help people and make progress wherever possible. It may not be front-page news, but since she was sworn in last month, Andrea has pushed to strengthen access to mental health care and addiction services, provide constituents with information to help them file their taxes for free, and allow Americans to vote by mail in all 50 states. 3) The most important way to put guardrails on Trump’s presidency is to elect a Congress that will keep him in check. That means we NEED to flip the House — and we can’t do that if we let Republicans’ billionaire allies defeat swing-district representatives like Andrea. 4) Our fundraising to start 2025 is way behind what we expected — and it’s critical we start to right the ship. We knew there would be some dropoff, but we are going to be in some major trouble in 2026 if we don’t start building up a real campaign. 5) Andrea is not a billionaire, and unlike so many of her colleagues, she doesn’t do their bidding either. That means if we’re going to fight back against all the Trump administration’s attacks — via legislation, in court, in the media, and at the ballot box — it’s going to take grassroots investment. Hardworking folks just giving a few dollars whenever they can to keep this fight going. = | | = Thanks for reading, and for all your support. -Team Salinas | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. **“Donald Trump Impeachment Articles Filed. Here's What Happens Next”** [Source: _Newsweek_]
---
Voters like YOU made your voices heard loud and clear last fall when you sent President Trump back to the White House with Republican majorities in Congress.
---
But the Democrats couldn’t care less about the will of the _PEOPLE_.
---
In fact, the Radical Democrat who filed these articles even claimed that impeachment doesn’t require a crime at all. He simply said, “the word _misdemeanor_ means misdeeds.”
---
In other words, the Democrats believe they can **IMPEACH** the duly elected President of the United States so long as they don’t like him.
---
_That’s how little the Left respects our Republic._
---
Peter, make no mistake, there’s only ONE thing that should _“happen next:”_ **These sham articles of impeachment should be thrown to the ash heap!**
---
_Which is why I’m reaching out to every grassroots patriot I can to ask that you sign your name to demand the Democrats' latest sham impeachment hoax be SHUT DOWN IMMEDIATELY._
